One of the dice is randomly selected from the urn and rolled. The same die is rolled a second time. Calculate the probability that a 6 is rolled both times.
(A) 0.174(B) 0.250(C) 0.292(D) 0.380(E) 0.417
选骰两掷全概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按选中骰子全概率分解\(P(6,6)=\sum_i P(6,6|d_i)P(d_i)\)L04
② 各骰子条件概率\(\frac{1}{36},\ \frac{1}{9},\ 1\)L03
③ 加权求和\(\frac{1}{72}+\frac{2}{72}+\frac{18}{72}=0.292\)∫ 微积分
122组合计数L02
An insurance agent meets twelve potential customers independently, each of whom is equally likely to purchase an insurance product. Six are interested only in auto insurance, four are interested only in homeowners insurance, and two are interested only in life insurance. The agent makes six sales. Calculate the probability that two are for auto insurance, two are for homeowners insurance, and two are for life insurance.
(A) 0.001(B) 0.024(C) 0.069(D) 0.097(E) 0.500
多元超几何
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 三类各取2的多元超几何\(\frac{\binom{6}{2}\binom{4}{2}\binom{2}{2}}{\binom{12}{6}}\)L02
② 逐项计算组合数\(\frac{15(6)(1)}{924}\)L02
③ 化简\(=0.097\)∫ 微积分
123连续联合 超纲L24
A policyholder has probability 0.7 of having no claims, 0.2 of having exactly one claim, and 0.1 of having exactly two claims. Claim amounts are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 60] and are independent. The insurer covers 100% of each claim. Calculate the probability that the total benefit paid to the policyholder is 48 or less.
(A) 0.320(B) 0.400(C) 0.800(D) 0.892(E) 0.924
两均匀和需积分
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按索赔数分三情形\(P(\le48|N=0)=1\)L04
② 一笔时均匀概率\(48/60=0.8\)L15
③ 两笔时正方形内三角面积\(\frac{48^2/2}{60^2}=0.32\)L24
④ 全概率合成\(0.7(1)+0.2(0.8)+0.1(0.32)=0.892\)L04
124命名分布L19
In a given region, the number of tornadoes in a one-week period is modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 2. The numbers of tornadoes in different weeks are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that fewer than four tornadoes occur in a three-week period.
(A) 0.13(B) 0.15(C) 0.29(D) 0.43(E) 0.86
三周泊松<4
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立泊松和仍泊松\(N_1+N_2+N_3\sim\mathrm{Pois}\)L19
② 三周合并参数\(\lambda=3\times2=6\)L19
③ 累计pmf求和\(e^{-6}(1+6+18+36)=0.1512\)∫ 微积分
125命名分布L17
An electronic system contains three cooling components that operate independently. The probability of each component's failure is 0.05. The system will overheat if and only if at least two components fail. Calculate the probability that the system will overheat.
(A) 0.007(B) 0.045(C) 0.098(D) 0.135(E) 0.143
三取二失效
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 失效数服从二项(3,0.05)\(N\sim B(3,0.05)\)L17
② 至少2个失效拆两项\(P(N\ge2)=\binom{3}{2}(0.05)^2(0.95)+(0.05)^3\)L17
③ 计算\(=0.00725\)∫ 微积分
126命名分布L21 · L06
An insurance company's annual profit is normally distributed with mean 100 and variance 400. Let Z be normally distributed with mean 0 and variance 1 and let F be the cumulative distribution function of Z. Determine the probability that the company's profit in a year is at most 60, given that the profit in the year is positive.
(A) \(1 - F(2)\)(B) \(F(2)/F(5)\)(C) \([1 - F(2)]/F(5)\)(D) \([F(0.25) - F(0.1)]/F(0.25)\)(E) \([F(5) - F(2)]/F(5)\)
正态条件表达式
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率写比式\(P(X\le60|X>0)=\frac{P(00)}\)L03
② 标准化到Z\(\frac{F(-2)-F(-5)}{1-F(-5)}\)L21
③ 用对称性改写\(F(-x)=1-F(x)\Rightarrow\frac{F(5)-F(2)}{F(5)}\)L21
127条件与贝叶斯L04
In a group of health insurance policyholders, 20% have high blood pressure and 30% have high cholesterol. Of the policyholders with high blood pressure, 25% have high cholesterol. A policyholder is randomly selected from the group. Calculate the probability that a policyholder has high blood pressure, given that the policyholder has high cholesterol.
(A) 1/6(B) 1/5(C) 1/4(D) 2/3(E) 5/6
条件概率反转
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 设事件列已知量\(P(B)=0.2,\ P(C)=0.3,\ P(C|B)=0.25\)L03
② 贝叶斯翻转条件\(P(B|C)=\frac{P(C|B)P(B)}{P(C)}\)L04
③ 代入计算\(\frac{0.25(0.2)}{0.3}=\frac{1}{6}\)∫ 微积分
128组合计数 📌 L02L02
In a group of 25 factory workers, 20 are low-risk and five are high-risk. Two of the 25 factory workers are randomly selected without replacement. Calculate the probability that exactly one of the two selected factory workers is low-risk.
(A) 0.160(B) 0.167(C) 0.320(D) 0.333(E) 0.633
不放回恰一低危
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 高低风险各取1超几何\(\frac{\binom{20}{1}\binom{5}{1}}{\binom{25}{2}}\)L02
② 计算\(\frac{100}{300}=0.333\)∫ 微积分
③ 顺序乘法两路验证\(2\times\frac{20}{25}\cdot\frac{5}{24}=\frac{200}{600}\)L03
129数字特征L08 · L20
The proportion X of yearly dental claims that exceed 200 is a random variable with probability density function \(f(x) = 60x^3(1 - x)^2\) for \(0 < x < 1\); \(f(x) = 0\) otherwise. Calculate \(Var[X/(1 - X)]\)
(A) 149/900(B) 10/7(C) 6(D) 8(E) 10
beta函数方差,无专章
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① LOTUS求一阶矩\(E[\tfrac{X}{1-X}]=60\int_0^1 x^4(1-x)dx=2\)L07
② LOTUS求二阶矩\(60\int_0^1 x^5 dx=10\)L07
③ 矩差得方差\(10-2^2=6\)L08
130组合计数 📌 L01L01
This year, a medical insurance policyholder has probability 0.70 of having no emergency room visits, 0.85 of having no hospital stays, and 0.61 of having neither emergency room visits nor hospital stays Calculate the probability that the policyholder has at least one emergency room visit and at least one hospital stay this year.
(A) 0.045(B) 0.060(C) 0.390(D) 0.667(E) 0.840
至少各一容斥
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补集得并事件概率\(P(A\cup B)=1-0.61=0.39\)L01
② 补集得各自概率\(P(A)=1-0.70=0.30,\ P(B)=1-0.85=0.15\)L01
③ 容斥反解交集\(0.30+0.15-0.39=0.060\)L01
131保险赔付L05 · L15
An insurer offers a travelers insurance policy. Losses under the policy are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 5]. The insurer reimburses a policyholder for a loss up to a maximum of 4. Determine the cumulative distribution function, F, of the benefit that the insurer pays a policyholder who experiences exactly one loss under the policy.
(A) \(F(x) = 0\) for \(x < 0\); \(F(x) = 0.20x\) for \(0 \le x < 4\); \(F(x) = 1\) for \(x \ge 4\)(B) \(F(x) = 0\) for \(x < 0\); \(F(x) = 0.20x\) for \(0 \le x < 5\); \(F(x) = 1\) for \(x \ge 5\)(C) \(F(x) = 0\) for \(x < 0\); \(F(x) = 0.25x\) for \(0 \le x < 4\); \(F(x) = 1\) for \(x \ge 4\)(D) \(F(x) = 0\) for \(x < 0\); \(F(x) = 0.25x\) for \(0 \le x < 5\); \(F(x) = 1\) for \(x \ge 5\)(E) \(F(x) = 0\) for \(x < 1\); \(F(x) = 0.25x\) for \(1 \le x < 5\); \(F(x) = 1\) for \(x \ge 5\)
封顶赔付CDF
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 损失均匀且报销封顶4\(Y\sim U[0,5],\ X=\min(Y,4)\)L15
② 封顶前CDF线性\(P(X\le x)=0.2x,\ x<4\)L15
③ x=4处CDF跳到1\(P(X\le 4)=1\)L05
132条件与贝叶斯L03
A company issues auto insurance policies. There are 900 insured individuals. Fifty-four percent of them are male. If a female is randomly selected from the 900, the probability she is over 25 years old is 0.43. There are 395 total insured individuals over 25 years old. A person under 25 years old is randomly selected. Calculate the probability that the person selected is male.
(A) 0.47(B) 0.53(C) 0.54(D) 0.55(E) 0.56
列联表条件
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按性别计数\(0.54(900)=486\ \text{男},\ 414\ \text{女}\)L01
② 补表求各年龄段人数\(\text{女}>25:178;\ \text{总}<25:505;\ \text{女}<25:236\)L01
③ 男性25以下人数\(505-236=269\)L01
④ 条件概率\(269/505=0.533\)L03
133条件与贝叶斯L04
An insurance company insures red and green cars. An actuary compiles the following data: Color of car: Red, Green | Number insured: 300, 700 | Probability an accident occurs: 0.10, 0.05 | Probability that the claim exceeds the deductible, given an accident occurs from this group: 0.90, 0.80 The actuary randomly picks a claim from all claims that exceed the deductible. Calculate the probability that the claim is on a red car.
(A) 0.300(B) 0.462(C) 0.491(D) 0.667(E) 0.692
红绿车贝叶斯
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 乘法法则求各似然\(P(E|R)=0.1(0.9)=0.09,\ P(E|G)=0.04\)L03
② 贝叶斯公式\(P(R|E)=\frac{0.3(0.09)}{0.3(0.09)+0.7(0.04)}\)L04
③ 计算\(\frac{0.027}{0.055}=0.491\)∫ 微积分
134组合计数L02
George and Paul play a betting game. Each chooses an integer from 1 to 20 (inclusive) at random. If the two numbers differ by more than 3, George wins the bet. Otherwise, Paul wins the bet. Calculate the probability that Paul wins the bet.
(A) 0.27(B) 0.32(C) 0.40(D) 0.48(E) 0.66
差≤3格点计数
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 等可能样本空间400对\(|\Omega|=20\times20=400\)L02
② 逐X计数满足|X−Y|≤3\(4+5+6+14(7)+6+5+4=128\)L02
③ 等可能概率\(128/400=0.32\)∫ 微积分
135条件与贝叶斯L04
A student takes an examination consisting of 20 true-false questions. The student knows the answer to \(N\) of the questions, which are answered correctly, and guesses the answers to the rest. The conditional probability that the student knows the answer to a question, given that the student answered it correctly, is 0.824. Calculate \(N\).
(A) 8(B) 10(C) 14(D) 16(E) 18
知答贝叶斯解N
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 设事件列已知条件\(P(C|K)=1,\ P(C|K^c)=0.5,\ P(K|C)=0.824\)L03
② 贝叶斯展开建方程\(0.824=\frac{N/20}{N/20+0.5(20-N)/20}\)L04
③ 解出知道答案的题数\(0.824(0.5N+10)=N\Rightarrow N=14\)∫ 微积分
136线性组合与CLTL21 · L22 · L17
The minimum force required to break a particular type of cable is normally distributed with mean 12,432 and standard deviation 25. A random sample of 400 cables of this type is selected. Calculate the probability that at least 349 of the selected cables will not break under a force of 12,400.
(A) 0.62(B) 0.67(C) 0.92(D) 0.97(E) 1.00
正态率+二项CLT
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单缆不断概率标准化\(P(Z>\frac{12400-12432}{25})=P(Z>-1.28)=0.9\)L21
② 不断根数二项参数\(N\sim B(400,0.9),\ \mu=360,\ \sigma=6\)L17
③ 正态近似加连续修正\(P(N\ge349)=P(Z\ge\frac{348.5-360}{6})=0.97\)L22
137命名分布L19 · L10
The number of policies that an agent sells has a Poisson distribution with modes at 2 and 3. \(K\) is the smallest number such that the probability of selling more than \(K\) policies is less than 25%. Calculate \(K\).
(A) 1(B) 2(C) 3(D) 4(E) 5
双众数定λ分位
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 双众数2和3推整参数\(p(2)=p(3)\Rightarrow\lambda=3\)L10
② 泊松累计验证\(P(N\le4)=0.815\ \text{首超}\ 0.75\)L19
③ 卖超该数概率首次<0.25\(P(N>4)<0.25\Rightarrow\text{答案}4\)L09
138条件与贝叶斯L03
Two fair dice are tossed. One die is red and one die is green. Calculate the probability that the sum of the numbers on the two dice is an odd number given that the number that shows on the red die is larger than the number that shows on the green die.
(A) 1/4(B) 5/12(C) 3/7(D) 1/2(E) 3/5
骰子条件奇和
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 对称性数红大于绿\(\frac{36-6}{2}=15\)L02
② 其中和为奇数计数\(3+2\times2+1\times2=9\)L02
③ 条件概率\(9/15=3/5\)L03
139命名分布L21
Math SAT scores are normally distributed and when reported are rounded to multiples of ten. In 1982 Abby's mother scored at the rounded 93rd percentile on the math SAT exam. In 1982 the mean score was 503 and the variance of the scores was 9604. In 2008 Abby took the math SAT and got the same rounded numerical score as her mother had received 26 years before. In 2008 the mean score was 521 and the variance of the scores was 10,201. Calculate the percentile corresponding to Abby's rounded score.
(A) 89th(B) 90th(C) 91st(D) 92nd(E) 93rd
舍入分位换算
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 93分位z反推原始分\(503+1.47(98)=647.1\Rightarrow 650\)L09
② Abby分数标准化\(z=\frac{650-521}{101}=1.277\)L21
③ 查表定其分位\(\Phi(1.277)\approx0.90\)L09
140线性组合与CLTL21
A certain brand of refrigerator has a useful life that is normally distributed with mean 10 years and standard deviation 3 years. The useful lives of these refrigerators are independent. Calculate the probability that the total useful life of two randomly selected refrigerators will exceed 1.9 times the useful life of a third randomly selected refrigerator.
(A) 0.407(B) 0.444(C) 0.556(D) 0.593(E) 0.604
正态线性组合
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件改写为线性组合\(P(X+Y>1.9Z)=P(W>0),\ W=X+Y-1.9Z\)L21
② 正态组合的均值方差\(\mu=1,\ \sigma^2=9+9+1.9^2(9)=50.49\)L08
③ 标准化插值查表\(P(Z>-0.141)=0.556\)L21
141保险赔付L15 · L05
Losses covered by a flood insurance policy are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 2]. The insurer pays the amount of the loss in excess of a deductible \(d\). The probability that the insurer pays at least 1.20 on a random loss is 0.30. Calculate the probability that the insurer pays at least 1.44 on a random loss.
(A) 0.06(B) 0.16(C) 0.18(D) 0.20(E) 0.28
均匀免赔概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀生存概率建方程\(0.3=P[L\ge1.2+d]=\frac{2-1.2-d}{2}\)L15
② 解免赔额\(d=0.8-0.6=0.2\)∫ 微积分
③ 新阈值下同法求概率\(P[L\ge1.44+0.2]=\frac{2-1.64}{2}=0.18\)L15
142命名分布 📌 L20L20
The lifespan, in years, of a certain computer is exponentially distributed. The probability that its lifespan exceeds four years is 0.30. Let \(f(x)\) represent the density function of the computer's lifespan, in years, for \(x > 0\). Determine which of the following is an expression for \(f(x)\).
(A) \(1-(0.3)^{-x/4}\)(B) \(1-(0.7)^{x/4}\)(C) \(1-(0.3)^{x/4}\)(D) \(-\frac{\ln 0.7}{4}(0.7)^{x/4}\)(E) \(-\frac{\ln 0.3}{4}(0.3)^{x/4}\)
指数密度表达式
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数生存条件解参数\(0.3=e^{-4\lambda}\Rightarrow\lambda=-\frac{\ln 0.3}{4}\)L20
② 写出pdf\(f(x)=\lambda e^{-\lambda x}\)L05
③ 改写为0.3的幂形式\(f(x)=-\frac{\ln 0.3}{4}(0.3)^{x/4}\)∫ 微积分
143数字特征 📌 L10L10
The lifetime of a light bulb has density function, \(f\), where \(f(x)\) is proportional to \(\frac{x^2}{1+x^3}\), \(0 < x < 5\), and 0, otherwise. Calculate the mode of this distribution.
(A) 0.00(B) 0.79(C) 1.26(D) 4.42(E) 5.00
密度求众数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 众数与比例常数无关\( f(x)\propto x^2(1+x^3)^{-1} \)L10
② 密度求导置零\( f'(x)=2cx(1+x^3)^{-1}-3cx^4(1+x^3)^{-2}=0 \)L10
③ 化简解方程\( 2-x^3=0 \Rightarrow x=2^{1/3}\approx 1.26 \)∫ 微积分
144数字特征 📌 L10L10
An insurer's medical reimbursements have density function \(f\), where \(f(x)\) is proportional to \(xe^{-x^2}\), for \(0 < x < 1\), and 0, otherwise. Calculate the mode of the medical reimbursements.
(A) 0.00(B) 0.50(C) 0.71(D) 0.84(E) 1.00
密度求众数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 众数与比例常数无关\( f(x)\propto x e^{-x^2} \)L10
② 密度求导置零\( f'(x)=ce^{-x^2}(1-2x^2)=0 \)L10
③ 解出峰值点\( x=(1/2)^{1/2}\approx 0.71 \)∫ 微积分
145命名分布L18 · L17
A company has five employees on its health insurance plan. Each year, each employee independently has an 80% probability of no hospital admissions. If an employee requires one or more hospital admissions, the number of admissions is modeled by a geometric distribution with a mean of 1.50. The numbers of hospital admissions of different employees are mutually independent. Each hospital admission costs 20,000. Calculate the probability that the company's total hospital costs in a year are less than 50,000.
(A) 0.41(B) 0.46(C) 0.58(D) 0.69(E) 0.78
复合几何枚举
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 由均值定几何参数\( 1/p=1.5 \Rightarrow p=2/3,\ P(1)=2/3,\ P(2)=2/9 \)L18
② 无人入院情形\( 0.8^5=0.32768 \)L17
③ 一人入院1或2次\( \binom{5}{1}(0.2)(0.8)^4\cdot(2/3)=0.27307,\ \cdot(2/9)=0.09102 \)L17
④ 两人各入院1次\( \binom{5}{2}(0.2)^2(0.8)^3(2/3)^2=0.09102 \)L17
⑤ 互斥情形求和\( 0.32768+0.27307+0.09102+0.09102=0.78279 \)L01
146命名分布L18 · L03
On any given day, a certain machine has either no malfunctions or exactly one malfunction. The probability of malfunction on any given day is 0.40. Machine malfunctions on different days are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that the machine has its third malfunction on the fifth day, given that the machine has not had three malfunctions in the first three days.
(A) 0.064(B) 0.138(C) 0.148(D) 0.230(E) 0.246
负二项条件概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 交事件含于则退化\( P(A\cap B)=P(A) \)(第五天第3次故障⊂前三天未满3次)L03
② 分子用负二项\( \binom{4}{2}(0.4)^2(0.6)^2(0.4)=0.13824 \)L18
③ 分母取补事件\( 1-(0.4)^3=0.936 \)L01
④ 条件概率相除\( 0.13824/0.936=0.1477 \)L03
147组合计数L01
In a certain group of cancer patients, each patient's cancer is classified in exactly one of the following five stages: stage 0, stage 1, stage 2, stage 3, or stage 4. i) 75% of the patients in the group have stage 2 or lower. ii) 80% of the patients in the group have stage 1 or higher. iii) 80% of the patients in the group have stage 0, 1, 3, or 4. One patient from the group is randomly selected. Calculate the probability that the selected patient's cancer is stage 1.
(A) 0.20(B) 0.25(C) 0.35(D) 0.48(E) 0.65
分期概率解方程
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 概率归一建方程组\( p_0+p_1+p_2+p_3+p_4=1 \) 加三条给定和L05
② 整体减部分求端点\( p_0=1-0.8=0.2,\ p_2=1-0.8=0.2 \)∫ 微积分
③ 回代求目标\( p_1=0.75-0.2-0.2=0.35 \)∫ 微积分
148命名分布L20
A car is new at the beginning of a calendar year. The time, in years, before the car experiences its first failure is exponentially distributed with mean 2. Calculate the probability that the car experiences its first failure in the last quarter of some calendar year.
(A) 0.081(B) 0.088(C) 0.102(D) 0.205(E) 0.250
指数+几何级数
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按整数区间全概率分解\( \sum_k P(k+0.75L04
② 条件概率化CDF之比\( \dfrac{F(k+1)-F(k+0.75)}{F(k+1)-F(k)} \)L03
③ 代指数CDF与k无关\( \dfrac{e^{-0.375}-e^{-0.5}}{1-e^{-0.5}}=0.205 \)L20
④ 常数提出余和为1\( 0.205\cdot\sum_k P(kL04
149组合计数 📌 L18L02
In a shipment of 20 packages, 7 packages are damaged. The packages are randomly inspected, one at a time, without replacement, until the fourth damaged package is discovered. Calculate the probability that exactly 12 packages are inspected.
(A) 0.079(B) 0.119(C) 0.237(D) 0.243(E) 0.358
负超几何计数
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 链式拆两阶段\( P(\text{前11中3坏})\cdot P(\text{第12坏}\mid \text{前11中3坏}) \)L03
② 前11抽用超几何计数\( \binom{7}{3}\binom{13}{8}/\binom{20}{11}=35(1287)/167960 \)L02
③ 余量比例乘出结果\( \times\ 4/9=0.119 \)L03
150条件与贝叶斯L04 · L15
A theme park conducts a study of families that visit the park during a year. The fraction of such families of size \(m\) is \(\frac{8-m}{28}\), \(m\) = 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7. For a family of size \(m\) that visits the park, the number of members of the family that ride the roller coaster follows a discrete uniform distribution on the set \(\{1, \ldots, m\}\). Calculate the probability that a family visiting the park has exactly six members, given that exactly five members of the family ride the roller coaster.
(A) 0.17(B) 0.21(C) 0.24(D) 0.28(E) 0.31
离散贝叶斯
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 贝叶斯反求家庭规模\( P(M=6\mid N=5)=\dfrac{P(N=5\mid M=6)P(M=6)}{\sum_m P(N=5\mid M=m)P(M=m)} \)L04
② 逐项算似然乘先验仅 \( m=5,6,7 \) 非零:\( \frac{1}{5}\frac{3}{28},\ \frac{1}{6}\frac{2}{28},\ \frac{1}{7}\frac{1}{28} \)L03
③ 归一化取比值\( 35/(63+35+15)=35/113\approx 0.3097 \)L04
151条件与贝叶斯L04
The following information is given about a group of high-risk borrowers. i) Of all these borrowers, 30% defaulted on at least one student loan. ii) Of the borrowers who defaulted on at least one car loan, 40% defaulted on at least one student loan. iii) Of the borrowers who did not default on any student loans, 28% defaulted on at least one car loan. A statistician randomly selects a borrower from this group and observes that the selected borrower defaulted on at least one student loan. Calculate the probability that the selected borrower defaulted on at least one car loan.
(A) 0.33(B) 0.40(C) 0.44(D) 0.65(E) 0.72
违约贝叶斯
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 锁定目标条件概率\( P(C\mid S)=P(C\cap S)/P(S) \)L03
② 由补条件求交概率\( P(C\cap S^c)=0.28(1-0.3)=0.196 \)L03
③ 按S分割P(C)建方程\( P(C\cap S)/0.4=P(C\cap S)+0.196 \Rightarrow P(C\cap S)=0.13067 \)L04
④ 代回求条件概率\( 0.13067/0.3=0.4356 \)L03
152保险赔付L08 · L15
An insurance company issues policies covering damage to automobiles. The amount of damage is modeled by a uniform distribution on [0, \(b\)]. The policy payout is subject to a deductible of \(b/10\). A policyholder experiences automobile damage. Calculate the ratio of the standard deviation of the policy payout to the standard deviation of the amount of the damage.
(A) 0.8100(B) 0.9000(C) 0.9477(D) 0.9487(E) 0.9735
免赔标差比
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀分布基准标准差\( b/\sqrt{12}=0.28868b \)L15
② 积分求赔付期望\( E(Y)=\int_{0.1b}^{b}(y-0.1b)\frac{1}{b}dy=0.405b \)L07
③ 积分求二阶矩\( E(Y^2)=\int_{0.1b}^{b}(y-0.1b)^2\frac{1}{b}dy=0.243b^2 \)L08
④ 方差得新标准差\( Var(Y)=0.243b^2-(0.405b)^2 \Rightarrow SD=0.28102b \)L08
⑤ 求两标准差之比\( 0.28102/0.28868=0.97347 \)∫ 微积分
153组合计数L01
A policyholder purchases automobile insurance for two years. Define the following events: F = the policyholder has exactly one accident in year one. G = the policyholder has one or more accidents in year two. Define the following events: i) The policyholder has exactly one accident in year one and has more than one accident in year two. ii) The policyholder has at least two accidents during the two-year period. iii) The policyholder has exactly one accident in year one and has at least one accident in year two. iv) The policyholder has exactly one accident in year one and has a total of two or more accidents in the two-year period. v) The policyholder has exactly one accident in year one and has more accidents in year two than in year one. Determine the number of events from the above list of five that are the same as \(F \cap G\).
(A) None(B) Exactly one(C) Exactly two(D) Exactly three(E) All
事件集合等价
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件译成集合语言F=第一年恰1次;G=两年合计≥2 ⇔ 第二年≥1(在F下)L01
② 逐条排除假命题i 忽略G含第二年1次;ii 第一年可为0;v 强加第二年≥2L01
③ 验证iii与iv为真「一次以上」=「至少一次」,F∧G 即所述交事件L01
154条件与贝叶斯 📌 L04L03
An insurance company categorizes its policyholders into three mutually exclusive groups: high-risk, medium-risk, and low-risk. An internal study of the company showed that 45% of the policyholders are low-risk and 35% are medium-risk. The probability of death over the next year, given that a policyholder is high-risk is two times the probability of death of a medium-risk policyholder. The probability of death over the next year, given that a policyholder is medium-risk is three times the probability of death of a low-risk policyholder. The probability of death of a randomly selected policyholder, over the next year, is 0.009. Calculate the probability of death of a policyholder over the next year, given that the policyholder is high-risk.
(A) 0.0025(B) 0.0200(C) 0.1215(D) 0.2000(E) 0.3750
全概率解死亡率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按吸烟层全概率展开\( P[D]=P[H]P[D\mid H]+P[M]P[D\mid M]+P[L]P[D\mid L] \)L04
② 倍数关系统一未知量\( P[D\mid M]=\tfrac{1}{2}P[D\mid H],\ P[D\mid L]=\tfrac{1}{6}P[D\mid H] \)L03
③ 解一元方程\( 0.009=0.45P[D\mid H] \Rightarrow P[D\mid H]=0.02 \)∫ 微积分
155保险赔付L07
A policy covers a gas furnace for one year. During that year, only one of three problems can occur: i) The igniter switch may need to be replaced at a cost of 60. There is a 0.10 probability of this. ii) The pilot light may need to be replaced at a cost of 200. There is a 0.05 probability of this. iii) The furnace may need to be replaced at a cost of 3000. There is a 0.01 probability of this. Calculate the deductible that would produce an expected claim payment of 30.
(A) 100(B) At least 100 but less than 150(C) At least 150 but less than 200(D) At least 200 but less than 250(E) At least 250
期望反解免赔额
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 假设区间列期望方程设 \( d<60 \):\( 0.10(60-d)+0.05(200-d)+0.01(3000-d)=30 \)L07
② 解出矛盾弃此区间\( d=100\notin(0,60) \),假设不成立∫ 微积分
③ 换区间重列重解\( 60L07
156组合计数L02
On a block of ten houses, \(k\) are not insured. A tornado randomly damages three houses on the block. The probability that none of the damaged houses are insured is 1/120. Calculate the probability that at most one of the damaged houses is insured.
(A) 1/5(B) 7/40(C) 11/60(D) 49/60(E) 119/120
至多一户投保
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 无一投保用超几何\( \dfrac{1}{120}=\dfrac{\binom{k}{3}}{\binom{10}{3}}=\dfrac{k(k-1)(k-2)}{720} \)L02
② 整数因子解k\( k(k-1)(k-2)=6=3\cdot2\cdot1 \Rightarrow k=3 \)∫ 微积分
③ 至多一间为0加1\( \dfrac{1}{120}+\dfrac{\binom{7}{1}\binom{3}{2}}{120}=\dfrac{22}{120}=\dfrac{11}{60} \)L02
157组合计数L02
In a casino game, a gambler selects four different numbers from the first twelve positive integers. The casino then randomly draws nine numbers without replacement from the first twelve positive integers. The gambler wins the jackpot if the casino draws all four of the gambler's selected numbers. Calculate the probability that the gambler wins the jackpot.
(A) 0.002(B) 0.255(C) 0.296(D) 0.573(E) 0.625
中奖超几何
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 改述为等价抽样问题⇔ 从4红8蓝中随机抽9枚含全部4红L02
② 超几何概率\( \dfrac{\binom{4}{4}\binom{8}{5}}{\binom{12}{9}} \)L02
③ 代入计算\( \dfrac{1\cdot 56}{220}=0.2545 \)∫ 微积分
158命名分布L19
The number of days an employee is sick each month is modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 1. The numbers of sick days in different months are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that an employee is sick more than two days in a three-month period.
(A) 0.199(B) 0.224(C) 0.423(D) 0.577(E) 0.801
三月泊松>2
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立泊松和仍泊松\( N\sim\text{Poisson}(1\times 3=3) \)L19
② 算三个月≤2天概率\( P[N\le 2]=e^{-3}(1+3+4.5)=0.423 \)L19
③ 取补得所求\( 1-0.423=0.577 \)L01
159命名分布L19
The number of traffic accidents per week at intersection Q has a Poisson distribution with mean 3. The number of traffic accidents per week at intersection R has a Poisson distribution with mean 1.5. Let \(A\) be the probability that the number of accidents at intersection Q exceeds its mean. Let \(B\) be the corresponding probability for intersection R. Calculate \(B - A\).
(A) 0.00(B) 0.09(C) 0.13(D) 0.19(E) 0.31
两泊松超均值
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① A店泊松尾概率\( A=P(N>3)=1-e^{-3}(1+3+\tfrac{9}{2}+\tfrac{27}{6})=0.3528 \)L19
② B店泊松尾概率\( B=P(N>1.5)=1-e^{-1.5}(1+1.5)=0.4422 \)L19
③ 作差\( B-A=0.4422-0.3528=0.0894 \)∫ 微积分
160命名分布L20
Losses due to accidents at an amusement park are exponentially distributed. An insurance company offers the park owner two different policies, with different premiums, to insure against losses due to accidents at the park. Policy A has a deductible of 1.44. For a random loss, the probability is 0.640 that under this policy, the insurer will pay some money to the park owner. Policy B has a deductible of \(d\). For a random loss, the probability is 0.512 that under this policy, the insurer will pay some money to the park owner. Calculate \(d\).
(A) 0.960(B) 1.152(C) 1.728(D) 1.800(E) 2.160
指数免赔解d
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数生存函数解均值\( 0.64=e^{-1.44/\mu} \Rightarrow \mu=3.2266 \)L20
② 同均值列B保单方程\( 0.512=P(L>d)=e^{-d/3.2266} \)L20
③ 取对数解d\( d=-3.2266\ln(0.512)=2.1599 \)∫ 微积分
161单变量基础 📌 L05L05
The distribution of the size of claims paid under an insurance policy has probability density function \(f(x) = \begin{cases} cx^a, & 0 < x < 5 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases}\) Where \(a > 0\) and \(c > 0\). For a randomly selected claim, the probability that the size of the claim is less than 3.75 is 0.4871. Calculate the probability that the size of a randomly selected claim is greater than 4.
(A) 0.404(B) 0.428(C) 0.500(D) 0.572(E) 0.596
幂密度解a
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 密度归一定常数\( 1=\int_0^5 cx^a dx \Rightarrow c=\dfrac{a+1}{5^{a+1}} \)L05
② 给定概率解参数a\( 0.4871=(3.75/5)^{a+1} \Rightarrow a=1.5 \)∫ 微积分
③ 积分求尾概率\( P(X>4)=1-(4/5)^{2.5}=0.42757 \)L05
162保险赔付L07 · L19
Company XYZ provides a warranty on a product that it produces. Each year, the number of warranty claims follows a Poisson distribution with mean \(c\). The probability that no warranty claims are received in any given year is 0.60. Company XYZ purchases an insurance policy that will reduce its overall warranty claim payment costs. The insurance policy will pay nothing for the first warranty claim received and 5000 for each claim thereafter until the end of the year. Calculate the expected amount of annual insurance policy payments to Company XYZ.
(A) 554(B) 872(C) 1022(D) 1354(E) 1612
免首赔泊松
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 由零概率定泊松参数\( 0.6=P(N=0)=e^{-c} \Rightarrow c=0.5108 \)L19
② 赔付改写成期望差\( 5000\sum_{n\ge 2}(n-1)P(N=n)=5000[E(N)-(1-P(N=0))] \)L07
③ 代入求值\( 5000(0.5108)-5000(0.4)=554 \)∫ 微积分
163保险赔付L07 · L15
For a certain health insurance policy, losses are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, \(b\)]. The policy has a deductible of 180 and the expected value of the unreimbursed portion of a loss is 144. Calculate \(b\).
(A) 236(B) 288(C) 388(D) 450(E) 468
未赔期望解b
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 定义封顶损失变量\( X=\min(L,180) \)L07
② 均匀分布下列期望\( 144=\int_0^{180} l\frac{1}{b}dl+180\cdot\dfrac{b-180}{b} \)L15
③ 化简解b\( 144b=\tfrac{180^2}{2}+180b-180^2 \Rightarrow 36b=16200,\ b=450 \)∫ 微积分
164命名分布 📌 L21L21 · L09
The working lifetime, in years, of a particular model of bread maker is normally distributed with mean 10 and variance 4. Calculate the 12th percentile of the working lifetime, in years.
(A) 5.30(B) 7.65(C) 8.41(D) 12.35(E) 14.70
正态12分位
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分位数标准化\( 0.12=P(X\le p)=P\big(Z\le \tfrac{p-10}{2}\big) \)L21
② 查表取z值\( P(Z\le -1.175)=0.12 \)L09
③ 反解分位数\( \tfrac{p-10}{2}=-1.175 \Rightarrow p=7.65 \)∫ 微积分
165命名分布L21 · L09
The profits of life insurance companies A and B are normally distributed with the same mean. The variance of company B's profit is 2.25 times the variance of company A's profit. The 14th percentile of company A's profit is the same as the \(p\)th percentile of company B's profit. Calculate \(p\).
(A) 5.3(B) 9.3(C) 21.0(D) 23.6(E) 31.6
正态分位缩放
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 14分位反查z\( z=-1.08 \)L09
② 标准差比换算z\( \sqrt{2.25}=1.5,\ 1.08/1.5=0.72 \)L21
③ 新z正查百分位\( \Phi(-0.72)=23.6\% \)L09
166命名分布L20 · L08
The distribution of values of the retirement package offered by a company to new employees is modeled by the probability density function \(f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{5} e^{-\frac{1}{5}(x-5)}, & x > 5 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}\) Calculate the variance of the retirement package value for a new employee, given that the value is at least 10.
(A) 15(B) 20(C) 25(D) 30(E) 35
平移指数条件方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件方差按定义\( Var(X\mid X\ge 10)=E(X^2\mid\cdot)-E(X\mid\cdot)^2 \)L14
② 条件密度即平移指数\( f(y)=0.2e^{-0.2(y-10)},\ y>10 \)(无记忆性)L20
③ 平移不改方差\( Var=(1/0.2)^2=25 \)L08
167命名分布L21
Insurance companies A and B each earn an annual profit that is normally distributed with the same positive mean. The standard deviation of company A's annual profit is one half of its mean. In a given year, the probability that company B has a loss (negative profit) is 0.9 times the probability that company A has a loss. Calculate the ratio of the standard deviation of company B's annual profit to the standard deviation of company A's annual profit.
(A) 0.49(B) 0.90(C) 0.98(D) 1.11(E) 1.71
正态亏损概率比σ
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① A公司亏损标准化\( P(X<0)=P\big(Z<\tfrac{0-m}{0.5m}\big)=P(Z<-2)=0.0228 \)L21
② B亏损为0.9倍\( 0.02052=P(Y<0)=P(Z<-m/s) \)∫ 微积分
③ 查表反解s\( -m/s=-2.04 \Rightarrow s=m/2.04 \)L09
④ 求标准差之比\( (m/2.04)/(0.5m)=0.98 \)∫ 微积分
168线性组合与CLTL22 · L21
Claim amounts at an insurance company are independent of one another. In year one, claim amounts are modeled by a normal random variable \(X\) with mean 100 and standard deviation 25. In year two, claim amounts are modeled by the random variable \(Y = 1.04X + 5\). Calculate the probability that a random sample of 25 claim amounts in year two average between 100 and 110.
(A) 0.48(B) 0.53(C) 0.54(D) 0.67(E) 0.68
正态样本均值概率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 线性变换后正态参数\( \mu=1.04(100)+5=109,\ \sigma=1.04(25)=26 \)L21
② 样本均值缩标准差\( \sigma_{\bar X}=26/\sqrt{25}=5.2 \)L22
③ 标准化夹逼求概率\( P(-1.73L21
169离散联合 📌 L12L11 · L12
An insurance company will cover losses incurred from tornadoes in a single calendar year. However, the insurer will only cover losses for a maximum of three separate tornadoes during this timeframe. Let \(X\) be the number of tornadoes that result in at least 50 million in losses, and let \(Y\) be the total number of tornadoes. The joint probability function for \(X\) and \(Y\) is \(p(x, y) = \begin{cases} c(x+2y), & \text{for } x = 0,1,2,3, \ y = 0,1,2,3, \ x \le y \\ 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases}\) where \(c\) is a constant. Calculate the expected number of tornadoes that result in fewer than 50 million in losses.
(A) 0.19(B) 0.28(C) 0.76(D) 1.00(E) 1.10
c(x+2y)求E[Y-X]
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 联合概率归一定c权重和 \( =50 \Rightarrow c=1/50 \)L11
② 目标量为差值函数低损龙卷风数 \( =Y-X \)L11
③ LOTUS逐点加权\( E(Y-X)=\tfrac{1}{50}[1(2)+2(4)+3(6)+1(5)+2(7)+1(8)]=55/50=1.1 \)L12
170数字特征L07 · L02
At a polling booth, ballots are cast by ten voters, of whom three are Republicans, two are Democrats, and five are Independents. A local journalist interviews two of these voters, chosen randomly. Calculate the expectation of the absolute value of the difference between the number of Republicans interviewed and the number of Democrats interviewed.
(A) 1/5(B) 7/15(C) 3/5(D) 11/15(E) 1
抽样E|R-D|
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按首位受访者分三案独立0.5 / 共和0.3 / 民主0.2L16
② 各案算条件期望\( 5/9,\ 1,\ 7/9 \)L14
③ 全期望加权\( 0.5(\tfrac{5}{9})+0.3(1)+0.2(\tfrac{7}{9})=\tfrac{11}{15} \)L16
171离散联合L11 · L08
The random variables \(X\) and \(Y\) have joint probability function \(p(x,y)\) for \(x = 0,1\) and \(y = 0,1,2\). Suppose \(3p(1,1) = p(1,2)\), and \(p(1,1)\) maximizes the variance of \(XY\). Calculate the probability that \(X\) or \(Y\) is 0.
(A) 11/25(B) 23/50(C) 23/49(D) 26/49(E) 14/25
约束下最大方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 设乘积分布用约束\( Z=XY:\ b=p(1,1),\ c=3b,\ a=1-4b \)L11
② 方差写成b的函数\( E(Z)=7b,\ E(Z^2)=13b \Rightarrow Var(Z)=13b-49b^2 \)L08
③ 求导取最大\( 13-98b=0 \Rightarrow b=13/98 \)∫ 微积分
④ 所求即P(Z=0)\( a=1-4b=46/98=23/49 \)L11
172条件与贝叶斯L04 · L17
The number of severe storms that strike city J in a year follows a binomial distribution with \(n = 5\) and \(p = 0.6\). Given that \(m\) severe storms strike city J in a year, the number of severe storms that strike city K in the same year is \(m\) with probability 1/2, \(m+1\) with probability 1/3, and \(m+2\) with probability 1/6. Calculate the expected number of severe storms that strike city J in a year during which 5 severe storms strike city K.
(A) 3.5(B) 3.7(C) 3.9(D) 4.0(E) 5.7
贝叶斯反推期望
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二项先验逐点概率\( P(J=3)=\binom{5}{3}0.6^3 0.4^2=0.3456 \) 等L17
② 全概率求分母\( P(K=5)=\tfrac{1}{6}(0.3456)+\tfrac{1}{3}(0.2592)+\tfrac{1}{2}(0.07776)=0.18288 \)L04
③ 贝叶斯求后验\( P(J=j\mid K=5)=0.31496,\ 0.47244,\ 0.21260 \)L04
④ 后验期望\( E(J\mid K=5)=3(0.315)+4(0.472)+5(0.213)=3.89764 \)L14
173离散联合 📌 L14L14 · L11
Let \(N\) denote the number of accidents occurring during one month on the northbound side of a highway and let \(S\) denote the number occurring on the southbound side. Suppose that \(N\) and \(S\) are jointly distributed as indicated in the table. \(N \backslash S\), 0, 1, 2, 3 or more | 0, 0.04, 0.06, 0.10, 0.04 | 1, 0.10, 0.18, 0.08, 0.03 | 2, 0.12, 0.06, 0.05, 0.02 | 3 or more, 0.05, 0.04, 0.02, 0.01 Calculate Var\((N \mid N + S = 2)\).
(A) 0.48(B) 0.55(C) 0.67(D) 0.91(E) 1.25
Var(N|N+S=2)
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 给定和的条件分布\( P(N=0,1,2\mid N+S=2)=\tfrac{0.10}{0.40},\tfrac{0.18}{0.40},\tfrac{0.12}{0.40} \)L06
② 条件均值\( 0.25(0)+0.45(1)+0.30(2)=1.05 \)L14
③ 条件二阶矩减平方\( 1.65-1.05^2=0.5475 \)L14
174数字特征 📌 L16L08 · L03
An insurance company has an equal number of claims in each of three territories. In each territory, only three claim amounts are possible: 100, 500, and 1000. Based on the company's data, the probabilities of each claim amount are: Claim Amount: 100, 500, 1000 | Territory 1: 0.90, 0.08, 0.02 | Territory 2: 0.80, 0.11, 0.09 | Territory 3: 0.70, 0.20, 0.10 Calculate the standard deviation of a randomly selected claim amount.
(A) 254(B) 291(C) 332(D) 368(E) 396
混合分布标准差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀混合平均概率\( P(100)=0.80,\ P(500)=0.13,\ P(1000)=0.07 \)L04
② 求均值与二阶矩\( E(X)=215,\ E(X^2)=110500 \)L08
③ 方差开根\( \sqrt{110500-215^2}=\sqrt{64275}=253.53 \)L08
175线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
At the start of a week, a coal mine has a high-capacity storage bin that is half full. During the week, 20 loads of coal are added to the storage bin. Each load of coal has a volume that is normally distributed with mean 1.50 cubic yards and standard deviation 0.25 cubic yards. During the same week, coal is removed from the storage bin and loaded into 4 railroad cars. The amount of coal loaded into each railroad car is normally distributed with mean 7.25 cubic yards and standard deviation 0.50 cubic yards. The amounts added to the storage bin or removed from the storage bin are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that the storage bin contains more coal at the end of the week than it had at the beginning of the week.
(A) 0.56(B) 0.63(C) 0.67(D) 0.75(E) 0.98
正态加减组合>0
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二十车皮总量参数\( \mu=20(1.5)=30,\ \sigma^2=20(0.0625)=1.25 \)L22
② 卡车运走总量参数\( \mu=4(7.25)=29,\ \sigma^2=4(0.25)=1 \)L21
③ 独立正态差的分布\( D\sim N(1,\ 1.25+1=1.5^2) \)L21
④ 标准化求概率\( P(D>0)=P(Z>-0.67)=0.7486 \)L21
176数字特征L10 · L11
An insurance company insures a good driver and a bad driver on the same policy. The table below gives the probability of a given number of claims occurring for each of these drivers in the next ten years. Number of claims, Probability for the good driver, Probability for the bad driver | 0, 0.5, 0.2 | 1, 0.3, 0.3 | 2, 0.2, 0.4 | 3, 0.0, 0.1 The number of claims occurring for the two drivers are independent. Calculate the mode of the distribution of the total number of claims occurring on this policy in the next ten years.
(A) 0(B) 1(C) 2(D) 3(E) 4
独立和的众数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 卷积逐点算总索赔\( P(0)=0.10,\ P(1)=0.21,\ P(2)=0.33,\ P(3)=0.23 \)L11
② 剩余概率上界判断余 \( 0.13<0.33 \),后续无法超过∫ 微积分
③ 取概率最大点众数 \( =2 \)L10
177线性组合与CLT 📌 L13L08 · L17
In a group of 15 health insurance policyholders diagnosed with cancer, each policyholder has probability 0.90 of receiving radiation and probability 0.40 of receiving chemotherapy. Radiation and chemotherapy treatments are independent events for each policyholder, and the treatments of different policyholders are mutually independent. The policyholders in this group all have the same health insurance that pays 2 for radiation treatment and 3 for chemotherapy treatment. Calculate the variance of the total amount the insurance company pays for the radiation and chemotherapy treatments for these 15 policyholders.
(A) 13.5(B) 37.8(C) 108.0(D) 202.5(E) 567.0
二项组合方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两组人数各为二项\( X\sim B(15,0.9),\ Y\sim B(15,0.4) \)L17
② 二项方差公式\( 15(0.9)(0.1)=1.35,\ 15(0.4)(0.6)=3.6 \)L17
③ 独立线性组合方差\( Var(2X+3Y)=4(1.35)+9(3.6)=37.8 \)L08
178离散联合L14 · L17
In a large population of patients, 20% have early stage cancer, 10% have advanced stage cancer, and the other 70% do not have cancer. Six patients from this population are randomly selected. Calculate the expected number of selected patients with advanced stage cancer, given that at least one of the selected patients has early stage cancer.
(A) 0.403(B) 0.500(C) 0.547(D) 0.600(E) 0.625
多项条件期望
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按X是否为零拆期望\( E(Y)=P[X=0]E(Y\mid X=0)+P[X\ge 1]E(Y\mid X\ge 1) \)L16
② 二项期望与零概率\( E(Y)=6(0.1)=0.6,\ P[X=0]=(0.8)^6 \)L17
③ 无早期时条件概率\( \dfrac{0.1}{1-0.2}=\dfrac{1}{8} \Rightarrow E(Y\mid X=0)=6/8=0.75 \)L03
④ 反解目标条件期望\( E(Y\mid X\ge 1)=\dfrac{0.6-(0.8)^6(0.75)}{1-(0.8)^6}=0.547 \)L16
179次序统计量L23 · L02
Four distinct integers are chosen randomly and without replacement from the first twelve positive integers. Let \(X\) be the random variable representing the second largest of the four selected integers, and let \(p\) be the probability function for \(X\). Determine \(p(x)\), for integer values of \(x\), where \(p(x) > 0\).
(A) \(\frac{(x-1)(x-2)(12-x)}{990}\)(B) \(\frac{(x-1)(x-2)(12-x)}{495}\)(C) \(\frac{(x-1)(12-x)(11-x)}{495}\)(D) \(\frac{(x-1)(12-x)(11-x)}{990}\)(E) \(\frac{(10-x)(12-x)(11-x)}{990}\)
离散第二大pmf
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 第三小需两小一大\( X=x \) 要求 \( x\in\{3,\dots,11\} \)L23
② 分段计数选法小侧 \( \binom{x-1}{2} \),大侧 \( 12-x \) 种L02
③ 除总选法得pmf\( \dfrac{\binom{x-1}{2}(12-x)}{\binom{12}{4}}=\dfrac{(x-1)(x-2)(12-x)}{990} \)L02
180保险赔付L21 · L06
An insurance policy covers losses incurred by a policyholder, subject to a deductible of 10,000. Incurred losses follow a normal distribution with mean 12,000 and standard deviation \(c\). The probability that a loss is less than \(k\) is 0.9582, where \(k\) is a constant. Given that the loss exceeds the deductible, there is a probability of 0.9500 that it is less than \(k\). Calculate \(c\).
(A) 2045(B) 2267(C) 2393(D) 2505(E) 2840
正态免赔额条件
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件分位式展开\( 0.95=\dfrac{P(XL03
② 解出截断点CDF\( P(X\le 10000)=\dfrac{0.9582-0.95}{1-0.95}=0.164 \)∫ 微积分
③ 标准化插值查z\( 0.164=\Phi\big(\tfrac{10000-12000}{c}\big),\ z=-0.978 \)L21
④ 反解标准差\( -0.978=-2000/c \Rightarrow c=2045 \)∫ 微积分
181保险赔付L15 · L09
Losses covered by an insurance policy are modeled by a uniform distribution on the interval [0, 1000]. An insurance company reimburses losses in excess of a deductible of 250. Calculate the difference between the median and the 20th percentile of the insurance company reimbursement, over all losses.
(A) 225(B) 250(C) 300(D) 375(E) 500
赔付中位-分位差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 原损失两个分位数中位数 \( =500 \),20分位 \( =200 \)L09
② 免赔变换分位数\( 500-250=250;\ \max(0,200-250)=0 \)L09
③ 作差\( 250-0=250 \)∫ 微积分
182组合计数 📌 L01L01
An insurance agent's files reveal the following facts about his policyholders: i) 243 own auto insurance. ii) 207 own homeowner insurance. iii) 55 own life insurance and homeowner insurance. iv) 96 own auto insurance and homeowner insurance. v) 32 own life insurance, auto insurance and homeowner insurance. vi) 76 more clients own only auto insurance than only life insurance. vii) 270 own only one of these three insurance products. Calculate the total number of the agent's policyholders who own at least one of these three insurance products.
(A) 389(B) 407(C) 423(D) 448(E) 483
三集合容斥
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 由三重区逐层去重L/H非A \( =55-32=23 \),A/H非L \( =96-32=64 \),仅H \( =88 \)L01
② 设未知列方程仅L \( =X \),仅A \( =X+76 \):\( 88+X+(X+76)=270 \Rightarrow X=53 \)∫ 微积分
③ 补齐区域求总数L/A非H \( =243-225=18 \),合计 \( 53+129+88+18+64+23+32=407 \)L01
183组合计数L01
A profile of the investments owned by an agent's clients follows: i) 228 own annuities. ii) 220 own mutual funds. iii) 98 own life insurance and mutual funds. iv) 93 own annuities and mutual funds. v) 16 own annuities, mutual funds, and life insurance. vi) 45 more clients own only life insurance than own only annuities. vii) 290 own only one type of investment (i.e., annuity, mutual fund, or life insurance). Calculate the agent's total number of clients who own at least one of these three insurance products.
(A) 455(B) 495(C) 496(D) 500(E) 516
三集合容斥
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 文氏图设未知区域仅年金 \( =x \),年金∩寿险 \( =y \),仅寿险 \( =x+45 \)L01
② 按圈总数列方程\( 290=45+45+x+x \Rightarrow x=100;\ 228=100+y+16+77 \Rightarrow y=35 \)∫ 微积分
③ 各区求和\( 145+82+16+35+100+77+45=500 \)L01
184组合计数L01
An actuary compiles the following information from a portfolio of 1000 homeowners insurance policies: i) 130 policies insure three-bedroom homes. ii) 280 policies insure one-story homes. iii) 150 policies insure two-bath homes. iv) 30 policies insure three-bedroom, two-bath homes. v) 50 policies insure one-story, two-bath homes. vi) 40 policies insure three-bedroom, one-story homes. vii) 10 policies insure three-bedroom, one-story, two-bath homes. Calculate the number of homeowners policies in the portfolio that insure neither one-story nor two-bath nor three-bedroom homes.
(A) 310(B) 450(C) 530(D) 550(E) 570
三集合求补集
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 三集合容斥公式\( n(A\cup B\cup C)=\sum n(\cdot)-\sum n(\cdot\cap\cdot)+n(A\cap B\cap C) \)L01
② 代入数值\( 130+280+150-40-30-50+10=450 \)∫ 微积分
③ 总体取补\( 1000-450=550 \)L01
185组合计数 📌 L02L02
Each week, a subcommittee of four individuals is formed from among the members of a committee comprising seven individuals. Two of the four subcommittee members are then assigned to lead the subcommittee, one as chair and the other as secretary. Calculate the maximum number of consecutive weeks that can elapse without having the subcommittee contain four individuals who have previously served together with the same subcommittee chair.
(A) 70(B) 140(C) 210(D) 420(E) 840
委员会计数
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 选4人的组合数\( \binom{7}{4}=35 \)L02
② 组内指定主席乘法\( 35\times 4=140 \)(秘书不影响组成)L02
③ 不重复上限即总数最多 \( 140 \) 次L02
186条件与贝叶斯 📌 L04L04 · L02
Bowl I contains eight red balls and six blue balls. Bowl II is empty. Four balls are selected at random, without replacement, and transferred from bowl I to bowl II. One ball is then selected at random from bowl II. Calculate the conditional probability that two red balls and two blue balls were transferred from bowl I to bowl II, given that the ball selected from bowl II is blue.
(A) 0.21(B) 0.24(C) 0.43(D) 0.49(E) 0.57
两碗转移贝叶斯
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 目标为条件概率\( P(2红2蓝\mid 蓝)=\dfrac{P(2红2蓝\cap 蓝)}{P(蓝)} \)L04
② 分子超几何乘抽蓝\( \dfrac{\binom{8}{2}\binom{6}{2}}{\binom{14}{4}}\cdot\dfrac{2}{4}=\dfrac{840}{4004} \)L02
③ 分母全概率求和\( P(蓝)=\dfrac{60+480+840+336}{4004}=\dfrac{1716}{4004} \)L04
④ 相除\( 840/1716=0.49 \)∫ 微积分
187命名分布L17
An actuary has done an analysis of all policies that cover two cars. 70% of the policies are of type A for both cars, and 30% of the policies are of type B for both cars. The number of claims on different cars across all policies are mutually independent. The distributions of the number of claims on a car are given in the following table. Number of Claims, Type A, Type B | 0, 40%, 25% | 1, 30%, 25% | 2, 20%, 25% | 3, 10%, 25% Four policies are selected at random. Calculate the probability that exactly one of the four policies has the same number of claims on both covered cars.
(A) 0.104(B) 0.250(C) 0.285(D) 0.417(E) 0.739
配对概率+二项
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 各型两次索赔相等A: \( 0.4^2+0.3^2+0.2^2+0.1^2=0.30 \);B: \( 4(0.25)^2=0.25 \)L11
② 全概率混合\( 0.70(0.30)+0.30(0.25)=0.285 \)L04
③ 4张保单恰1张相等\( 4(0.285)(1-0.285)^3=0.417 \)L17
188组合计数L01 · L03
A company sells two types of life insurance policies (P and Q) and one type of health insurance policy. A survey of potential customers revealed the following: i) No survey participant wanted to purchase both life policies. ii) Twice as many survey participants wanted to purchase life policy P as life policy Q. iii) 45% of survey participants wanted to purchase the health policy. iv) 18% of survey participants wanted to purchase only the health policy. v) The event that a survey participant wanted to purchase the health policy was independent of the event that a survey participant wanted to purchase a life policy. Calculate the probability that a randomly selected survey participant wanted to purchase exactly one policy.
(A) 0.51(B) 0.60(C) 0.69(D) 0.73(E) 0.78
独立+恰买一份
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 文氏图设区域变量A、B不交(条件i),中区 \( =0.18 \)(条件iv)L01
② 条件译成方程\( a+b=2(c+d);\ b+c+0.18=0.45 \Rightarrow b+c=0.27 \)L01
③ 独立性给第三方程\( b+c=(a+b+c+d)(0.45) \Rightarrow 0.27=(a+d+0.27)(0.45) \)L03
④ 解出并组装答案\( a+d=0.33 \Rightarrow P(\text{恰一寿险})=0.33+0.18=0.51 \)∫ 微积分
189命名分布L17 · L02
A state is starting a lottery game. To enter this lottery, a player uses a machine that randomly selects six distinct numbers from among the first 30 positive integers. The lottery randomly selects six distinct numbers from the same 30 positive integers. A winning entry must match the same set of six numbers that the lottery selected. The entry fee is 1, each winning entry receives a prize amount of 500,000, and all other entries receive no prize. Calculate the probability that the state will lose money, given that 800,000 entries are purchased.
(A) 0.33(B) 0.39(C) 0.61(D) 0.67(E) 0.74
中奖数二项
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单票中奖超几何\( \dfrac{\binom{6}{6}\binom{24}{0}}{\binom{30}{6}}=\dfrac{1}{593775} \)L02
② 中奖人数为二项\( W\sim B(800000,\ 1/593775) \)L17
③ 至少2人取双补\( 1-P(0)-P(1)=1-0.2599-0.3502=0.39 \)L17
190命名分布L17 · L19
A life insurance company has found there is a 3% probability that a randomly selected application contains an error. Assume applications are mutually independent in this respect. An auditor randomly selects 100 applications. Calculate the probability that 95% or less of the selected applications are error-free.
(A) 0.08(B) 0.10(C) 0.13(D) 0.15(E) 0.18
二项泊松近似
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 出错数设为二项\( X\sim B(100,0.03) \)L17
② 事件等价转化无错 \( \le 95 \Leftrightarrow X\ge 5 \)L01
③ 二项尾部求和\( 1-\sum_{k=0}^{4}\binom{100}{k}(0.03)^k(0.97)^{100-k}=0.1821 \)L17
④ 或泊松近似\( \lambda=3:\ 1-e^{-3}(1+3+\tfrac{9}{2}+\tfrac{27}{6}+\tfrac{81}{24})=0.1847 \)L19
191组合计数 📌 L03L01 · L03
Let A, B, and C be events such that \(P[A] = 0.2\), \(P[B] = 0.1\), and \(P[C] = 0.3\). The events A and B are independent, the events B and C are independent, and the events A and C are mutually exclusive. Calculate \(P[A \cup B \cup C]\).
(A) 0.496(B) 0.540(C) 0.544(D) 0.550(E) 0.600
并事件独立互斥
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 三事件容斥公式\( P[A\cup B\cup C]=\sum P-\sum P(\cap)+P[A\cap B\cap C] \)L01
② 独立性化交为积\( P[A\cap B]=0.2(0.1),\ P[B\cap C]=0.1(0.3) \),其余为0L03
③ 代入计算\( 0.2+0.1+0.3-0.02-0-0.03+0=0.55 \)∫ 微积分
192组合计数L01
The annual numbers of thefts a homeowners insurance policyholder experiences are analyzed over three years. Define the following events: i) A = the event that the policyholder experiences no thefts in the three years. ii) B = the event that the policyholder experiences at least one theft in the second year. iii) C = the event that the policyholder experiences exactly one theft in the first year. iv) D = the event that the policyholder experiences no thefts in the third year. v) E = the event that the policyholder experiences no thefts in the second year, and at least one theft in the third year. Determine which three events satisfy the condition that the probability of their union equals the sum of their probabilities.
(A) Events A, B, and E(B) Events A, C, and E(C) Events A, D, and E(D) Events B, C, and D(E) Events B, C, and E
辨互斥三事件
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 和式成立当且仅当互斥\( P(\cup)=\sum P \Leftrightarrow \) 两两不相容L01
② 逐对验证不相容前三年无盗窃 ⇒ 第二/三年无,分别与「至少1次」矛盾L01
③ 选出满足组A、B、E 两两互斥L01
193组合计数L02 · L01
Four letters to different insureds are prepared along with accompanying envelopes. The letters are put into the envelopes randomly. Calculate the probability that at least one letter ends up in its accompanying envelope.
(A) 27/256(B) 1/4(C) 11/24(D) 5/8(E) 3/4
错排至少一配对
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按首封对错分两情形\( P(\text{首封对})=1/4 \),已满足「至少一封」L04
② 首封错时排列计数余3封6种排列中3种恰放对一封 \( \Rightarrow 3/6 \)L02
③ 两支路合计\( \tfrac{1}{4}+\tfrac{3}{4}\cdot\tfrac{3}{6}=\tfrac{5}{8} \)L04
194条件与贝叶斯L03
A health insurance policy covers visits to a doctor's office. Each visit costs 100. The annual deductible on the policy is 350. For a policy, the number of visits per year has the following probability distribution: Number of Visits, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 | Probability, 0.60, 0.15, 0.10, 0.08, 0.04, 0.02, 0.01 A policy is selected at random from those where costs exceed the deductible. Calculate the probability that this policyholder had exactly five office visits.
(A) 0.050(B) 0.133(C) 0.286(D) 0.333(E) 0.429
超免赔条件pmf
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 超免赔额事件识别就诊 \( 4,5,6 \) 次时超过,合计 \( 0.04+0.02+0.01=0.07 \)L01
② 目标为条件概率\( P(6\text{次}\mid \text{超额})=P(6)/0.07 \)L03
③ 相除\( 0.02/0.07=0.286 \)∫ 微积分
195条件与贝叶斯L03 · L01
A machine has two parts labelled A and B. The probability that part A works for one year is 0.8 and the probability that part B works for one year is 0.6. The probability that at least one part works for one year is 0.9. Calculate the probability that part B works for one year, given that part A works for one year.
(A) 1/2(B) 3/5(C) 5/8(D) 3/4(E) 5/6
由并集求P(B|A)
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率定义\( P(B\mid A)=\dfrac{P(A\cap B)}{P(A)} \)L03
② 容斥反求交概率\( P(A\cap B)=0.8+0.6-0.9=0.5 \)L01
③ 相除\( 0.5/0.8=5/8 \)∫ 微积分
196组合计数 📌 L02L02
Six claims are to be randomly selected from a group of thirteen different claims, which includes two workers compensation claims, four homeowners claims and seven auto claims. Calculate the probability that the six claims selected will include one workers compensation claim, two homeowners claims and three auto claims.
(A) 0.025(B) 0.107(C) 0.153(D) 0.245(E) 0.643
超几何(归组合)
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 不放回按类分组计数各类取法 \( \binom{2}{1}\binom{4}{2}\binom{7}{3} \)L02
② 除以总取法\( \Big/\binom{13}{6} \)L02
③ 计算\( \dfrac{2\cdot 6\cdot 35}{1716}=0.245 \)∫ 微积分
197组合计数L02
A drawer contains four pairs of socks, with each pair a different color. One sock at a time is randomly drawn from the drawer until a matching pair is obtained. Calculate the probability that the maximum number of draws is required.
(A) 0.0006(B) 0.0095(C) 0.0417(D) 0.1429(E) 0.2286
袜子最大抽数
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件等价改写需抽5次 \( \Leftrightarrow \) 前4只颜色各异L01
② 条件概率链式相乘\( 1\cdot\tfrac{6}{7}\cdot\tfrac{4}{6}\cdot\tfrac{2}{5} \)L03
③ 计算\( =0.2286 \)∫ 微积分
198条件与贝叶斯L04
At a mortgage company, 60% of calls are answered by an attendant. The remaining 40% of callers leave their phone numbers. Of these 40%, 75% receive a return phone call the same day. The remaining 25% receive a return call the next day. Of those who initially spoke to an attendant, 80% will apply for a mortgage. Of those who received a return call the same day, 60% will apply. Of those who received a return call the next day, 40% will apply. Calculate the probability that a person initially spoke to an attendant, given that he or she applied for a mortgage.
(A) 0.06(B) 0.26(C) 0.48(D) 0.60(E) 0.69
三分支贝叶斯
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 三支路先验概率\( P(S)=0.6,\ P(R)=0.4(0.75)=0.3,\ P(N)=0.4(0.25)=0.1 \)L03
② 贝叶斯公式\( P(S\mid A)=\dfrac{P(A\mid S)P(S)}{P(A\mid S)P(S)+P(A\mid R)P(R)+P(A\mid N)P(N)} \)L04
③ 代入求值\( \dfrac{0.8(0.6)}{0.8(0.6)+0.6(0.3)+0.4(0.1)}=0.69 \)∫ 微积分
199条件与贝叶斯L04
An insurance company studies back injury claims from a manufacturing company. The insurance company finds that 40% of workers do no lifting on the job, 50% do moderate lifting and 10% do heavy lifting. During a given year, the probability of filing a claim is 0.05 for a worker who does no lifting, 0.08 for a worker who does moderate lifting and 0.20 for a worker who does heavy lifting. A worker is chosen randomly from among those who have filed a back injury claim. Calculate the probability that the worker's job involves moderate or heavy lifting.
(A) 0.75(B) 0.81(C) 0.85(D) 0.86(E) 0.89
举重索赔贝叶斯
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 目标改为补事件\( P(M\cup H\mid C)=1-P(N\mid C) \)L01
② 贝叶斯算轻举概率\( P(N\mid C)=\dfrac{0.05(0.4)}{0.05(0.4)+0.08(0.5)+0.2(0.1)}=0.25 \)L04
③ 取补\( 1-0.25=0.75 \)∫ 微积分
200命名分布 📌 L19L19
The number of traffic accidents occurring on any given day in Coralville is Poisson distributed with mean 5. The probability that any such accident involves an uninsured driver is 0.25, independent of all other such accidents. Calculate the probability that on a given day in Coralville there are no traffic accidents that involve an uninsured driver.
(A) 0.007(B) 0.010(C) 0.124(D) 0.237(E) 0.287
泊松稀疏化P(0)
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 对事故数全概率求和\( \sum_{k}P(0\text{起未保}\mid k)P(k\text{起}) \)L04
② k起全为投保司机\( P(0\text{起未保}\mid k)=(0.75)^k \)L17
③ 泊松级数合并\( \sum_k (0.75)^k\dfrac{e^{-5}5^k}{k!}=e^{-5}e^{3.75}=e^{-1.25}=0.287 \)L19
201命名分布L18 · L17
A group of 100 patients is tested, one patient at a time, for three risk factors for a certain disease until either all patients have been tested or a patient tests positive for more than one of these three risk factors. For each risk factor, a patient tests positive with probability \(p\), where \(0 < p < 1\). The outcomes of the tests across all patients and all risk factors are mutually independent. Determine an expression for the probability that exactly \(n\) patients are tested, where \(n\) is a positive integer less than 100.
(A) \(\left[1-3p^2(1-p)\right]^{n-1}\left[3p^2(1-p)\right]\)(B) \(\left[1-3p^2(1-p)-p^3\right]^{n-1}\left[3p^2(1-p)+p^3\right]\)(C) \(\left[1-3p^2(1-p)-p^3\right]\left[3p^2(1-p)+p^3\right]^{n-1}\)(D) \(n\left[1-3p^2(1-p)-p^3\right]^{n-1}\left[3p^2(1-p)+p^3\right]\)(E) \(3\left[(1-p)^{n-1}p\right]^2\left[1-(1-p)^{n-1}p\right]+\left[(1-p)^{n-1}p\right]^3\)
复合成功率几何
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单人至少2项阳性\( P=\binom{3}{2}p^2(1-p)+\binom{3}{3}p^3=3p^2(1-p)+p^3 \)L17
② 首个阳性者服从几何恰第 \( n \) 人:\( (1-P)^{n-1}P \)L18
③ 代入成功率表达\( \big[1-3p^2(1-p)-p^3\big]^{n-1}\big[3p^2(1-p)+p^3\big] \)∫ 微积分
202命名分布L18
A representative of a market research firm contacts consumers by phone in order to conduct surveys. The specific consumer contacted by each phone call is randomly determined. The probability that a phone call produces a completed survey is 0.25. Calculate the probability that more than three phone calls are required to produce one completed survey.
(A) 0.32(B) 0.42(C) 0.44(D) 0.56(E) 0.58
几何P(>3)
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别几何型等待试验每次通话完成率 \( 0.25 \)L18
② 事件等价转化超过3次 \( \Leftrightarrow \) 前3次均未完成L01
③ 独立失败连乘\( (1-0.25)^3=0.42 \)L18
203次序统计量L23 · L02
Four distinct integers are chosen randomly and without replacement from the first twelve positive integers. \(X\) is the random variable representing the second smallest of the four selected integers, and \(p\) is the probability function of \(X\). Determine \(p(x)\) for \(x = 2, 3, \ldots, 10\).
(A) \(\frac{(x-1)(11-x)(12-x)}{495}\)(B) \(\frac{(x-1)(11-x)(12-x)}{990}\)(C) \(\frac{(x-1)(x-2)(12-x)}{990}\)(D) \(\frac{(x-1)(x-2)(12-x)}{495}\)(E) \(\frac{(10-x)(11-x)(12-x)}{495}\)
离散第二小pmf
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 总抽法计数\(\binom{12}{4}=495\)L02
② 固定次小值x计数有利情形\((x-1)\binom{12-x}{2}=\frac{(x-1)(12-x)(11-x)}{2}\)L02
③ 古典概型求概率\(p(x)=\frac{(x-1)(12-x)(11-x)}{990}\)L02
204命名分布L20
Losses due to burglary are exponentially distributed with mean 100. The probability that a loss is between 40 and 50 equals the probability that a loss is between 60 and \(r\), with \(r > 60\). Calculate \(r\).
(A) 68.26(B) 70.00(C) 70.51(D) 72.36(E) 75.00
指数等概率区间
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写指数CDF(均值100)\(F(x)=1-e^{-x/100}\)L20
② 等概率条件列方程\(F(50)-F(40)=F(r)-F(60)\)L05
③ 整理并解指数方程\(e^{-r/100}=e^{-0.6}-e^{-0.4}+e^{-0.5}=0.4850\Rightarrow r=72.36\)∫ 微积分
205命名分布L20
The time until the next car accident for a particular driver is exponentially distributed with a mean of 200 days. Calculate the probability that the driver has no accidents in the next 365 days, but then has at least one accident in the 365-day period that follows this initial 365-day period.
(A) 0.026(B) 0.135(C) 0.161(D) 0.704(E) 0.839
指数无记忆两段
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件化为下次事故时间区间\(365L05
② 写指数生存函数(均值200)\(S(t)=e^{-t/200}\)L20
③ 生存函数差求区间概率\(e^{-365/200}-e^{-730/200}=e^{-1.825}-e^{-3.65}=0.1352\)L20
206命名分布L21
The annual profit of a life insurance company is normally distributed. The probability that the annual profit does not exceed 2000 is 0.7642. The probability that the annual profit does not exceed 3000 is 0.9066. Calculate the probability that the annual profit does not exceed 1000.
(A) 0.1424(B) 0.3022(C) 0.5478(D) 0.6218(E) 0.7257
双分位反解μσ
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两个已知分位标准化\(0.72=\frac{2000-\mu}{\sigma},\ 1.32=\frac{3000-\mu}{\sigma}\)L21
② 两式相除解参数\(\mu=800,\ \sigma=1666.67\)∫ 微积分
③ 目标概率标准化查表\(P(X\le1000)=P(Z\le\tfrac{1000-800}{1666.67})=P(Z\le0.12)=0.5478\)L21
207单变量基础L05
Individuals purchase both collision and liability insurance on their automobiles. The value of the insured's automobile is \(V\). Assume the loss \(L\) on an automobile claim is a random variable with cumulative distribution function \(F(l) = \begin{cases} \frac{3}{4}\left(\frac{l}{V}\right)^3, & 0 \le l < V \\ 1 - \frac{1}{10}e^{-(l-V)/V}, & V \le l. \end{cases}\) Calculate the probability that the loss on a randomly selected claim is greater than the value of the automobile.
(A) 0.00(B) 0.10(C) 0.25(D) 0.75(E) 0.90
混合CDF跳跃点
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 目标写成尾概率\(P(X>V)=1-F(V)\)L05
② 代x=V使指数项归一\(e^{-(V-V)/V}=e^{0}=1\)∫ 微积分
③ 求值\(P(X>V)=\tfrac{1}{10}=0.10\)∫ 微积分
208命名分布L20 · L14
The lifetime of a machine part is exponentially distributed with a mean of five years. Calculate the mean lifetime of the part, given that it survives less than ten years.
(A) 0.865(B) 1.157(C) 2.568(D) 2.970(E) 3.435
截断指数条件均值
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 由均值写指数密度与CDF\(f(t)=0.2e^{-0.2t},\ F(t)=1-e^{-0.2t}\)L20
② 构造截断条件密度\(g(t)=\frac{f(t)}{F(10)}=\frac{0.2e^{-0.2t}}{1-e^{-2}},\ 0L06
③ 条件期望写成积分\(E[T\mid T<10]=\int_0^{10}t\,g(t)\,dt\)L14
④ 分部积分求值\(0.2313[-6.7668-3.3834+25]=3.435\)∫ 微积分
209命名分布L20 · L03
Let \(X\) be a random variable with density function \(f(x) = \begin{cases} 2e^{-2x}, & x > 0 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}\) Calculate \(P[X \le 0.5 \mid X \le 1.0]\).
(A) 0.433(B) 0.547(C) 0.632(D) 0.731(E) 0.865
指数条件概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 密度积分得CDF\(F(x)=\int_0^x 2e^{-2y}dy=1-e^{-2x}\)L05
② 嵌套事件条件概率比\(P[X\le0.5\mid X\le1]=\frac{F(0.5)}{F(1.0)}\)L03
③ 代值计算\(\frac{1-e^{-1}}{1-e^{-2}}=0.731\)∫ 微积分
210组合计数 📌 L03L01 · L03
Events E and F are independent. P[E] = 0.84 and P[F] = 0.65. Calculate the probability that exactly one of the two events occurs.
(A) 0.056(B) 0.398(C) 0.546(D) 0.650(E) 0.944
恰一事件发生
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立推补事件也独立\(E\perp F\Rightarrow E\perp F^c\)L03
② 恰一事件互斥拆分\(P(E\cap F^c)+P(E^c\cap F)\)L01
③ 代值计算\(0.84(0.35)+0.16(0.65)=0.398\)∫ 微积分
211命名分布L18 · L03
A flood insurance company determines that \(N\), the number of claims received in a month, is a random variable with \(P[N = n] = \frac{2}{3^{n+1}}\), for \(n = 0, 1, 2, \ldots\). The numbers of claims received in different months are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that more than three claims will be received during a consecutive two-month period, given that fewer than two claims were received in the first of the two months.
(A) 0.0062(B) 0.0123(C) 0.0139(D) 0.0165(E) 0.0185
几何型两月条件
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补事件加条件概率比\(1-\frac{P[M+N\le3,\ M<2]}{P[M<2]}\)L03
② 枚举组合并独立相乘\(P[M=m,N=n]=P[M=m]P[N=n]\)L11
③ 求和取比\(1-\frac{0.87243}{0.88889}=0.0185\)∫ 微积分
212命名分布L18
Patients in a study are tested for sleep apnea, one at a time, until a patient is found to have this disease. Each patient independently has the same probability of having sleep apnea. Let \(r\) represent the probability that at least four patients are tested. Determine the probability that at least twelve patients are tested given that at least four patients are tested.
(A) \(r^{11/3}\)(B) \(r^3\)(C) \(r^{8/3}\)(D) \(r^2\)(E) \(r^{1/3}\)
几何无记忆幂
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 几何分布尾概率\(P[X\ge n]=(1-p)^{n-1}\)L18
② 用r表出已知条件\(r=P[X\ge4]=(1-p)^3\)∫ 微积分
③ 条件概率无记忆化简\(\frac{(1-p)^{11}}{(1-p)^3}=(1-p)^8=r^{8/3}\)L18
213命名分布L17 · L03
A factory tests 100 light bulbs for defects. The probability that a bulb is defective is 0.02. The occurrences of defects among the light bulbs are mutually independent events. Calculate the probability that exactly two are defective given that the number of defective bulbs is two or fewer.
(A) 0.133(B) 0.271(C) 0.273(D) 0.404(E) 0.677
二项截断条件
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 缺陷数设二项分布\(X\sim Bin(100,\ 0.02)\)L17
② 条件概率写成比值\(P[X=2\mid X\le2]=\frac{P[X=2]}{P[X\le2]}\)L03
③ 二项pmf逐项求值\(\frac{0.27341}{0.13262+0.27065+0.27341}=0.404\)∫ 微积分
214命名分布L20 · L09
A certain town experiences an average of 5 tornadoes in any four year period. The number of years from now until the town experiences its next tornado as well as the number of years between tornados have identical exponential distributions and all such times are mutually independent Calculate the median number of years from now until the town experiences its next tornado.
(A) 0.55(B) 0.73(C) 0.80(D) 0.87(E) 1.25
指数中位数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 平均间隔即指数均值\(T\sim Exp(\mu=0.8)\)L20
② 中位数方程\(0.5=1-e^{-m/0.8}\)L09
③ 取对数解\(m=-0.8\ln(0.5)=0.55\)∫ 微积分
215保险赔付L20 · L09
Losses under an insurance policy are exponentially distributed with mean 4. The deductible is 1 for each loss. Calculate the median amount that the insurer pays a policyholder for a loss under the policy.
(A) 1.77(B) 2.08(C) 2.12(D) 2.77(E) 3.12
免赔后赔付中位
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写指数生存函数\(P[X>m]=e^{-0.25m}\)L20
② 损失中位数方程\(0.5=e^{-0.25m}\Rightarrow m=-4\ln(0.5)=2.77\)L09
③ 单调变换保分位数\(\text{med}(X-1)=2.77-1=1.77\)L09
216保险赔付L19 · L07
A company has purchased a policy that will compensate for the loss of revenue due to severe weather events. The policy pays 1000 for each severe weather event in a year after the first two such events in that year. The number of severe weather events per year has a Poisson distribution with mean 1. Calculate the expected amount paid to this company in one year.
(A) 80(B) 104(C) 368(D) 512(E) 632
超两次泊松赔付
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 赔付变量含免赔额\(1000(X-2)_+,\ X\sim Poi(1)\)L19
② 期望和拆成全和减头部\(\sum_{x\ge3}(x-2)p(x)=E[X]-2-\sum_{x=0}^{2}(x-2)p(x)\)L07
③ 泊松pmf代入求值\(1000(-1+3e^{-1})=104\)L19
217保险赔付L19 · L07
A company provides each of its employees with a death benefit of 100. The company purchases insurance that pays the cost of total death benefits in excess of 400 per year. The number of employees who will die during the year is a Poisson random variable with mean 2. Calculate the expected annual cost to the company of providing the death benefits, excluding the cost of the insurance.
(A) 171(B) 189(C) 192(D) 200(E) 208
泊松封顶自付
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 死亡数设泊松并分档\(X\sim Poi(2)\),赔付按1/2/3/超3分档L19
② 分档写成本期望\(100P[X=1]+200P[X=2]+300P[X=3]+400P[X>3]\)L07
③ 尾概率取补\(P[X>3]=1-(1+2+2+\tfrac43)e^{-2}\)L19
④ 合并求值\(400-1533.33e^{-2}=192\)∫ 微积分
218命名分布 📌 L19L19 · L14
The number of burglaries occurring on Burlington Street during a one-year period is Poisson distributed with mean 1. Calculate the expected number of burglaries on Burlington Street in a one-year period, given that there are at least two burglaries.
(A) 0.63(B) 2.39(C) 2.54(D) 3.00(E) 3.78
泊松截断期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 截断条件期望定义\(E(X\mid X\ge2)=\frac{\sum_{x\ge2}xp(x)}{1-p(0)-p(1)}\)L14
② 分子用全期望减头项\(\sum_{x\ge2}xp(x)=E[X]-p(1)=1-e^{-1}\)L19
③ 代泊松值求比\(\frac{1-e^{-1}}{1-e^{-1}-e^{-1}}=2.39\)∫ 微积分
219保险赔付 📌 L16L15 · L07
For a certain health insurance policy, losses are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 450]. The policy has a deductible of \(d\) and the expected value of the unreimbursed portion of a loss is 56. Calculate \(d\).
(A) 60(B) 87(C) 112(D) 169(E) 224
均匀未赔部分56
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 自留额=损失与d取小\(\min(X,d),\ X\sim U(0,450)\)L15
② 分段积分列期望方程\(\int_0^d\frac{x}{450}dx+d\cdot\frac{450-d}{450}=56\)L07
③ 解二次方程\(d^2-900d+50400=0\Rightarrow d=60\)∫ 微积分
220命名分布 📌 L15L15 · L09
A motorist just had an accident. The accident is minor with probability 0.75 and is otherwise major. Let \(b\) be a positive constant. If the accident is minor, then the loss amount follows a uniform distribution on the interval \([0, b]\). If the accident is major, then the loss amount follows a uniform distribution on the interval \([b, 3b]\). The median loss amount due to this accident is 672. Calculate the mean loss amount due to this accident.
(A) 392(B) 512(C) 672(D) 882(E) 1008
混合均匀中位→均值
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 中位数定位在小事故段\(P(X\in[0,b])=0.75>0.5\Rightarrow 672\in[0,b]\)L09
② 均匀区间比例解b\(0.5=0.75\cdot\frac{672}{b}\Rightarrow b=1008\)L15
③ 全期望公式求均值\(0.75\cdot\frac{0+1008}{2}+0.25\cdot\frac{1008+3024}{2}=882\)L16
221数字特征L09 · L21
An insurance policy will reimburse only one claim per year. For a random policyholder, there is a 20% probability of no loss in the next year, in which case the claim amount is 0. If a loss occurs in the next year, the claim amount is normally distributed with mean 1000 and standard deviation 400. Calculate the median claim amount in the next year for a random policyholder.
(A) 663(B) 790(C) 873(D) 994(E) 1000
点质量+正态中位
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 混合分布中位数定位零点质量0.2,中位数落在连续部分L09
② 换算成无条件分位\(\frac{0.3}{1-0.2}=37.5\%\)分位L09
③ 正态反查分位求值\(z=-0.3187,\ 1000-0.3187(400)=873\)L21
222保险赔付L21 · L09
Losses incurred by a policyholder follow a normal distribution with mean 20,000 and standard deviation 4,500. The policy covers losses, subject to a deductible of 15,000. Calculate the 95th percentile of losses that exceed the deductible.
(A) 27,400(B) 27,700(C) 28,100(D) 28,400(E) 28,800
超免赔95分位
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 免赔额标准化\(z=\frac{15000-20000}{4500}=-1.11\)L21
② 超免赔额概率查表\(P(Z>-1.11)=0.8665\)L21
③ 条件分位换回全体分位\(1-0.05(0.8665)=0.9567\)L09
④ 反查z反标准化\(z\approx1.71\sim1.72\Rightarrow 27{,}700\)L21
223命名分布L21 · L09
A gun shop sells gunpowder. Monthly demand for gunpowder is normally distributed, averages 20 pounds, and has a standard deviation of 2 pounds. The shop manager wishes to stock gunpowder inventory at the beginning of each month so that there is only a 2% chance that the shop will run out of gunpowder (i.e., that demand will exceed inventory) in any given month. Calculate the amount of gunpowder to stock in inventory, in pounds.
(A) 16(B) 23(C) 24(D) 32(E) 43
正态98%库存
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分位数定义\(P(X\le x)=0.98\)L09
② 查98分位z值\(z_{0.98}=2.054\)L21
③ 反标准化\(20+2.054(2)=24.108\)∫ 微积分
224单变量基础L05 · L09
A large university will begin a 13-day period during which students may register for that semester's courses. Of those 13 days, the number of elapsed days before a randomly selected student registers has a continuous distribution with density function \(f(t)\) that is symmetric about \(t = 6.5\) and proportional to \(1/(t + 1)\) between days 0 and 6.5. A student registers at the 60th percentile of this distribution. Calculate the number of elapsed days in the registration period for this student.
(A) 4.01(B) 7.80(C) 8.99(D) 10.22(E) 10.51
对称密度60分位
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 对称+归一化定常数\(0.5=\int_0^{6.5}\frac{c}{t+1}dt=c\ln7.5\Rightarrow c=\frac{0.5}{\ln7.5}\)L05
② 对称性转化分位条件60分位在k \(\Rightarrow P[T\le13-k]=0.4\)L09
③ 积分列分位方程\(\frac{0.5}{\ln7.5}\ln(14-k)=0.4\)L09
④ 解出k\(14-k=e^{1.6119}=5.0124\Rightarrow k=8.99\)∫ 微积分
225命名分布L20 · L08
The loss \(L\) due to a boat accident is exponentially distributed. Boat insurance policy A covers up to 1 unit for each loss. Boat insurance policy B covers up to 2 units for each loss. The probability that a loss is fully covered under policy B is 1.9 times the probability that it is fully covered under policy A. Calculate the variance of \(L\).
(A) 0.1(B) 0.4(C) 2.4(D) 9.5(E) 90.1
1.9倍反解θ求方差
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数CDF代入给定关系\(1-e^{-2\lambda}=1.9(1-e^{-\lambda})\)L20
② 因式分解解参数\((1+e^{-\lambda})=1.9\Rightarrow e^{-\lambda}=0.9,\ \lambda=0.10536\)∫ 微积分
③ 指数方差公式\(Var(L)=1/\lambda^2=90.1\)L20
226保险赔付 📌 L20L20 · L08
Losses, \(X\), under an insurance policy are exponentially distributed with mean 10. For each loss, the claim payment \(Y\) is equal to the amount of the loss in excess of a deductible \(d > 0\). Calculate Var(\(Y\)).
(A) \(100 - d\)(B) \((10-d)^2\)(C) \(100e^{-d/10}\)(D) \(100\left(2e^{-d/10} - e^{-d/5}\right)\)(E) \((10-d)^2\left(2e^{-d/10} - e^{-d/5}\right)\)
(X-d)+的方差
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 超额赔付变量定义\(Y=(X-d)_+,\ X\sim Exp(\mu=10)\)L07
② 换元用无记忆算均值\(E(Y)=\int_0^\infty x(0.1e^{-0.1(x+d)})dx=10e^{-0.1d}\)L20
③ 指数二阶矩=2倍均值平方\(E(Y^2)=200e^{-0.1d}\)L08
④ 方差公式\(Var(Y)=200e^{-0.1d}-100e^{-0.2d}=100[2e^{-0.1d}-e^{-0.2d}]\)L08
227全期望方差L16 · L19
For a certain insurance company, 10% of its policies are Type A, 50% are Type B, and 40% are Type C. The annual number of claims for an individual Type A, Type B, and Type C policy follow Poisson distributions with respective means 1, 2, and 10. Let \(X\) represent the annual number of claims of a randomly selected policy. Calculate the variance of \(X\).
(A) 5.10(B) 16.09(C) 21.19(D) 42.10(E) 47.20
泊松混合总方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松二阶矩=均值+均值平方\(E[X^2\mid\lambda]=\lambda+\lambda^2\)L19
② 混合加权求均值\(E[X]=0.1(1)+0.5(2)+0.4(10)=5.1\)L16
③ 混合加权求二阶矩\(E[X^2]=0.1(2)+0.5(6)+0.4(110)=47.2\)L16
④ 方差公式\(47.2-5.1^2=21.19\)L08
228命名分布L19 · L14
The number of tornadoes in a given year follows a Poisson distribution with mean 3. Calculate the variance of the number of tornadoes in a year given that at least one tornado occurs.
(A) 1.63(B) 1.73(C) 2.66(D) 3.00(E) 3.16
零截断泊松方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 全期望拆出条件均值\(3=E(X)=0\cdot e^{-3}+E(X\mid X>0)(1-e^{-3})\)L16
② 解零截断均值\(E(X\mid X>0)=\frac{3}{1-e^{-3}}=3.1572\)L14
③ 同法解条件二阶矩\(E(X^2\mid X>0)=\frac{3+3^2}{1-e^{-3}}=12.6287\)L14
④ 条件方差\(12.6287-3.1572^2=2.6609\)L08
229保险赔付L15 · L08
A government employee's yearly dental expense follows a uniform distribution on the interval from 200 to 1200. The government's primary dental plan reimburses an employee for up to 400 of dental expense incurred in a year, while a supplemental plan pays up to 500 of any remaining dental expense. Let \(Y\) represent the yearly benefit paid by the supplemental plan to a government employee. Calculate Var(\(Y\)).
(A) 20,833(B) 26,042(C) 41,042(D) 53,333(E) 83,333
分层给付方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 赔付分段定义\(Y=0/(X-400)/500\)按X分段,\(f(x)=0.001\)L07
② 均匀密度分段积分求均值\(E(Y)=0+0.001\frac{(x-400)^2}{2}\Big|_{400}^{900}+150=275\)L07
③ 分段积分求二阶矩\(E(Y^2)=41{,}666.67+75{,}000=116{,}666.67\)L08
④ 方差公式\(116{,}666.67-275^2=41{,}041.67\)L08
230保险赔付 📌 L16L15 · L08
Under a liability insurance policy, losses are uniformly distributed on \([0, b]\), where \(b\) is a positive constant. There is a deductible of \(b/2\). Calculate the ratio of the variance of the claim payment (greater than or equal to zero) from a given loss to the variance of the loss.
(A) 1:8(B) 3:16(C) 1:4(D) 5:16(E) 1:2
半免赔方差比
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀损失方差\(Var(X)=b^2/12\)L15
② 赔付均值分段积分\(E(C)=\int_{b/2}^{b}(x-\tfrac b2)\tfrac1b dx=b/8\)L07
③ 赔付二阶矩\(E(C^2)=(b/2)^3/(3b)=b^2/24\)L08
④ 求方差取比\(Var(C)=\tfrac{5b^2}{192},\ \frac{5b^2/192}{b^2/12}=\tfrac{5}{16}\)∫ 微积分
231命名分布L21
A company's annual profit, in billions, has a normal distribution with variance equal to the cube of its mean. The probability of an annual loss is 5%. Calculate the company's expected annual profit.
(A) 370 million(B) 520 million(C) 780 million(D) 950 million(E) 1645 million
方差=均值立方
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 亏损概率标准化\(0.05=P(X<0)=P(Z<-\mu/\sigma)\)L21
② 查表得分位\(-\mu/\sigma=-1.645\)L21
③ 代入约束解均值\(\sigma^2=\mu^3\Rightarrow\mu^{-1/2}=1.645\Rightarrow\mu=0.37\)(3.7亿)∫ 微积分
232数字特征 📌 L08L08
The number of claims \(X\) on a health insurance policy is a random variable with \(E[X^2] = 61\) and \(E[(X-1)^2] = 47\). Calculate the standard deviation of the number of claims.
(A) 2.18(B) 2.40(C) 7.31(D) 7.50(E) 7.81
两矩联立求SD
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 展开平移二阶矩\(E[(X-1)^2]=E[X^2]-2E[X]+1=47\)L08
② 解出均值\(E[X]=(61+1-47)/2=7.5\)∫ 微积分
③ 标准差公式\(\sqrt{E[X^2]-E[X]^2}=\sqrt{61-7.5^2}=2.18\)L08
233数字特征L08 · L02
Ten cards from a deck of playing cards are in a box: two diamonds, three spades, and five hearts. Two cards are randomly selected without replacement. Calculate the variance of the number of diamonds selected, given that no spade is selected.
(A) 0.24(B) 0.28(C) 0.32(D) 0.34(E) 0.41
条件超几何方差
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 超几何求条件事件概率\(P(S=0)=\binom{3}{0}\binom{7}{2}/\binom{10}{2}=7/15\)L02
② 逐点求条件分布\(P(D=0,1,2\mid S=0)=\tfrac{10}{21},\tfrac{10}{21},\tfrac{1}{21}\)L06
③ 条件均值与二阶矩\(E=\tfrac{12}{21}=\tfrac47,\ E(D^2)=\tfrac{14}{21}=\tfrac23\)L14
④ 条件方差\(\tfrac23-(\tfrac47)^2=0.34\)L14
237命名分布L15 · L01
A car and a bus arrive at a railroad crossing at times independently and uniformly distributed between 7:15 and 7:30. A train arrives at the crossing at 7:20 and halts traffic at the crossing for five minutes. Calculate the probability that the waiting time of the car or the bus at the crossing exceeds three minutes.
(A) 0.25(B) 0.27(C) 0.36(D) 0.40(E) 0.56
均匀等待并事件
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 迟到事件化为均匀区间到达落在7:20–7:22,\(p=2/15\)L15
② 独立并事件容斥\(\tfrac{2}{15}+\tfrac{2}{15}-\tfrac{2}{15}\cdot\tfrac{2}{15}\)L01
③ 求值\(56/225=0.25\)∫ 微积分
238离散联合 📌 L11L18 · L11
Skateboarders A and B practice one difficult stunt until becoming injured while attempting the stunt. On each attempt, the probability of becoming injured is \(p\), independent of the outcomes of all previous attempts. Let \(F(x, y)\) represent the probability that skateboarders A and B make no more than \(x\) and \(y\) attempts, respectively, where \(x\) and \(y\) are positive integers. It is given that \(F(2, 2) = 0.0441\). Calculate \(F(1, 5)\).
(A) 0.0093(B) 0.0216(C) 0.0495(D) 0.0551(E) 0.1112
独立几何联合CDF
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两次内受伤概率(几何)\(p+(1-p)p=2p-p^2\)L18
② 两人独立平方列方程\((2p-p^2)^2=0.0441\)L11
③ 解出p\((p-1)^2=0.79\Rightarrow p=0.11118\)∫ 微积分
④ 目标联合概率\(F(1,5)=p[1-(1-p)^5]=0.0495\)L11
239离散联合 📌 L11L11 · L18
The number of minor surgeries, \(X\), and the number of major surgeries, \(Y\), for a policyholder, this decade, has joint cumulative distribution function \(F(x, y) = \left[1 - (0.5)^{x+1}\right]\left[1 - (0.2)^{y+1}\right],\) for nonnegative integers \(x\) and \(y\). Calculate the probability that the policyholder experiences exactly three minor surgeries and exactly three major surgeries this decade.
(A) 0.00004(B) 0.00040(C) 0.03244(D) 0.06800(E) 0.12440
联合CDF差分pmf
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 联合pmf由CDF差分\(P(X=3,Y=3)=F(3,3)-F(2,3)-F(3,2)+F(2,2)\)L11
② 代值计算\(0.9360-0.8736-0.9300+0.8680=0.0004\)∫ 微积分
240线性组合与CLT 📌 L22L22 · L17
A company provides a death benefit of 50,000 for each of its 1000 employees. There is a 1.4% chance that any one employee will die next year, independent of all other employees. The company establishes a fund such that the probability is at least 0.99 that the fund will cover next year's death benefits. Calculate, using the Central Limit Theorem, the smallest amount of money, rounded to the nearest 50 thousand, that the company must put into the fund.
(A) 750,000(B) 850,000(C) 1,050,000(D) 1,150,000(E) 1,400,000
CLT定基金规模
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 赔付总额线性于二项\(S=50000X,\ X\sim Bin(1000,0.014)\)L17
② 二项均值方差缩放\(E(S)=700{,}000,\ Var(S)=50000^2(1000)(0.014)(0.986)\)L08
③ 正态近似求99分位\(700000+2.326(185{,}769)=1{,}132{,}099\approx1{,}150{,}000\)L22
241线性组合与CLTL22
An investor invests 100 dollars in a stock. Each month, the investment has probability 0.5 of increasing by 1.10 dollars and probability 0.5 of decreasing by 0.90 dollars. The changes in price in different months are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that the investment has a value greater than 91 dollars at the end of month 100.
(A) 0.63(B) 0.75(C) 0.82(D) 0.94(E) 0.97
随机游走CLT
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 单月均值与方差\(E(X_k)=0.5(1.1)+0.5(-0.9)=0.1,\ Var(X_k)=1\)L08
② 独立求和汇总\(E(S)=10,\ Var(S)=100\)L08
③ CLT标准化\(P(S>-9)=P(Z>\tfrac{-9-10}{10}=-1.9)=0.9713\)L22
242全期望方差L16 · L20
Let \(X\) denote the loss amount sustained by an insurance company's policyholder in an auto collision. Let \(Z\) denote the portion of \(X\) that the insurance company will have to pay. An actuary determines that \(X\) and \(Z\) are independent with respective density and probability functions \(f(x) = \begin{cases} (1/8)e^{-x/8}, & x > 0 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}\) and \(P[Z = z] = \begin{cases} 0.45, & z = 1 \\ 0.55, & z = 0. \end{cases}\) Calculate the variance of the insurance company's claim payment \(ZX\).
(A) 13.0(B) 15.8(C) 28.8(D) 35.2(E) 44.6
伯努利×指数方差
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数二阶矩\(E(X^2)=2(8^2)=128\)L20
② 独立乘积期望分解\(E(ZX)=E(Z)E(X)=0.45(8)=3.6\)L12
③ 乘积二阶矩分解\(E[(ZX)^2]=E(Z^2)E(X^2)=0.45(128)=57.6\)L12
④ 方差公式\(57.6-3.6^2=44.64\)L08
243离散联合 📌 L12L11 · L07
A couple takes out a medical insurance policy that reimburses them for days of work missed due to illness. Let \(X\) and \(Y\) denote the number of days missed during a given month by the wife and husband, respectively. The policy pays a monthly benefit of 50 times the maximum of \(X\) and \(Y\), subject to a benefit limit of 100. \(X\) and \(Y\) are independent, each with a discrete uniform distribution on the set {0,1,2,3,4}. Calculate the expected monthly benefit for missed days of work that is paid to the couple.
(A) 70(B) 90(C) 92(D) 95(E) 140
离散max封顶期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 离散联合均匀赋权每对\((x,y)\)概率\(1/25\)L11
② 按赔付值归类计数\(P(0)=\tfrac{1}{25},P(50)=\tfrac{3}{25},P(100)=\tfrac{21}{25}\)L11
③ 求期望\(\frac{0+150+2100}{25}=90\)L07
244离散联合L11 · L07
The table below shows the joint probability function of a sailor's number of boating accidents and number of hospitalizations from these accidents this year. Number of Accidents (rows) by Number of Hospitalizations from Accidents (columns 0, 1, 2, 3) | Accidents 0: 0.700 | Accidents 1: 0.150, 0.050 | Accidents 2: 0.060, 0.020, 0.010 | Accidents 3: 0.005, 0.002, 0.002, 0.001 Calculate the sailor's expected number of hospitalizations from boating accidents this year.
(A) 0.085(B) 0.099(C) 0.410(D) 1.000(E) 1.500
联合表边缘期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按列求和得边缘pmf\(p(x)=\sum_y p(x,y)\)L11
② 列出边缘概率\(p(0)=0.915,p(1)=0.072,p(2)=0.012,p(3)=0.001\)L11
③ 求期望\(0.072+0.024+0.003=0.099\)L07
245全期望方差 📌 L16L16 · L20
On Main Street, a driver's speed just before an accident is uniformly distributed on [5, 20]. Given the speed, the resulting loss from the accident is exponentially distributed with mean equal to three times the speed. Calculate the variance of a loss due to an accident on Main Street.
(A) 525(B) 1463(C) 1575(D) 1632(E) 1744
分层模型总方差
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 全方差公式拆解\(Var(X)=Var[E(X\mid S)]+E[Var(X\mid S)]\)L16
② 条件指数的均值方差\(E(X\mid S)=3S,\ Var(X\mid S)=9S^2\)L20
③ 均匀分布矩代入\(Var(3S)=9\tfrac{15^2}{12},\ E(S^2)=\tfrac{15^2}{12}+12.5^2\)L15
④ 合计\(168.75+1575=1743.75\)∫ 微积分
246离散联合L14 · L19
Let \(X\) be the annual number of hurricanes hitting Florida, and let \(Y\) be the annual number of hurricanes hitting Texas. \(X\) and \(Y\) are independent Poisson variables with respective means 1.70 and 2.30. Calculate \(\mathrm{Var}(X - Y \mid X + Y = 3)\).
(A) 1.71(B) 1.77(C) 2.93(D) 3.14(E) 4.00
泊松条件二项方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 枚举和为3的组合独立泊松乘积:\((0,3),(1,2),(2,1),(3,0)\)L11
② 归一化得条件分布\(0.1901,0.4215,0.3116,0.0768\)对应\(X-Y=-3,-1,1,3\)L06
③ 条件均值\(E=-0.4498\)L14
④ 条件二阶矩与方差\(E^{(2)}=3.1352,\ Var=3.1352-0.4498^2=2.9329\)L14
247离散联合L11 · L08
Random variables \(X\) and \(Y\) have joint distribution Columns \(X = 0\), \(X = 1\), \(X = 2\) | \(Y = 0\): 1/15, \(a\), 2/15 | \(Y = 1\): \(a\), \(b\), \(a\) | \(Y = 2\): 2/15, \(a\), 1/15 Let \(a\) be the value that minimizes the variance of \(X\). Calculate the variance of \(Y\).
(A) 2/5(B) 8/15(C) 16/25(D) 2/3(E) 7/10
参数a极小化方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求X边缘分布\(P(0)=\tfrac15+a,\ P(1)=2a+b,\ P(2)=\tfrac15+b\)L11
② 对称知均值并写方差\(E=1,\ Var=2(\tfrac15+a)=\tfrac25+2a\)L08
③ 取a=0最小并同理Y\(Var(Y)=Var(X)_{min}=2/5\)∫ 微积分
248协方差相关 📌 L13L13
Let \(X\) be a random variable that takes on the values \(-1\), 0, and 1 with equal probabilities. Let \(Y = X^2\). Which of the following is true?
