① 中位数定指数均值\(0.5=e^{-1.733/\beta}\Rightarrow\beta=2.5\)L20
② 区间概率=CDF之差\(P(1.733L05
③ 化简\(=0.5-e^{-1}\)∫ 微积分
523命名分布L21 · L09
You are given the following information about two insurance policies: i) Losses covered by each policy follow a normal distribution with mean 8000. ii) Losses covered by Policy I have standard deviation k. iii) Losses covered by Policy II have standard deviation 1.5k. The pth percentile of losses covered by Policy I is equal to the 81st percentile of losses covered by Policy II. Calculate p.
(A) 83.2(B) 85.7(C) 88.2(D) 90.6(E) 93.2
正态分位数匹配
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 81分位对应z值\(z_{0.81}=0.87790\)L09
② 保单II损失表达\(y=8000+0.87790(1.5k)\)L21
③ 按保单I标准化\(\tfrac{y-8000}k=0.87790(1.5)=1.3168\)L21
④ z值反查分位\(\Phi(1.3168)\approx0.906\Rightarrow90.6\%\)L09
524组合计数L02
In a group of 35 patients, 9 have high blood pressure, 9 have high cholesterol, and 15 have high blood pressure or high cholesterol. From these 35 patients, a doctor needs to select a group of 8 patients for a test in which exactly 4 have high blood pressure only, exactly 1 has high cholesterol only, and exactly 2 have both high blood pressure and high cholesterol. Calculate the number of different groups the doctor can select for this test.
(A) 90(B) 270(C) 5,400(D) 47,628(E) 238,140
分组选取乘法计数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 容斥求四类人数\(both=9+9-15=3;\ 6,\ 6,\ 20\)L01
② 各类取人组合数\(\binom64=15,\ \binom61=6,\ \binom32=3,\ \binom{20}1=20\)L02
③ 乘法原理\(15\cdot6\cdot3\cdot20=5400\)L02
525离散联合L11 · L14
The joint distribution of television viewers' habits in the two entertainment categories of Sports and Movies and the one non-entertainment category of News is: Regularly watches Sports: Regularly watches Movies & Regularly watches News 0.35, Regularly watches Movies & Does not regularly watch News 0.10 | Does not regularly watch Movies & Regularly watches News 0.08, Does not regularly watch Movies & Does not regularly watch News 0.06 Does not regularly watch Sports: Regularly watches Movies & Regularly watches News 0.22, Regularly watches Movies & Does not regularly watch News 0.06 | Does not regularly watch Movies & Regularly watches News 0.05, Does not regularly watch Movies & Does not regularly watch News 0.08 Calculate the variance of the number of entertainment categories regularly watched by those television viewers who regularly watch News.
(A) 0.242(B) 0.388(C) 0.400(D) 0.478(E) 0.571
表格条件方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求条件化总概率\(P(N)=0.35+0.08+0.22+0.05=0.70\)L03
② 写条件分布列\(\tfrac1{14},\ \tfrac6{14},\ \tfrac7{14}\)L06
③ 条件均值与二阶矩\(E=\tfrac{10}7,\ E(K^2)=\tfrac{17}7\)L14
④ 条件方差\(\tfrac{17}7-\tfrac{100}{49}=0.388\)L14
526线性组合与CLTL22
A company insures homes in 50 different territories. The company models annual tornado losses within each territory by an exponential distribution with mean 100,000. Because of the local nature of most tornadoes, losses in one territory are independent of losses in other territories. Calculate the approximate probability that total annual tornado losses over all 50 territories exceed 5.5 million.
(A) 0.14(B) 0.18(C) 0.24(D) 0.33(E) 0.46
CLT指数总和
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求和的均值与标差\(E(T)=50(0.1)=5,\ SD=\sqrt{50}(0.1)=0.7071\)L22
② CLT正态近似标准化\(P(T>5.5)=P(Z>\tfrac{5.5-5}{0.7071})\)L22
③ 查表\(P(Z>0.7071)=0.2397\)L21
527协方差相关L13
Let X and Y be random variables for which i) Var (X) = Var (Y) ii) Var (X + Y) = 10 iii) Var (X − 2Y) = 16. Calculate \( \text{Cov}(X, Y) \).
(A) −1.0(B) −0.1(C) 0.1(D) 1.0(E) 2.0
方差组合解Cov
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 展开和的方差\(10=2\mathrm{Var}(X)+2\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)\)L13
② 展开差的方差\(16=5\mathrm{Var}(X)-4\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)\)L13
③ 联立求解\(16=25-9\mathrm{Cov}\Rightarrow\mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)=1\)∫ 微积分
528条件与贝叶斯L03 · L01
An actuary makes the following observations about an insurer's fire and flood insurance policies: i) The probability that a client purchases neither policy exceeds the probability that a client purchases both policies by 0.20. ii) The probability that a client purchases both policies is positive. iii) The probability that a client purchases a fire policy given that the client purchases a flood policy is twice the probability that a client purchases a flood policy given that the client purchases a fire policy. Calculate the probability that a client purchases a flood policy.
(A) 0.27(B) 0.33(C) 0.40(D) 0.53(E) 0.80
条件关系解方程
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补集联系交与并\(x=1-P(A\cup B)=0.2+P(A\cap B)\)L01
② 条件概率比推关系\(P(A|B)=2P(B|A)\Rightarrow P(B)=\tfrac12P(A)\)L03
③ 容斥代入\(1-x=\tfrac32P(A)-(x-0.2)\)L01
④ 解出目标\(P(A)=\tfrac8{15},\ P(B)=\tfrac4{15}=0.2666\)∫ 微积分
529命名分布L19
The number of errors on an application is modeled by a Poisson random variable with variance 0.25. The number of errors on any application is independent of the number of errors on all other applications. Calculate the probability that two applications contain a total of more than one error.
(A) 0.03(B) 0.09(C) 0.30(D) 0.61(E) 0.91
泊松和超一误
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两份申请泊松叠加\(\lambda=2\times0.25=0.5\)L19
② 尾概率取补\(P(X>1)=1-e^{-0.5}(1+0.5)\)L19
③ 计算\(1-0.6065-0.3033=0.0902\)∫ 微积分
530条件与贝叶斯L03
A box contains three fair dice. One has faces numbered 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6; one has faces numbered 2, 2, 4, 4, 6, and 6; and one has all six faces numbered 6. Two of the three dice are randomly selected and rolled. Calculate the probability that the sum of the numbers rolled on the two dice is 11.
(A) 0.025(B) 0.028(C) 0.074(D) 0.111(E) 0.222
全概率选骰求和
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分骰子对求条件概率\(P(11|AB)=\tfrac1{18},\ P(11|AC)=\tfrac16,\ P(11|BC)=0\)L03
② 全概率加权求和\(\tfrac13\cdot\tfrac1{18}+\tfrac13\cdot\tfrac16=\tfrac4{54}\)L04
③ 化简\(=0.0741\)∫ 微积分
531单变量基础L01
A policyholder is insured against both fire and theft claims. The probability of a fire claim is 10%. The probability of a theft claim is 30%. Let p be the probability of having neither a fire nor a theft claim, assuming fire and theft claims are independent. Let r be the probability of having neither a fire nor a theft claim, assuming fire and theft claims are mutually exclusive. Calculate p − r.
(A) −0.06(B) −0.03(C) 0.00(D) 0.03(E) 0.06
独立vs互斥差
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立情形求并的补\(p=1-(0.1+0.3-0.03)=0.63\)L03
② 互斥情形求并的补\(r=1-0.1-0.3=0.60\)L01
③ 作差\(p-r=0.03\)∫ 微积分
532条件与贝叶斯L04
In a certain region, 5% of all banks will fail in the next five years. The FDIC insures 80% of the banks in the region. Only 3% of the banks in the region insured by the FDIC will fail in the next five years. Calculate the probability that a bank in the region that fails in the next five years is insured by the FDIC.
(A) 0.02(B) 0.04(C) 0.06(D) 0.48(E) 0.60
贝叶斯银行倒闭
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率反解交\(0.03=\frac{P(F\cap FDIC)}{0.80}\Rightarrow P(F\cap FDIC)=0.024\)L03
② 反向条件概率\(P(FDIC|F)=\frac{0.024}{0.05}\)L03
③ 计算\(=0.48\)∫ 微积分
533组合计数L02
This year, each of the ten employees of a company has probability 0.2 of having at least one accident. The occurrences of accidents among different employees are mutually independent. Of the ten employees, six are in department A. The other four are in department B. Exactly three of the ten employees each have at least one accident. Calculate the probability that at least one of these accidents occurs to an employee in department B.
(A) 0.201(B) 0.500(C) 0.590(D) 0.784(E) 0.833
超几何分部门,无专章
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 等可能抽样取补集\(P=1-P(3\ \mathrm{in}\ A)\)L01
② 超几何计数补事件\(P(3\ \mathrm{in}\ A)=\frac{\binom63\binom40}{\binom{10}3}=\tfrac{20}{120}\)L02
③ 计算\(1-\tfrac16=\tfrac56=0.8333\)∫ 微积分
534命名分布L19 · L18
In a given year, the number of accidents an auto insurance policyholder experiences is Poisson distributed with mean 0.10. The numbers of accidents by year are independent. Calculate the probability that a policyholder's first accident occurs during the sixth year of the policy, given that the policyholder experiences no accidents during the first two years of the policy.
(A) 0.0009(B) 0.0577(C) 0.0705(D) 0.0729(E) 0.3297
泊松年化几何首现
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松求单年无事故\(P(0)=e^{-0.10},\ P(\ge1)=1-e^{-0.10}\)L19
② 条件概率化为比值\(\frac{P(0)^5P(\ge1)}{P(0)^2}\)L03
③ 独立性约简计算\((e^{-0.1})^3(1-e^{-0.1})=0.070498\)∫ 微积分
535数字特征 📌 L08L08
A policyholder experiences one accident under a health insurance policy and one accident under a dental insurance policy. The health insurance policy reimburses 80% of losses. Losses under this policy have variance 40,000. The dental insurance policy reimburses 90% of losses. Losses under this policy have variance 10,000. The policyholder's two losses are independent. Calculate the variance of the policyholder's total unreimbursed loss under these policies.
(A) 1,700(B) 9,000(C) 16,300(D) 33,700(E) 50,000
比例保留方差和
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立和方差可加\(\mathrm{Var}(U)=\mathrm{Var}(0.2X)+\mathrm{Var}(0.1Y)\)L08
② 常数平方提出\(=0.2^2(40000)+0.1^2(10000)\)L08
③ 计算\(=1600+100=1700\)∫ 微积分
536单变量基础L01
A weighted six-sided die is rolled. Let A be the event that the number rolled is less than 5. Let B be the event that the number rolled is less than 4. Let C be the event that the number rolled is a 6. The probabilities of A, B, and C are 0.3, 0.1, and 0.7, respectively. Calculate \( P[A \cup B] + P[A \cup C] + P[B \cup C] \).
(A) 1.10(B) 1.89(C) 2.10(D) 2.17(E) 2.20
并集概率求和
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 并事件化为点数集合\(P(A\cup B)=P(<5)=0.3\)L01
② 同法求另两个并\(P(A\cup C)=1.0,\ P(B\cup C)=0.8\)L01
③ 求和\(0.3+1.0+0.8=2.1\)∫ 微积分
537单变量基础L01
An actuary accepts an assignment to live and work in Key West, Florida for three years. The probability that there are no hurricanes in Key West is 0.75 per year. If there is at least one hurricane in Key West in a year, then the probability is 0.35 that the actuary will need to evacuate in that year. There is no other reason for the actuary to evacuate. The year-to-year occurrences of hurricanes in Key West are independent events. Calculate the probability that the actuary will need to evacuate at least once from Key West before the assignment is complete.
(A) 0.088(B) 0.219(C) 0.240(D) 0.422(E) 0.578
独立三年补集
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 乘法求单年撤离概率\(0.35\times0.25=0.0875\)L03
② 独立三年皆不撤离\(0.9125^3=0.7598\)L03
③ 取补\(1-0.7598=0.2402\)L01
538命名分布L18 · L10
Each person in a certain large population independently has probability 0.0625 of having a certain disease. People in this population are tested for the disease, until somebody is found to have the disease. Calculate the mode of the number of people tested.
(A) 1(B) 6(C) 11(D) 15(E) 16
几何分布众数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别几何分布\(P(X=n)=(0.9375)^{n-1}(0.0625)\)L18
② pmf随n单调递减\(\arg\max_n P(X=n)=1\)L10
③ 众数为首项\(\mathrm{mode}=1\)L10
539线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
The random variables \( X_1, X_2, X_3 \) represent the values of three independent investments. Each is normally distributed with \( E(X_i) = 100 \) and \( \text{Var}(X_i) = 27i/2 \), \( i = 1, 2, 3 \). Let \( \Phi(x) \) denote the cumulative distribution function of the standard normal variable. Determine the probability that the average value of the three investments exceeds 106.
(A) \( \Phi(2) \)(B) \( \Phi(2/3) \)(C) \( 1 - \Phi(2/3) \)(D) \( 1 - \Phi(2) \)(E) \( 1 - \Phi\left(2/\sqrt{3}\right) \)
三正态均值概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均值的正态参数\(\bar X\sim N(100,\ \tfrac19\cdot\tfrac{27}2(1+2+3)=9)\)L21
② 标准化\(P(\bar X>106)=P(Z>\tfrac{106-100}3)=P(Z>2)\)L21
③ 表达为标准正态CDF\(=1-\Phi(2)\)L21
540条件与贝叶斯L04
An insurance company pays a benefit for a duration of one year, two years, or five years, depending upon the severity of the claim. Information about the distribution of claims in the past year by sex and duration of benefit is given in the following table: 1 year, 2 years, 5 years | Male: 20%, 40%, 40% | Female: 10%, 70%, 20% Males accounted for 60% of all claims. Calculate the probability that a claimant was female, given that this claimant received a five-year benefit.
(A) 1/5(B) 1/4(C) 1/3(D) 1/2(E) 3/4
贝叶斯理赔性别
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 列先验与似然\(P(5|F)=0.2,\ P(F)=0.4;\ P(5|M)=0.4,\ P(M)=0.6\)L04
② 贝叶斯公式\(P(F|5)=\frac{0.2(0.4)}{0.2(0.4)+0.4(0.6)}\)L04
③ 计算\(=\tfrac{0.08}{0.32}=0.25\)∫ 微积分
541命名分布L20
The lifetime of an electronic component is exponentially distributed. Given that the component lasts at least five years, the probability that it lasts at least fifteen years is 0.027. Calculate the probability that the component lasts at least 25 years, given that it lasts at least five years.
(A) 0.0007(B) 0.0024(C) 0.0135(D) 0.0162(E) 0.0450
指数无记忆平方
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 无记忆性化简条件\(0.027=P(X>15|X>5)=P(X>10)\)L20
② 解指数均值\(e^{-10/\beta}=0.027\Rightarrow\beta=2.76861\)L20
③ 再用无记忆性求目标\(P(X>25|X>5)=P(X>20)=e^{-20/2.76861}=0.000729\)L20
542线性组合与CLT 📌 L08L22 · L08
Each of the 76 employees of a company is either a low-risk or a high-risk employee. This year, each low-risk employee's number of accidents has standard deviation 0.50 and each high-risk employee's number of accidents has standard deviation 5.50. The standard deviation of the total number of accidents for all the employees is 43.00. The frequencies of accidents among the employees are independent. Calculate the number of low-risk employees.
(A) 1(B) 15(C) 38(D) 61(E) 75
方差和解人数
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立和方差可加建方程\(43^2=l(0.5)^2+(76-l)(5.5)^2\)L08
② 化简\(1849=2299-30l\)∫ 微积分
③ 解出人数\(l=15\)∫ 微积分
543保险赔付L08
A renter's insurance policy pays a percentage p of the amount by which each loss exceeds a deductible d. Each policyholder reports a loss if and only if the loss exceeds the deductible. The variance of a reported loss is v. Determine the variance of the claim payment resulting from a reported loss.
(A) \( pv \)(B) \( p^2v \)(C) \( p(v - d) \)(D) \( p^2(v - d) \)(E) \( (1 - p)^2v \)
赔付方差p²v
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写赔付随机变量\(\mathrm{payment}=p(X-d),\ X>d\ \mathrm{a.s.}\)L05
② 方差平移不变\(\mathrm{Var}(X-d)=\mathrm{Var}(X)=v\)L08
③ 常数平方提出\(\mathrm{Var}[p(X-d)]=p^2v\)L08
544条件与贝叶斯L03
Assume the distribution of the number of automobile claims per year for an auto insurance policyholder is described by the following table: Number of Claims, Probability | 0, 0.4 | 1, 0.3 | 2, 0.2 | 3, 0.1 For each claim that occurs, there is a probability of 0.5 that the claim size is 500 and a probability of 0.5 that the claim size is 1000. Claim sizes are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that the total claim size for a randomly selected policyholder this year is greater than or equal to 2000, given that at least two claims occur.
(A) 0.14(B) 0.25(C) 0.29(D) 0.46(E) 0.88
条件复合理赔
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率框架\(P(A|B)=P(A\cap B)/P(B)\)L03
② 两笔赔款均为千元\(0.2(0.5)(0.5)=0.05\)L03
③ 三笔赔款情形取补\(0.1[1-(0.5)^3]=0.0875\)L01
④ 合并取比值\(\frac{0.05+0.0875}{0.2+0.1}=0.4583\)∫ 微积分
545命名分布L20 · L09
The total amount of all hurricane claims filed with a company in a one-year time period is modeled by a random variable, X, with density function \( f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{1,000,000}e^{-x/1,000,000}, & \text{for } x > 0 \\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} \) Calculate, to the nearest 100,000, the difference between the 15th and 95th percentiles of the total amount of hurricane claims.
(A) 1,800,000(B) 1,900,000(C) 2,700,000(D) 2,800,000(E) 3,000,000
指数分位数差
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写指数CDF\(F(x)=1-e^{-x/10^6}\)L20
② 解15分位\(e^{-a/10^6}=0.85\Rightarrow a=162{,}519\)L09
③ 解95分位\(e^{-b/10^6}=0.05\Rightarrow b=2{,}995{,}732\)L09
④ 作差\(b-a=2{,}833{,}213\)∫ 微积分
546条件与贝叶斯L04
A large lot of circuit boards contains 10% that are defective. A test for defective boards is correct with 80% probability if the board is defective and correct with only 40% probability if the board is not defective. A randomly selected board is tested and the test indicates that the board is defective. Calculate the probability that the board is defective.
(A) 2/25(B) 1/10(C) 2/17(D) 4/31(E) 2/11
贝叶斯检测阳性
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 列先验与检测似然\(P(D)=0.1,\ P(T|D)=0.8,\ P(T|\bar D)=0.6\)L04
② 贝叶斯公式\(P(D|T)=\frac{0.8(0.1)}{0.8(0.1)+0.6(0.9)}\)L04
③ 计算\(=\tfrac4{31}\)∫ 微积分
547条件与贝叶斯L04
A weather satellite is sending a binary code of 0s and 1s describing a tropical storm. Suppose 70% of the message being sent is 0s and there is an 80% chance of any particular 0 or 1 being received correctly. (If a 1 is sent and incorrectly received, it is received as a 0, and vice versa.) Calculate the probability that a 0 was sent, given that a 1 was received.
(A) 0.16(B) 0.34(C) 0.37(D) 0.63(E) 0.90
贝叶斯信道误码
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补概率补全条件表\(P(B_1)=0.3,\ P(A_1|B_0)=0.2,\ P(A_1|B_1)=0.8\)L03
② 贝叶斯公式\(P(B_0|A_1)=\frac{P(A_1|B_0)P(B_0)}{P(A_1|B_0)P(B_0)+P(A_1|B_1)P(B_1)}\)L04
③ 代值计算\(\frac{0.2(0.7)}{0.2(0.7)+0.8(0.3)}=0.37\)∫ 微积分
548条件与贝叶斯L03
Urn A contains five red chips and four white chips. Urn B contains four red chips and five white chips. Two chips are transferred from urn A to urn B. Then a single chip is drawn from urn B. Calculate the probability that the chip drawn from urn B will be white.
(A) 0.455(B) 0.535(C) 0.545(D) 0.556(E) 0.571
全概率移球抽球
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 转移白棋数超几何权重\(P(kWT)=\frac{\binom4k\binom5{2-k}}{\binom92}\)L02
② 各情形抽白条件概率\(P(W|kWT)=\tfrac5{11},\ \tfrac6{11},\ \tfrac7{11}\)L03
③ 全概率求和\(P(W)=\tfrac{212}{396}=0.5354\)L04
549组合计数 📌 L02L02
Six people are seated randomly around a circular table. Two of the six people are left-handed. Calculate the probability that the two left-handed people are seated next to each other.
(A) 1/6(B) 1/5(C) 1/3(D) 2/5(E) 3/5
圆桌相邻概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 圆排列总数\(5!\)L02
② 捆绑法数相邻情形\(2\times4!\)L02
③ 等可能取比值\(\frac{2(4!)}{5!}=\tfrac25\)L02
550组合计数L02
In a group of nine people, five have high blood sugar. Five people are to be chosen randomly from this group of nine. Calculate how many possible combinations contain exactly two people with high blood sugar.
(A) 10(B) 14(C) 40(D) 100(E) 126
组合数恰二高糖
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别两阶段选人计数\(5\ \mathrm{中取}\ 2,\ 4\ \mathrm{中取}\ 3\)L02
② 各阶段组合数\(\binom52=10,\ \binom43=4\)L02
③ 乘法原理\(10\times4=40\)L02
551命名分布L17
A motorist makes four driving errors this year. Each error independently has probability 0.3 of resulting in an accident. The motorist's insurance company reimburses up to two accidents due to the motorist's errors this year. Calculate the probability that these four errors result in at least one unreimbursed accident.
(A) 0.03(B) 0.08(C) 0.24(D) 0.32(E) 0.41
二项至少三次
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别二项分布\(X\sim\mathrm{Bin}(4,0.3)\)L17
② 尾概率逐项求和\(P(X>2)=\binom43(0.3)^3(0.7)+(0.3)^4\)L17
③ 计算\(=0.0837\)∫ 微积分
552命名分布 📌 L15L15 · L09
The distribution of the lifetime in years of a certain brand of lawnmower is uniform on the interval [a, b], where 0 < a < b. Determine the 80th percentile of the lifetime in years of this brand of lawnmower.
(A) \( a + 0.8b \)(B) \( 0.2a + 0.8b \)(C) \( 0.8a + 0.2b \)(D) \( 0.8(b - a) \)(E) \( 0.8(b + a) \)
均匀80分位
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀密度均布区间\(X\sim U[a,b]\)L15
② 分位数按比例定位\(q_{0.8}=a+0.8(b-a)\)L09
③ 化简\(=0.2a+0.8b\)∫ 微积分
553命名分布L20 · L09
A random variable X is exponentially distributed with 40th percentile equal to \( 4 \ln\left(\frac{5}{3}\right) \). Calculate the median of X.
(A) \( 5 \ln\left(\frac{5}{3}\right) \)(B) \( 4 \ln 2 \)(C) \( 5 \ln\left(\frac{25}{12}\right) \)(D) 4(E) 5
指数分位转中位
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数CDF建方程\(0.4=1-e^{-4\ln(5/3)/\beta}\)L20
② 指数对数恒等式解参数\(0.6=(5/3)^{-4/\beta}=(0.6)^{4/\beta}\Rightarrow\beta=4\)∫ 微积分
③ 解中位数方程\(0.5=e^{-M/4}\Rightarrow M=4\ln2\)L09
554命名分布L15 · L08
The base fare charged by airlines for flights from City A to City B is uniformly distributed on [100, 225]. In addition to the base fare, the airlines charge a processing fee of 15 and a 30% fuel surcharge applied to the base fare. Calculate the standard deviation of the total charge for a flight from City A to City B.
(A) 10.8(B) 36.1(C) 41.1(D) 46.9(E) 61.9
均匀线性变换SD
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 线性变换方差\(\mathrm{Var}(C)=\mathrm{Var}(15+1.3X)=1.3^2\mathrm{Var}(X)\)L08
② 均匀方差公式\(\mathrm{Var}(X)=\frac{(225-100)^2}{12}\Rightarrow\mathrm{Var}(C)=2200.52\)L15
③ 开方求标差\(SD(C)=\sqrt{2200.52}=46.91\)L08
555线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
The amount of beverage filled into each bottle by a bottling machine is independently and normally distributed with mean 12.0 ounces and standard deviation \( \sigma \) ounces. Approximately 20% of all 24-bottle cases contain more than 290 ounces of total beverage. Calculate \( \sigma \).
(A) 0.01(B) 0.10(C) 0.49(D) 2.38(E) 10.10
正态24瓶和解σ
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立正态和的参数\(Y=\sum_{i=1}^{24}X_i\sim N(288,\ 24\sigma^2)\)L21
② 标准化建方程\(P(Z>\tfrac{290-288}{\sqrt{24\sigma^2}})=0.20\)L21
③ 查表定z值\(\tfrac{2}{\sqrt{24}\sigma}=0.84162\)L21
④ 解σ\(\sigma=0.4851\)∫ 微积分
556命名分布L21 · L09
The profit on an individual insurance policy is normally distributed. The 60th percentile of the profit is 1000. The 80th percentile of the profit is 2000. Calculate the 95th percentile, to the nearest 100, of the profit.
(A) 2300(B) 2400(C) 2700(D) 3400(E) 3900
正态分位外推
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 60分位标准化方程\(\tfrac{1000-\mu}{\sigma}=0.253347\)L21
② 80分位标准化方程\(\tfrac{2000-\mu}{\sigma}=0.841621\)L21
③ 两式相除解参数\(\mu=569.338,\ \sigma=1699.89\)∫ 微积分
④ 95分位求N\(N=569.338+1.644854(1699.89)=3365\)L09
557命名分布L20
A customer just purchased a refrigerator with a five-year warranty. The number of years before the refrigerator malfunctions is exponentially distributed. The probability that the refrigerator malfunctions before the five-year warranty expires is 0.40. Calculate the standard deviation of the number of years before the refrigerator malfunctions.
(A) 0.10(B) 3.13(C) 5.46(D) 9.79(E) 12.50
指数SD等均值
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数CDF建方程\(0.40=P(X<5)=1-e^{-5/\beta}\)L20
② 解均值\(\beta=\tfrac{-5}{\ln0.60}=9.78808\)∫ 微积分
③ 指数标差等于均值\(SD=\beta=9.78808\)L20
558命名分布L18
The probability is 0.45 that a mouse exposed to a certain disease will develop it. The events of individual mice developing the disease are all mutually independent. Calculate the probability that the tenth mouse exposed to the disease will be the third to catch it.
(A) 0.0014(B) 0.0499(C) 0.1110(D) 0.1165(E) 0.1665
负二项第十第三
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别负二项分布\(X=\mathrm{第3次成功所需次数},\ p=0.45\)L18
② 负二项pmf\(P(X=10)=\binom92(0.45)^3(0.55)^7\)L18
③ 计算\(=0.049943\)∫ 微积分
559命名分布L20
Brand A air conditioning units have twice the expected life span of Brand B air conditioning units. The life span for each brand is exponentially distributed. The probability that a Brand A air conditioning unit lasts at least 15 years is 0.046656. Calculate the probability that a Brand B air conditioning unit lasts at least 5 years.
(A) 0.01(B) 0.03(C) 0.07(D) 0.13(E) 0.18
指数参数减半
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 品牌A生存函数解均值\(e^{-15/\beta}=0.046656\Rightarrow\beta=4.894038\)L20
② 品牌B均值减半\(\beta_B=0.5\beta=2.447019\)L20
③ 求B的生存概率\(P(X_2>5)=e^{-5/2.447019}=0.1296\)L20
560保险赔付L20
Homeowner losses due to fire are exponentially distributed with mean 6. Homeowners insurance policy A reimburses up to a maximum of \( m \) for a loss due to fire. Homeowners insurance policy B, with a different premium, reimburses up to a maximum of \( m + 2 \) for a loss due to fire. Let \( p_A \) be the probability that a loss due to fire is partially unreimbursed under policy A. Let \( p_B \) be the probability that a loss due to fire is partially unreimbursed under policy B. Determine \( \frac{p_B}{p_A} \).
(A) \( e^{-12} \)(B) \( e^{-1/3} \)(C) \( \frac{1 - e^{-(m+2)/6}}{1 - e^{-m/6}} \)(D) \( \frac{1 - e^{-6m-12}}{1 - e^{-6m}} \)(E) \( \frac{m}{m+2} \)
超上限概率比
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写指数生存函数\(P(X>x)=e^{-x/6}\)L20
② 写两人生存概率\(p_A=e^{-m/6},\ p_B=e^{-(m+2)/6}\)L20
③ 取比值化简\(\tfrac{p_B}{p_A}=e^{-[(m+2)-m]/6}=e^{-1/3}\)∫ 微积分
561组合计数L02
From a collection of eight keys, Door A can only be opened with one key and Door B can only be opened with one other key. Calculate the probability that among four randomly selected keys, exactly three keys will open neither door.
(A) 0.03(B) 0.11(C) 0.29(D) 0.42(E) 0.57
超几何选钥匙
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 总选法组合数\(\binom{8}{4}=70\)L02
② 恰一把能开的选法\(\binom{2}{1}\binom{6}{3}=2\times 20=40\)L02
③ 古典概型求比值\(P=\dfrac{40}{70}=0.5714\)L02
562命名分布L15 · L03
The damage from an accident at a certain intersection follows a uniform distribution on the interval \( [a, b] \), where \( 0 < a < 3 \). The probability that the damage is greater than 4, given that it is greater than 3, is 0.90. The probability that the damage is greater than 4, given that it is less than 11, is 0.70. Calculate the unconditional probability that the damage is greater than 4.
(A) 0.70(B) 0.75(C) 0.80(D) 0.85(E) 0.90
均匀条件解区间
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀尾概率写成长度比\(P(X>t)=\dfrac{b-t}{b-a}\)L15
② 第一条件解出 b\(\dfrac{b-4}{b-3}=0.9\Rightarrow b=13\)L03
③ 第二条件解出 a\(\dfrac{7}{11-a}=0.7\Rightarrow a=1\)L03
④ 代回求目标概率\(P(X>4)=\dfrac{13-4}{13-1}=0.75\)L15
563保险赔付L20 · L07
Losses under a boat insurance policy are exponentially distributed with mean \( \frac{400}{\ln 2} \). For each loss, the claim payment is the amount of the loss, up to a maximum of 1000. Calculate the expected value of a claim payment.
(A) 298(B) 367(C) 400(D) 475(E) 577
指数限额期望
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 赔付建模为封顶损失\(Y=\min(X,1000),\ \beta=400/\ln 2\)L07
② 生存捷径求封顶期望\(E[Y]=\int_0^{1000}e^{-x/\beta}dx=\beta(1-e^{-1000/\beta})\)L07
③ 代入指数参数求值\(\dfrac{400}{\ln 2}(1-e^{-2.5\ln 2})=475.06\)L20
564条件与贝叶斯L03 · L20
The length of an exchange student's phone call depends on whether the call is domestic or international. Lengths of domestic calls are exponentially distributed with a mean of 0.75 minutes, and lengths of international calls are exponentially distributed with a mean of 0.50 minutes. Each call has a 40% probability of being a domestic call and a 60% probability of being an international call. Calculate the probability that the length of a randomly selected phone call by the student is between one and three minutes.
(A) 0.178(B) 0.200(C) 0.222(D) 0.250(E) 0.378
混合指数全概率
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 国内件区间概率\(e^{-1/0.75}-e^{-3/0.75}=0.245281\)L20
② 国际件区间概率\(e^{-1/0.5}-e^{-3/0.5}=0.132857\)L20
③ 全概率按类型加权\(0.4(0.245281)+0.6(0.132857)=0.17783\)L04
565数字特征L08
The proportion of cotton plants on a large farm infested with boll weevils is modeled by a continuous random variable with probability density function \( f(x) = 20x^3(1-x) \) for \( 0 \le x \le 1 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the standard deviation of the proportion of cotton plants on the farm that are infested with boll weevils.
(A) 0.032(B) 0.178(C) 0.476(D) 0.690(E) 0.959
beta型密度SD,无专章
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 密度积分求均值\(E[X]=\int_0^1 20x^4(1-x)dx=2/3\)L07
② 求二阶矩\(E[X^2]=\int_0^1 20x^5(1-x)dx=10/21\)L08
③ 方差开方得标准差\(\sigma=\sqrt{10/21-(2/3)^2}=\sqrt{2/63}=0.178\)L08
566命名分布L19 · L03
The annual number of claims per policy for a class of insurance policies is modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 1.20. A policy is randomly selected from those policies that had at least one claim in the past year. Calculate the probability that the selected policy had at least three claims in the past year.
(A) 0.10(B) 0.12(C) 0.15(D) 0.17(E) 0.20
泊松截断条件
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率化为比值\(P(X\ge 3\mid X\ge 1)=\dfrac{P(X\ge 3)}{P(X\ge 1)}\)L03
② 泊松互补求分子\(1-e^{-1.2}(1+1.2+\tfrac{1.2^2}{2})=0.120513\)L19
③ 泊松互补求分母\(1-e^{-1.2}=0.698806\)L19
④ 相除得答案\(0.120513/0.698806=0.17246\)∫ 微积分
567命名分布L17 · L08
A company tests five batteries. Each battery has a probability \( p \) of being defective, where \( p \) is a constant. The events of different batteries being defective are mutually independent. The number of defective batteries out of the five batteries is a random variable, \( N \), where \( \mathrm{E}(N^2) = 1.80 \). Calculate \( \mathrm{Var}(N) \).
(A) 0.80(B) 0.98(C) 1.15(D) 1.67(E) 1.80
二项二阶矩解p
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二阶矩=方差+均值方\(E[X^2]=np(1-p)+(np)^2\)L08
② 代二项参数列方程\(5p+20p^2=1.80\)L17
③ 解二次取正根\(p=\dfrac{-5+13}{40}=0.20\)∫ 微积分
④ 回代求二项方差\(np(1-p)=5(0.2)(0.8)=0.80\)L17
568命名分布L21 · L03
Policyholders of a particular type of insurance policy will have either zero claims or one claim. The probability of zero claims is 20%. If a claim is received, the claim size follows a normal distribution with mean 50,000 and standard deviation \( c \). The probability that a randomly selected policyholder has a claim exceeding 55,000 is 0.1837. Calculate \( c \).
(A) 5546(B) 6125(C) 6490(D) 6756(E) 7120
零膨胀正态解σ
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 乘法规则拆条件概率\(0.8\,P(Z>\tfrac{5000}{c})=0.1837\)L03
② 剥出正态尾概率\(P(Z>\tfrac{5000}{c})=0.229625\)L21
③ 反查 z 值解参数\(\tfrac{5000}{c}=0.74008\Rightarrow c=6756\)L21
569命名分布L17
An insurance policy covers a house for ten calendar years for losses due to hailstorm and theft. Only one loss due to hailstorm and only one loss due to theft are covered by the policy during any one calendar year. For the \( k \)th calendar year let \( H_k \) be the event that the policy incurs a loss due to hailstorm and let \( T_k \) be the event that the policy incurs a loss due to theft. Suppose that the events \( H_1, \ldots, H_{10}, T_1, \ldots, T_{10} \) are mutually independent, and that \( P[H_k] = 0.2 \), \( P[T_k] = 0.1 \), for all \( k \). Calculate the probability that the total number of hailstorm and theft losses covered by the policy during the ten calendar years is less than two.
(A) 0.17(B) 0.23(C) 0.77(D) 0.80(E) 0.83
两组独立和小于二
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两类索赔各建二项\(T\sim B(10,0.1),\ H\sim B(10,0.2)\)L17
② 算各自 0、1 次概率\(P(T=0)=0.9^{10},\ P(T=1)=10(0.1)(0.9)^9\) 等L17
③ 独立拆分事件相乘\(P(T+H<2)=P_{00}+P_{01}+P_{10}\)L11
④ 数值合计\(0.037441+0.093601+0.041600\approx 0.172635\)∫ 微积分
570组合计数L02
A homeowner hires a moving company to transport ten pieces of electronic equipment to a new home. Each piece is equally likely to be damaged during the move, and the event of damage to any one piece is independent of the events of damage to the other pieces. The homeowner fully insures two of these pieces, partially insures three of them, and leaves the other five pieces uninsured. During the move, three pieces are damaged. Calculate the probability that at least one damaged piece is fully insured and at least one damaged piece is partially insured.
(A) 0.242(B) 0.250(C) 0.325(D) 0.378(E) 0.400
超几何容斥受损
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 总抽法组合数\(\binom{10}{3}=120\)L02
② 枚举三类合规组合\(2\cdot 3\cdot 5+2\cdot 3\cdot 1+1\cdot 3\cdot 1=39\)L02
③ 古典概型求比值\(P=39/120=0.325\)L02
571数字特征 📌 L08L08
Let \( X \) be a continuous random variable with density function \( f(x) = \frac{|x|}{10} \) for \( -2 < x < 4 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate \( \mathrm{Var}(X) \).
(A) 0.25(B) 2.52(C) 3.32(D) 4.13(E) 4.93
密度积分求方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 分段密度积分求均值\(E(X)=\tfrac{1}{10}\int_{-2}^0 -x^2dx+\tfrac{1}{10}\int_0^4 x^2dx=56/30\)L07
② 求二阶矩\(E(X^2)=\tfrac{16}{40}+\tfrac{256}{40}=272/40\)L08
③ 方差公式\(Var=\tfrac{272}{40}-(\tfrac{56}{30})^2=3.3156\)L08
572条件与贝叶斯L04 · L19
In a large city, 40% of the intersections are safe, while all others are dangerous. The numbers of accidents occurring annually at individual safe and dangerous intersections are Poisson distributed with means 0.5 and 1.0, respectively. No accidents occurred during 2004 at Thirty-Fourth Street and Vine Street, an intersection within the city. Calculate the probability that Thirty-Fourth Street and Vine is a safe intersection.
(A) 0.24(B) 0.40(C) 0.46(D) 0.52(E) 0.62
贝叶斯泊松路口
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 贝叶斯反求司机类型\(P(safe\mid 0)=\dfrac{P(0\mid safe)P(safe)}{\sum P(0\mid\cdot)P(\cdot)}\)L04
② 泊松零概率代入\(P(0\mid safe)=e^{-0.5},\ P(0\mid dang)=e^{-1}\)L19
③ 数值计算\(\dfrac{0.4e^{-0.5}}{0.4e^{-0.5}+0.6e^{-1}}=0.52\)∫ 微积分
573命名分布L19 · L08
A company insures 40,000 drivers. The annual number of auto accidents for individual drivers is modeled by mutually independent Poisson random variables with mean 0.16. Calculate the coefficient of variation for the total annual number of auto accidents for all 40,000 drivers.
(A) 0.01(B) 0.16(C) 0.40(D) 1.00(E) 2.50
泊松和变异系数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 总期望=人数×单人\(E=40000\times 0.16=6400\)L07
② 独立求和方差相加\(Var=40000\times 0.16=6400\)L08
③ 变异系数定义\(CV=\dfrac{\sqrt{6400}}{6400}=0.0125\)L08
574离散联合L11 · L08
A gardener models his strawberry (\( S \)) / blueberry (\( B \)) harvest with the following joint probability distribution. Note that three of the entries are smudged and cannot be read. B: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 | S = 1: 0.07, 0.06, 0.06, 0.05, 0.01 | S = 2: 0.07, 0.10, 0.08, 0.05, 0.03 | S = 3: 0.04, 0.05, 0.06, 0.05, 0.04 | S = 4: 0.01, 0.02, ?, ?, ? Calculate the variance of the strawberry harvest.
(A) 1.03(B) 1.04(C) 1.07(D) 1.09(E) Cannot be determined based on information provided.
边缘方差表缺格
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 离散 pmf 求期望\(E(S)=0.25+0.66+0.72+0.72=2.35\)L07
② 求二阶矩\(E(S^2)=0.25+1.32+2.16+2.88=6.61\)L08
③ 方差公式\(Var(S)=6.61-2.35^2=1.0875\)L08
575线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
An insurer's quarterly profits are independent and normally distributed with mean 8 and standard deviation 24. A quarterly loss counts as a negative profit. Let \( Z \) represent the standard normal random variable. Determine the probability that the insurer makes an overall positive profit in a given four-quarter period.
(A) \( P[Z > -3.00] \)(B) \( P[Z > -1.50] \)(C) \( P[Z > -0.67] \)(D) \( P[Z > -0.33] \)(E) \( P[Z > -0.17] \)
四季正态和为正
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立季度和的均值\(\mu=4\times 8=32\)L07
② 独立方差相加\(\sigma^2=4\times 24^2=2304\)L08
③ 正态和标准化\(P(X>0)=P(Z>\tfrac{0-32}{\sqrt{2304}})=P(Z>-0.67)\)L21
576命名分布L15 · L03
A light bulb's lifetime in months is uniformly distributed on [0, 40]. Let \( a \) be a positive real number less than 30. The probability that the light bulb fails within 30 months, given that it is working after \( a \) months, equals 0.60. Calculate the value of \( a \).
(A) 6(B) 12(C) 15(D) 16(E) 18
均匀条件求a
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率写成比值\(0.6=\dfrac{P(aa)}\)L03
② 均匀化为长度比\(\dfrac{30-a}{40-a}=0.6\)L15
③ 解线性方程\(24-0.6a=30-a\Rightarrow a=15\)∫ 微积分
577线性组合与CLTL22 · L21
A homeowners insurance company pays claims only for thefts and fires. This year, the company's total theft losses are normally distributed with mean 100 and standard deviation 40. The company's total fire losses are normally distributed with mean 150 and standard deviation 30. Theft losses are independent of fire losses. Calculate the coefficient of variation for the company's combined theft and fire losses this year.
(A) 0.20(B) 0.28(C) 0.30(D) 0.40(E) 0.60
正态和变异系数
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 和的期望相加\(E(X+Y)=100+150=250\)L07
② 独立方差相加\(Var=40^2+30^2=2500,\ SD=50\)L08
③ 变异系数\(CV=50/250=0.20\)L08
578线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
An insurance company offers two kinds of insurance: automobile insurance and homeowners insurance. This year, the company's profit from automobile insurance is normally distributed with mean 200 and standard deviation 400. The company's profit from homeowners insurance is normally distributed with mean 400 and standard deviation 300. The two profits are independent. Let \( Z \) represent the standard normal random variable. Determine the probability that the company's overall profit this year is positive.
(A) \( P[Z > -1.83] \)(B) \( P[Z > -1.20] \)(C) \( P[Z > -0.86] \)(D) \( P[Z > -0.83] \)(E) \( P[Z > -0.50] \)
正态和标准化
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 和的期望\(E(X+Y)=200+400=600\)L07
② 独立方差相加开方\(SD=\sqrt{400^2+300^2}=500\)L08
③ 正态和标准化\(P(X+Y>0)=P(Z>\tfrac{0-600}{500})=P(Z>-1.2)\)L21
579单变量基础L05 · L03
The time \( T \), in years, a fuse lasts is a random variable with density function \( g(t) = te^{-t} \) for \( t > 0 \), and \( g(t) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the probability that a fuse lasts at most two years, given that it lasts at least one year.
(A) 0.061(B) 0.330(C) 0.448(D) 0.736(E) 0.807
gamma密度条件,无专章
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率化为比值\(P(T<2\mid T>1)=\dfrac{P(11)}\)L03
② 分部积分求原函数\(\int te^{-t}dt=-(t+1)e^{-t}\)∫ 微积分
③ 代限相除\(\dfrac{2e^{-1}-3e^{-2}}{2e^{-1}}=1-\tfrac{3}{2}e^{-1}=0.4482\)∫ 微积分
580线性组合与CLT 📌 L08L22
Let \( X_1, X_2, X_3, X_4 \) be independent observations of a random variable with mean 10 and standard deviation 3. Calculate the variance of \( 3X_1 - X_2 - X_3 - X_4 \).
(A) 27(B) 36(C) 54(D) 81(E) 108
独立线性组合方差
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立消去协方差项\(Cov(X_i,X_j)=0\ (i\ne j)\)L13
② 系数平方提出方差\(Var(3X_1-X_2-X_3-X_4)=9Var(X_1)+\sum Var(X_i)\)L08
③ 代值求和\(9(9)+9+9+9=108\)∫ 微积分
581协方差相关L13 · L11
The following table gives the joint probability function of two random variables \( X \) and \( Y \): X: 0, 1, 2 | Y = 0: 1/6, 0, 1/2 | Y = 1: 0, 1/3, 0 Calculate \( \mathrm{Cov}(X, Y) \).
(A) -1/9(B) 0(C) 1/18(D) 1/9(E) 2/9
表格求协方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 边缘分布求各期望\(E(X)=4/3,\ E(Y)=1/3\)L11
② 联合 pmf 求积期望\(E(XY)=2\cdot 0\cdot\tfrac12+1\cdot 1\cdot\tfrac13=1/3\)L12
③ 协方差公式\(Cov=\tfrac13-\tfrac43\cdot\tfrac13=-\tfrac19\)L13
582线性组合与CLT 📌 L08L22
The annual amount a travel insurance company pays for claims has standard deviation 3. The 52 weekly amounts the company pays for claims are independent and have the same standard deviation. Calculate the standard deviation of each of these weekly amounts.
(A) \( \frac{3}{52^2} \)(B) \( \frac{3}{52} \)(C) \( \sqrt{\frac{3}{52}} \)(D) \( \frac{3}{\sqrt{52}} \)(E) \( 3\sqrt{52} \)
方差均分52周
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 年方差=标差平方\(Var_{year}=3^2=9\)L08
② 独立周和方差均摊\(9=52\,Var_{week}\Rightarrow Var_{week}=9/52\)L08
③ 开方得周标差\(SD=\sqrt{9/52}=3/\sqrt{52}\)∫ 微积分
583命名分布L15 · L03
Claim amounts from accidents in an amusement park are uniformly distributed on an interval. The probability that a randomly selected claim amount is less than 12 is 0.50. The probability that a randomly selected claim amount exceeds 6 is 0.875. Calculate the probability that a randomly selected claim amount is less than 10, given that it exceeds 6.
(A) 2/9(B) 1/4(C) 2/7(D) 3/8(E) 3/7
均匀条件区间
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两条件写长度比\(\dfrac{12-a}{b-a}=0.5,\ \dfrac{6-a}{b-a}=0.125\)L15
② 两式相除消 b-a\(\dfrac{12-a}{6-a}=4\Rightarrow a=4\)∫ 微积分
③ 回代解 b\(0.5=\dfrac{12-4}{b-4}\Rightarrow b=20\)∫ 微积分
④ 条件概率求比\(\dfrac{P(66)}=\dfrac{4/16}{14/16}=2/7\)L03
584命名分布L19
The number of thefts in any year a warehouse owner experiences is modeled by a Poisson distribution. In each year, the probability of at least one theft is 0.10, and the yearly number of thefts are independent. Calculate the variance of the total number of thefts the owner experiences in the next 15 years.
(A) 0.11(B) 0.41(C) 1.35(D) 1.50(E) 1.58
泊松15年方差
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 互补事件解年参数\(0.10=1-e^{-\lambda}\Rightarrow\lambda=0.105361\)L19
② 独立泊松和仍泊松\(S\sim Poisson(15\lambda)\)L19
③ 泊松方差=均值\(Var(S)=15\lambda=1.580408\)L19
585单变量基础L05 · L03
The random variable \( Y \) has density function \( f(y) = \frac{y}{6} - \frac{y^2}{36} \) for \( 0 < y < 6 \), and \( f(y) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate \( P[1 < Y < 3 \mid 2 < Y < 4] \).
(A) 0.111(B) 0.241(C) 0.481(D) 0.500(E) 0.885
密度条件概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率化为比值\(P(1L03
② 密度积分求两概率\(\int(\tfrac{y}{6}-\tfrac{y^2}{36})dy=\tfrac{y^2}{12}-\tfrac{y^3}{108}\)L05
③ 相除得答案\(0.240741/0.481481=0.5\)∫ 微积分
586保险赔付L20
An insurance company sells an automobile policy that pays 80% of any losses that exceed the deductible of 500. The loss amounts (in units of 1000) follow an exponential distribution with mean 6. Calculate the probability that the policy payment on a randomly selected loss exceeds 5000.
(A) 0.024(B) 0.318(C) 0.325(D) 0.675(E) 0.682
免赔比例赔付尾
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 建共保免赔赔付式\(Y=0.8(L-0.5),\ L>0.5\)L05
② 赔付事件反解损失\(0.8(L-0.5)>5\iff L>6.75\)∫ 微积分
③ 指数生存函数\(P(L>6.75)=e^{-6.75/6}=0.3247\)L20
587离散联合L11 · L08
Once each morning and once each afternoon, the driver of a delivery truck is assigned to a route with a length that depends upon the items being delivered. The morning route may be 5, 10 or 40 miles. The afternoon route may be 0, 5 or 10 miles. The probabilities with which the pairs of routes have been assigned are: Length of Afternoon Route (miles): 0, 5, 10 | Morning 5: 0, \( 2p \), \( 3p \) | Morning 10: 0, \( 2p \), 0 | Morning 40: \( q \), 0, 0 The lengths of the assigned afternoon routes have a mean of 6 miles. Calculate the variance of the length of an afternoon route.
(A) 11.0(B) 12.0(C) 16.5(D) 26.5(E) 42.0
表格解pq边缘方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 概率归一列式\(2p+3p+2p+q=7p+q=1\)L05
② 期望条件解参数\(5(4p)+10(3p)=50p=6\Rightarrow p=0.12,\ q=0.16\)L07
③ 方差定义式求值\(36(0.16)+1(0.48)+16(0.36)=12\)L08
588线性组合与CLTL22 · L20
The lifetimes of light bulbs are independent and exponentially distributed with common mean 1000 hours. A lamp has a single bulb and is continuously on. Each light bulb is replaced immediately after it burns out. Calculate the standard deviation of the time, in hours, until the failure of the fifth bulb.
(A) 71(B) 158(C) 1000(D) 2236(E) 5000
五指数和SD,gamma无专章
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数方差=均值平方\(Var=1000^2=10^6\)L20
② 独立五灯方差相加\(Var_{sum}=5\times 10^6\)L08
③ 开方得标准差\(\sqrt{5\times 10^6}=2236\)∫ 微积分
589保险赔付L19 · L07
In a one-year period, the number of fires that occur in buildings insured by ABC insurance is Poisson distributed with mean 12. The resulting losses are independent random variables that are also independent of the number of losses, each having density function \( f(x) = \frac{8-x}{32} \) for \( 0 < x < 8 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise. The payment for any loss is equal to the amount of the loss in excess of a deductible of 2. Calculate the expected total payment that ABC must make for losses due to fire that occur in a one-year period.
(A) 8.0(B) 13.5(C) 16.5(D) 30.0(E) 32.0
复合泊松免赔期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 建免赔期望积分\(E=12\int_2^8 (x-2)\dfrac{8-x}{32}dx\)L07
② 展开被积式\(\tfrac{12}{32}\int_2^8 (10x-x^2-16)dx\)∫ 微积分
③ 求原函数代限\(\tfrac{12}{32}(21.333+14.667)=13.50\)∫ 微积分
590命名分布L18
Each of three people is holding a biased coin that has probability 0.25 of landing heads. They toss the coins simultaneously. After each round of tosses, if the outcomes are all heads or all tails, they will continue to another round; otherwise, they will stop. Calculate the probability that there will be exactly five rounds of tosses.
(A) 0.0003(B) 0.0029(C) 0.0206(D) 0.0438(E) 0.1030
几何恰五轮停
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立相乘算单轮不结束\(0.25^3+0.75^3=0.4375\)L03
② 互补得单轮结束概率\(1-0.4375=0.5625\)L01
③ 几何分布第5轮首成\(0.4375^4\times 0.5625=0.020608\)L18
591命名分布L21 · L09
In a given year, a manufacturer's profit from selling warranties is normally distributed with mean 20 and variance 16. Calculate the interval, centered at the mean, containing 25% of the probability associated with a single yearly profit.
(A) (12.2, 27.8)(B) (14.9, 25.1)(C) (16.0, 24.0)(D) (17.3, 22.7)(E) (18.7, 21.3)
正态中心25%区间
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 对称区间标准化\(0.25=P(-0.25cL21
② 对称性化单尾\(P(Z<0.25c)=0.625\)L21
③ 反查分位数解 c\(0.25c=0.3186\Rightarrow c=1.2744\)L09
④ 求区间端点\(20\pm 1.2744=[18.7256,\ 21.2744]\)∫ 微积分
592命名分布L17 · L10
A group of 18 patients is tested for diabetes. Each patient independently has a 0.15 probability of testing positive. Calculate the mode of the number of patients in the group who test positive.
(A) 0(B) 1(C) 2(D) 3(E) 4
二项分布众数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 确诊数建二项模型\(X\sim B(18,0.15),\ np=2.7\)L17
② 均值附近逐点试算\(P(1)=0.1704,\ P(2)=0.2556,\ P(3)=0.2406\)L17
③ 单峰性定众数\(\text{mode}=\arg\max P(X=i)=2\)L10
593命名分布L21 · L09
An insurance company's annual profit is normally distributed with mean 39. The 28th percentile of the annual profit is 21. Calculate the percentile associated with an annual profit of 3 for this insurance company.
(A) 4th(B) 6th(C) 8th(D) 10th(E) 12th
正态分位反推
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 已知概率标准化\(0.28=P(Z<\tfrac{21-39}{\sigma})\Rightarrow\tfrac{-18}{\sigma}=-0.5828\)L21
② 解出标准差\(\sigma=30.885\)∫ 微积分
③ 目标概率标准化查表\(P(Z<\tfrac{3-39}{30.885})=P(Z<-1.1656)=0.122\)L21
594组合计数L02
From a standard deck of 52 playing cards, five cards are chosen without replacement. Calculate the probability of obtaining at least two kings, but no aces or jacks.
(A) 0.0174(B) 0.0228(C) 0.0240(D) 0.0298(E) 0.0417
扑克组合分层计数
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按K张数分三类互斥\(P=P(2K)+P(3K)+P(4K),\ \text{均无A/J}\)L01
② 超几何逐类计数\(\binom{4}{2}\binom{8}{0}\binom{40}{3}\) 等三项L02
③ 除总组合求和\(\sum/\binom{52}{5}=0.024025\)L02
595命名分布L15 · L09
The check-out times for customers at a grocery store are modeled by a continuous uniform distribution between 1.1 and 8.6 minutes. The store would like to advertise that "no more than 5% of customers require more than \( y \) minutes to check out." Calculate the minimum value for \( y \).
(A) 1.475(B) 7.125(C) 8.170(D) 8.225(E) 8.545
均匀95分位
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 结账时间建均匀模型\(X\sim U[1.1,\ 8.6]\)L15
② CDF 写成长度比\(P(XL15
③ 令0.95解95分位\(\dfrac{y-1.1}{7.5}=0.95\Rightarrow y=8.225\)L09
596命名分布L21
An insurance company's annual profit is normally distributed. The probability that the annual profit exceeds 3.50 is 0.3264 and the probability that it exceeds 3.62 is 0.2743. Calculate the variance of the insurance company's annual profit.
(A) 0.44(B) 0.64(C) 0.80(D) 1.25(E) 1.56
正态两尾解方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 两概率各自标准化\(\tfrac{3.50-\mu}{\sigma}=0.449876,\ \tfrac{3.62-\mu}{\sigma}=0.599860\)L21
② 两式相除消σ解μ\(\tfrac{3.62-\mu}{3.50-\mu}=1.33339\Rightarrow\mu=3.140061\)∫ 微积分
③ 回代求σ并平方\(\sigma=\tfrac{3.62-3.140061}{0.599860}=0.800085,\ \sigma^2=0.640136\)∫ 微积分
597保险赔付L15 · L07
A theft insurance company offers two policies, A and B. Under each policy, a loss is uniformly distributed on the interval \( [a, 19] \). For a loss under policy A, the deductible is 0 and the expected value of the claim payment is 10. For a loss under policy B, the deductible is 4. Calculate the expected value of the claim payment for a loss under policy B.
(A) 6.00(B) 6.25(C) 7.50(D) 7.89(E) 8.33
均匀免赔期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀均值定下限\(\dfrac{a+19}{2}=10\Rightarrow a=1\)L15
② B保单免赔期望积分\(E=\int_4^{19}(x-4)\tfrac{1}{18}dx\)L07
③ 求值\(\dfrac{15^2-0^2}{36}=6.25\)∫ 微积分
598命名分布L21 · L08
The profit \( X \) on an insurance policy is normally distributed with \( \mathrm{E}(X^2) = 74 \) and \( P[X > 0] = 0.92 \). Calculate the variance of the profit on this policy.
(A) 24.88(B) 30.77(C) 34.50(D) 44.20(E) 62.86
正态矩配尾概率
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二阶矩拆均值方差\(E(X^2)=\mu^2+\sigma^2=74\)L08
② 正概率条件标准化\(\tfrac{0-\mu}{\sigma}=-1.405072\Rightarrow\mu=1.405072\sigma\)L21
③ 联立解方差\(2.974227\sigma^2=74\Rightarrow\sigma^2=24.88\)∫ 微积分
599命名分布L20 · L09
A random variable is exponentially distributed with mean \( \mu \). Determine the difference between the 75th percentile and the 25th percentile of this distribution.
(A) \( \frac{\ln 3}{\mu} \)(B) \( \mu \)(C) \( \mu \ln 2 \)(D) \( \mu \ln 3 \)(E) \( \mu^2 \)
指数分位差μln3
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数CDF设分位方程\(0.75=1-e^{-a/\mu}\)L09
② 取对数解两分位数\(a=-\mu\ln 0.25,\ b=-\mu\ln 0.75\)L20
③ 作差用对数性质化简\(a-b=\mu[\ln 0.75-\ln 0.25]=\mu\ln 3\)∫ 微积分
600命名分布L18 · L05
Hospitalization losses under a certain policy are mutually independent and each has cumulative distribution function \( F(x) = 0 \) for \( x < 0 \); \( F(x) = \frac{x + 15x^2}{16} \) for \( 0 \le x \le 1 \); \( F(x) = 1 \) for \( x > 1 \). For each hospitalization loss, the insurer reimburses up to a maximum of 0.80. Calculate the probability that a policyholder's first partially unreimbursed hospitalization loss occurs on the third hospitalization.
(A) 0.027(B) 0.080(C) 0.128(D) 0.148(E) 0.350
CDF加几何第三次
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① CDF求单次全报概率\(p=F(0.8)=\dfrac{0.8+15(0.8)^2}{16}=0.65\)L05
② 几何型首败在第3次\(P=p^2(1-p)\)L18
③ 数值\(0.65^2\times 0.35=0.147875\)∫ 微积分
601保险赔付L07
Losses due to automobile accidents have a probability density function given by \( f(x) = \frac{3}{1000}\left(\frac{1000}{x}\right)^4 \) for \( x > 1000 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise. An automobile policy has a deductible of 1100. Calculate the expected value of the policy payout for a random loss.
(A) 140(B) 400(C) 413(D) 826(E) 1240
Pareto型免赔期望,无专章
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 建超额赔付期望积分\(E=\int_{1100}^{\infty}(x-1100)\tfrac{3}{1000}(\tfrac{1000}{x})^4 dx\)L07
② 拆成两个幂函数积分\(\int 3(1000)^3x^{-3}dx-\int 3.3(1000)^4x^{-4}dx\)∫ 微积分
③ 代限求值\(1239.67-826.45=413.22\)∫ 微积分
602单变量基础L05
A construction worker experiences up to five accidents this year. (i) The probability of no accidents is three times the probability of exactly one accident. (ii) The probability of exactly one accident is four times the probability of exactly two accidents. (iii) The probability of exactly two accidents is five times the probability of exactly three accidents. The probability of three or fewer accidents is 0.95. Calculate the probability of two or fewer accidents.
(A) 0.71(B) 0.84(C) 0.91(D) 0.94(E) 0.96
离散比值解概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按比例递推各点概率\(P(2)=5p,\ P(1)=20p,\ P(0)=60p\)L05
② 累计概率列方程\(p+5p+20p+60p=86p=0.95\)L05
③ 求两次及以下概率\(85p=85\times\tfrac{0.95}{86}=0.93895\)∫ 微积分
603条件与贝叶斯L04 · L19
A property-casualty insurer sells only homeowners insurance. Among the policies that the company sold, 40% belong to policyholders who have a security system for their houses and 60% belong to those who did not. Assume in any particular year: (i) For any house without a security system, the number of break-ins follows a Poisson distribution, with mean 3. (ii) For any house with a security system, the number of break-ins follows a Poisson distribution, and the probability of no break-ins is three times that for a house without a security system. Calculate the probability that a house has a security system, given that there are exactly two break-ins in a year.
(A) 0.11(B) 0.27(C) 0.40(D) 0.45(E) 0.55
贝叶斯泊松安防
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 零概率关系解λ\(e^{-\lambda}=3e^{-3}\Rightarrow\lambda=3-\ln 3=1.90139\)L19
② 贝叶斯反求有安保\(P(A\mid X=2)=\dfrac{P(X=2\mid A)P(A)}{\sum P(X=2\mid\cdot)P(\cdot)}\)L04
③ 泊松点概率代入\(\tfrac{\lambda^2e^{-\lambda}}{2!}(0.4)\ \text{vs}\ \tfrac{3^2e^{-3}}{2!}(0.6)\)L19
④ 数值\(\dfrac{0.10800}{0.10800+0.13443}=0.44549\)∫ 微积分
604命名分布L19
In a certain region, tornados occur only during the six months from March through August. The number of tornados in each of these six months follows the same Poisson distribution and the number of tornados in different months are mutually independent. The probability that there are no tornados in the six-month period from March through August is 0.008. Calculate the probability that both the months of July and August are tornado-free, given that there was a tornado in June.
(A) 0.20(B) 0.22(C) 0.32(D) 0.57(E) 0.60
泊松月度独立
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 六个月泊松零概率\(e^{-6\lambda}=0.008\)L19
② 开立方得两月零概率\(e^{-2\lambda}=0.008^{1/3}=0.20\)∫ 微积分
③ 区间独立弃六月信息\(P[\text{两月无}]=e^{-2\lambda}(2\lambda)^0/0!=0.20\)L19
605条件与贝叶斯L04 · L20
ElectroUSA is a store that sells portable music players. Ten percent of sales are Brand A and the rest are Brand B. The time, in years, until failure for Brand A is modeled by an exponential distribution with mean 2, while that for Brand B is modeled by an exponential distribution with mean 4. A portable music player sold by ElectroUSA fails for the first time within three years of the purchase date. Calculate the probability that it is Brand A.
(A) 0.08(B) 0.14(C) 0.47(D) 0.60(E) 0.78
贝叶斯指数品牌
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 贝叶斯反求品牌A\(P(A\mid T<3)=\dfrac{P(T<3\mid A)P(A)}{\sum P(T<3\mid\cdot)P(\cdot)}\)L04
② 指数CDF代入\(P(T<3\mid A)=1-e^{-3/2},\ P(T<3\mid B)=1-e^{-3/4}\)L20
③ 数值\(\dfrac{(1-e^{-3/2})0.1}{(1-e^{-3/2})0.1+(1-e^{-3/4})0.9}=0.1406\)∫ 微积分
606离散联合L11 · L14
Along a highway, automobiles are randomly selected for tire inspections. Let \( X \) denote the number of bad front tires and \( Y \) the number of bad rear tires on a randomly selected automobile. The joint distribution of \( X \) and \( Y \) is given by the probability function \( p(x, y) = \frac{(6-x)(3-y)}{58(1 + |x - y|)} \) for \( x = 0, 1, 2 \) and \( y = 0, 1, 2 \), and \( p(x, y) = 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the variance of the number of bad front tires among those automobiles with one bad rear tire.
(A) 7/16(B) 49/100(C) 2/3(D) 7/10(E) 1
离散pmf条件方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 联合表提取条件pmf\(p(x\mid y=1)=\tfrac{12}{40},\tfrac{20}{40},\tfrac{8}{40}\)L06
② 条件期望与二阶矩\(E=\tfrac{36}{40},\ E(X^2\mid y=1)=\tfrac{52}{40}\)L14
③ 条件方差公式\(\tfrac{52}{40}-(\tfrac{36}{40})^2=49/100\)L14
607单变量基础L01
From telephone calls made to a help line, the following statistics are compiled: (i) 20% of the calls last for at least 2 minutes and less than 4 minutes. (ii) 34% of the calls last for at least 3 minutes and less than 5 minutes. (iii) 42% of the calls last for at least 4 minutes and less than 6 minutes. (iv) 38% of the calls last for at least 5 minutes and less than 7 minutes. (v) 28% of the calls last for at least 6 minutes and less than 8 minutes. Calculate the probability that a randomly selected call will last for either at least 2 minutes and less than 3 minutes, or at least 7 minutes and less than 8 minutes.
(A) 12%(B) 18%(C) 24%(D) 28%(E) 30%
区间容斥拆解
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 互斥段拼[2,8)概率\(20\%+42\%+28\%=90\%\)L01
② 互斥段拼[3,7)概率\(34\%+38\%=72\%\)L01
③ 集合差求两端概率\(90\%-72\%=18\%\)L01
608命名分布L17
Six patients independently have the same probability of having a certain disease. The probability that no patient has the disease is ten times the probability that exactly one patient has the disease. The probability that no patient has the disease is \( x \) times the probability that exactly three patients have the disease. Calculate \( x \).
(A) 300(B) 1,000(C) 1,800(D) 6,000(E) 10,800
二项比值解x
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二项比值约去系数\(\dfrac{P(0)}{P(1)}=\tfrac16\cdot\tfrac{1-p}{p}=10\)L17
② 解出赔率比\(\tfrac{1-p}{p}=60\)∫ 微积分
③ 目标比值代入\(x=\dfrac{P(0)}{P(3)}=\tfrac{1}{20}(\tfrac{1-p}{p})^3=\tfrac{60^3}{20}=10800\)L17
609保险赔付 📌 L05L05
Losses under a theft insurance policy have cumulative distribution function \( F(x) = 0 \) for \( x < 0 \); \( F(x) = c(x^2 + x) \) for \( 0 \le x \le 5 \); \( F(x) = 1 \) for \( x > 5 \), where \( c \) is a constant. The policy has a deductible of 3.2 for each loss. Calculate the probability that the insurer will pay something to the policyholder on a given loss.
(A) 0.296(B) 0.360(C) 0.448(D) 0.552(E) 0.704
CDF免赔付概率
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 上界归一定常数\(F(5)=c(5^2+5)=30c=1\Rightarrow c=\tfrac{1}{30}\)L05
② 代入求F(3.2)\(F(3.2)=\tfrac{1}{30}(3.2^2+3.2)=\tfrac{13.44}{30}\)L05
③ 互补得尾概率\(P(X>3.2)=1-\tfrac{13.44}{30}=0.552\)L05
610保险赔付 📌 L15L15 · L07
Losses are uniformly distributed on the interval [0, 2000]. An insurance policy pays the amount of each loss up to a maximum of \( m \). The expected value of the claim payment on a random loss is 910. Calculate \( m \).
(A) 910(B) 1150(C) 1400(D) 1600(E) 1820
均匀限额解m
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 封顶赔付期望分段\(910=\int_0^m\tfrac{x}{2000}dx+m\,P(X>m)\)L07
② 均匀分布代入化简\(\tfrac{m^2}{4000}+\tfrac{m(2000-m)}{2000}=m-\tfrac{m^2}{4000}\)L15
③ 二次方程取合理根\(m^2-4000m+3640000=0\Rightarrow m=1400\ (\text{舍}2600)\)∫ 微积分
611单变量基础 📌 L09L09 · L05
An insurer's loss severity random variable, \( X \), has density function \( f(x) = c(x - 5) \) for \( 5 \le x \le 8 \); \( f(x) = c(11 - x) \) for \( 8 \le x \le 11 \); \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise, where \( c \) is a constant. Calculate the 30th percentile of the loss severity.
(A) 5.47(B) 6.14(C) 6.80(D) 7.06(E) 7.32
三角密度30分位
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 密度归一化解常数\(c[4.5+4.5]=1\Rightarrow c=\tfrac19\)L05
② 左段积分建CDF\(F(x)=\int_5^x\tfrac{y-5}{9}dy=\tfrac{(x-5)^2}{18},\ F(8)=0.5\)L05
③ 30分位落左段解出\(\tfrac{(m-5)^2}{18}=0.3\Rightarrow m=5+\sqrt{5.4}=7.324\)L09
612保险赔付L20 · L07
For a certain product, the time until failure is modeled by a distribution with density function \( f(x) = ce^{-cx} \) for \( x > 0 \), and \( f(x) = 0 \) otherwise, where \( c \) is a constant. The median time until failure is 10 years. The product has a warranty that provides a payment of 35 if failure occurs in the first 5 years, 25 if failure occurs after 5 years, but within 7.5 years, and 0 if failure occurs after 7.5 years. Calculate the expected payment under the warranty.
(A) 13.06(B) 17.13(C) 20.84(D) 24.58(E) 27.56
指数分段赔付期望
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 半概率条件解参数\(1-e^{-10c}=0.5\Rightarrow c=\tfrac{\ln 2}{10}=0.069315\)L20
② 分段成本写成期望\(35F(5)+25[F(7.5)-F(5)]\)L07
③ 指数CDF代入求值\(35(1-0.70711)+25(0.70711-0.5946)=13.06\)∫ 微积分
613命名分布L19
The annual numbers of accidents at two construction sites are each Poisson distributed. The probability of no accidents at the second construction site is 1.1 times this probability at the first construction site. The standard deviation of the annual number of accidents at the first construction site is 1.50. Calculate the standard deviation of the annual number of accidents at the second construction site.
(A) 1.28(B) 1.36(C) 1.40(D) 1.47(E) 1.65
泊松零概率比
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 零概率比例关系\(e^{-\lambda_2}=1.1e^{-\lambda_1}\)L19
② 泊松SD反推λ1\(\sqrt{\lambda_1}=1.5\Rightarrow\lambda_1=2.25\)L19
③ 取对数解λ2\(\lambda_2=(1.5)^2-\ln 1.1\)∫ 微积分
④ 方差开方得SD\(\sqrt{2.25-\ln 1.1}=1.46789\)L19
614线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
An insurance company sells policies for two years. The company's profit in the first year is normally distributed with mean 660 and standard deviation 1100. The company makes adjustments in the second year. The company's profit in the second year is normally distributed with mean \( \mu \) and standard deviation 2640. Assume that the annual profits are independent. The probability that the company earns a positive overall profit in the two-year period is 0.8643. Calculate \( \mu \).
(A) 1320(B) 1940(C) 2486(D) 2740(E) 3454
两年正态解μ
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立两年方差相加\(\sigma=\sqrt{1100^2+2640^2}=2860\)L08
② 盈利概率标准化\(P(Z>\tfrac{0-(660+\mu)}{2860})=0.8643\)L21
③ 反查z解第二年均值\(\tfrac{-(660+\mu)}{2860}=-1.099844\Rightarrow\mu=2485.55\)L21
615命名分布L19
A taxicab company purchases an insurance policy that covers damages from car accidents. The number of accidents on each day is Poisson distributed with mean \( \lambda \), and the number of accidents on different days are mutually independent. The expected number of accidents each week is 63. Calculate the probability that the number of accidents in one day is two or more standard deviations below the expected number of accidents in one day.
(A) 0.006(B) 0.021(C) 0.116(D) 0.156(E) 0.207
泊松两倍SD下侧
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立日均值折算\(E(D)=63/7=9\)L19
② 泊松方差=均值\(Var(D)=9,\ SD(D)=3\)L19
③ 低于均值两个SD事件\(P(D\le 9-2\times 3)=P(D\le 3)\)∫ 微积分
④ 泊松点概率累加\(\sum_{k=0}^{3}\tfrac{e^{-9}9^k}{k!}=0.021226\)L19
616命名分布L15
Two random number generators, labeled C and D, are used to select numbers between 0 and 10. Generator C uses the continuous uniform distribution on [0, 10]. Generator D uses the discrete uniform distribution on the integers 0 through 10. Calculate the absolute value of the difference between the standard deviation of the selection using C and the standard deviation of the selection using D.
(A) 0.00(B) 0.02(C) 0.28(D) 0.50(E) 1.67
连续离散均匀SD
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 连续均匀方差公式\(Var(C)=\tfrac{(10-0)^2}{12}=8.3333,\ SD=2.8868\)L15
② 离散均匀均值二阶矩\(E(D)=5,\ E(D^2)=35\)L08
③ 离散方差与SD\(Var(D)=35-25=10,\ SD=3.1623\)L08
④ 求绝对差\(|2.8868-3.1623|=0.2755\)∫ 微积分
617离散联合L11 · L14
A policyholder owns two properties and has hurricane insurance on both properties. One property is located in Texas. The other property is located in Florida. Let \( T \) be the number of hurricane claims in a 5-year period for the Texas property, and let \( F \) be the number of hurricane claims in a 5-year period for the Florida property. The joint probability function for \( T \) and \( F \) is given in the following table. Number of Hurricane Claims in 5-year period — Florida: 0, 1, 2, 3 | Texas 0: 0.40, 0.14, 0.04, 0.02 | Texas 1: 0.16, 0.08, 0.04, 0.02 | Texas 2: 0.04, 0.03, 0.02, 0.01 Calculate \( \mathrm{Var}(T \mid F = 1) \).
(A) 0.18(B) 0.24(C) 0.45(D) 0.49(E) 0.80
表格条件方差
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 提取条件pmf\(p(t\mid F=1)=0.56,\ 0.32,\ 0.12\)L06
② 条件期望与二阶矩\(E(T\mid F=1)=0.56,\ E(T^2\mid F=1)=0.80\)L14
③ 条件方差公式\(0.80-0.56^2=0.4864\)L14
618命名分布 📌 L15L15 · L03
The time in days, \( X \), that an individual suffers from a common cold is continuous and uniformly distributed on \( [a, b] \). The mean of \( X \) is 8.50, and the variance of \( X \) is 0.75. Calculate the probability that a person who has suffered from a common cold for the past 7.5 days will continue to suffer from that cold for at least an additional 1.5 days.
(A) 0.33(B) 0.40(C) 0.50(D) 0.60(E) 0.83
均匀矩解区间条件
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀均值方差联立\(\tfrac{a+b}{2}=8.5,\ \tfrac{(b-a)^2}{12}=0.75\)L15
② 解出端点\(b-a=3,\ a+b=17\Rightarrow a=7,\ b=10\)∫ 微积分
③ 条件概率长度比\(P(X>9\mid X>7.5)=\tfrac{10-9}{10-7.5}=0.40\)L03
619命名分布L19
The numbers of hits received by a website during the 1st, 2nd, ..., 1440th minutes of a given day are mutually independent Poisson random variables with common mean. The probability that there are exactly four hits during the 1st minute is 54 times the probability that there are no hits during the 1440th minute. Calculate the number of hits the website is expected to receive between in a 60-minute period.
(A) 120(B) 180(C) 240(D) 300(E) 360
泊松比值求60倍
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松点概率比列式\(\tfrac{e^{-\lambda}\lambda^4}{4!}=54e^{-\lambda}\lambda^0\)L19
② 约去公因子解λ\(\lambda^4=54\times 24=1296\Rightarrow\lambda=6\)∫ 微积分
③ 时段缩放求期望\(E[60\text{分钟}]=60\times 6=360\)L19
620单变量基础L01
A broker markets four separate products. The probabilities of selling these products to a client are: Product, Probability | Auto insurance, 0.55 | Homeowners insurance, 0.45 | Health insurance, 0.50 | Life insurance, 0.60 The sales of these products are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that the broker sells more than two products to a client.
(A) 0.27(B) 0.35(C) 0.39(D) 0.57(E) 0.73
独立枚举卖超二
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立相乘枚举恰3成\(P(3)=\sum_{4\text{种情形}}\prod p_i=0.27525\)L11
② 全部4项成功\(P(4)=(0.55)(0.45)(0.50)(0.60)=0.07425\)L11
③ 互斥相加\(P(3\text{ or }4)=0.27525+0.07425=0.3495\)L01
621命名分布L20
The time between automobile accidents at a particularly dangerous intersection is exponentially distributed with mean 15 days. There have been no accidents in the previous 10 days. Calculate the probability that the next accident will occur more than 5 days from now, but less than 25 days from now.
(A) 0.27(B) 0.37(C) 0.47(D) 0.53(E) 0.63
指数无记忆区间
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 无记忆性平移区间\(P(1510)=P(5L20
② 生存函数作差\(P(X<25)-P(X<5)=e^{-5/15}-e^{-25/15}\)L20
③ 数值\(0.71653-0.18888=0.52766\)∫ 微积分
622命名分布L15 · L09
Let X be a random variable representing the time required to fix a flat tire on a car. You are given the following information: i. X is uniform on [a, b]. ii. The 50th percentile of X is 16.36. iii. The standard deviation of X is 7.63. Calculate \( \frac{b}{a} \).
(A) 1.83(B) 2.12(C) 4.58(D) 6.62(E) 9.41
均匀中位SD解ab
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀分布均值方程\( \frac{a+b}{2}=16.36 \)L15
② 均匀分布标准差方程\( \frac{b-a}{\sqrt{12}}=7.63 \)L15
③ 联立解出端点\( b=29.5755,\ a=32.72-b=3.1445 \)∫ 微积分
④ 求端点比值\( b/a=29.5755/3.1445=9.4056 \)∫ 微积分
623命名分布L21 · L09
The scores on a math exam are modeled by a normal distribution. The mode of the exam scores is 56.00, and the 40th percentile is 52.20. Calculate the percentile corresponding to an exam score of 65.50.
(A) 71st(B) 74th(C) 78th(D) 81st(E) 85th
正态众数即均值
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 正态众数即均值\( \mu=56 \)L10
② 已知概率标准化\( P[Z<\frac{52.20-56}{\sigma}]=0.40 \)L21
③ 反查分位解σ\( \frac{-3.8}{\sigma}=-0.253347,\ \sigma=14.999 \)L09
④ 标准化求目标概率\( P[Z<\frac{65.50-56}{14.999}]=P[Z<0.6334]=0.7368 \)L21
624线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
An insurance company offers two kinds of insurance: automobile insurance and homeowners insurance. This year the company's profit from automobile insurance is normally distributed with a mean of 400 and a standard deviation of 200. Also this year, the company's profit from homeowners insurance is normally distributed with a mean of \( -100 \) and a standard deviation of 500. The two profits are independent. Calculate the probability that the company's overall profit this year is positive.
(A) 0.41(B) 0.59(C) 0.63(D) 0.67(E) 0.71
正态和利润为正
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 和的期望线性\( E(X+Y)=400-100=300 \)L07
② 独立方差相加\( Var=200^2+500^2=290000,\ SD=538.5165 \)L08
③ 正态和标准化\( P[X+Y>0]=P[Z>\frac{0-300}{538.5165}]=P[Z>-0.5571]=0.7113 \)L21
625命名分布L19
The number of hurricanes in a year is modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 1. The number of hurricanes in different years are mutually independent. Calculate the probability that there are exactly ten hurricanes in a decade, given that there were exactly eight hurricanes in the first seven years of the decade.
(A) 0.053(B) 0.125(C) 0.130(D) 0.191(E) 0.224
泊松增量独立
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立增量拆条件前7年8次已定,只需后3年恰2次L19
② 定后3年参数\( \lambda=1\times3=3 \)L19
③ 泊松质点概率\( P[E]=\frac{e^{-3}3^2}{2!}=0.2240 \)L19
626命名分布L19
An insurance company sells two types of policies. The annual number of claims for Type 1 policies follows a Poisson distribution with mean \( \lambda_1 \) and the annual number of claims for Type 2 policies follows a Poisson distribution with mean \( \lambda_2 \). The probability that a Type 1 policy has no claims in one year is one-half of the probability that a Type 2 policy has no claims in one year. Let \( V_n \) be the variance in the annual number of claims for a Type n policy. Calculate \( V_1 - V_2 \).
(A) 0.693(B) 0.724(C) 0.766(D) 0.813(E) 0.832
泊松零概率差ln2
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松零索赔概率\( P[N_i=0]=e^{-\lambda_i} \)L19
② 按题设列比例方程\( 2e^{-\lambda_1}=e^{-\lambda_2} \)L19
③ 取对数求差\( \lambda_1-\lambda_2=\ln 2=0.6931 \)∫ 微积分
627离散联合 📌 L12L11 · L14
A policyholder owns a car and a truck. An auto insurer provides coverage on both vehicles. Let X be the number of claims incurred over a five-year period on the car. Let Y be the number of claims incurred over a five-year period on the truck. The probability function of X and Y is shown in the table below: Y: 0, 1, 2, 3 | X = 0: 0.06, 0.10, 0.12, 0.02 | X = 1: 0.08, 0.11, 0.15, 0.06 | X = 2: 0.05, 0.07, 0.05, 0.03 | X = 3: 0.01, 0.02, 0.03, 0.04 Calculate \( \mathrm{E}(Y \mid X < 2) \).
(A) 1.30(B) 1.37(C) 1.41(D) 1.45(E) 1.53
表格条件期望
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求条件事件总概率\( P[X<2]=0.70 \)L11
② 归一化得条件pmf\( p(y|X<2)=\frac{p(\cdot,y)}{0.70} \Rightarrow 0.20,0.30,0.3857,0.1143 \)L06
③ 条件期望加权和\( E[Y|X<2]=1(0.30)+2(0.3857)+3(0.1143)=1.4143 \)L14
628单变量基础L05 · L07
In a given month, a group of policies are up for renewal. The random variable R denotes the fraction of those policies that are actually renewed. R has a probability density function of the form \( f(r) = (\alpha + 1) r^{\alpha} \) for \( 0 < r < 1 \); \( 0 \) otherwise, where \( \alpha \) is a positive parameter. The expected value of R is 0.75. Calculate the probability that more than half of the policies up for renewal in a given month will actually be renewed.
(A) 0.50(B) 0.58(C) 0.70(D) 0.75(E) 0.88
beta型密度解α,无专章
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均值条件列方程\( 0.75=\int_0^1 r(\alpha+1)r^{\alpha}dr=\frac{\alpha+1}{\alpha+2} \)L07
② 解形状参数\( \alpha=2,\ f(r)=3r^2 \)∫ 微积分
③ 尾概率积分\( P(R>0.5)=\int_{0.5}^1 3r^2dr=1-0.5^3=0.875 \)L05
629数字特征L08
Let Y be a discrete random variable with probability function \( p(y) = 0.2 \) for \( y = a \); \( 0.1 \) for \( y = 1 \); \( 0.3 \) for \( y = 3 \); \( 0.4 \) for \( y = 10 \); \( 0 \) otherwise, where a is a constant less than 0. \( \mathrm{E}(Y^2) = 47.8 \). Calculate Var(Y).
(A) 5.6(B) 11.8(C) 22.8(D) 31.8(E) 63.8
离散矩解a方差
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 二阶矩列方程\( 47.8=E(Y^2)=0.2a^2+42.8 \)L08
② 解出取负根\( a^2=25,\ a=-5 \)∫ 微积分
③ 求一阶矩\( E(Y)=-5(0.2)+1(0.1)+3(0.3)+10(0.4)=4 \)L07
④ 方差公式\( \sigma^2=E(Y^2)-[E(Y)]^2=47.8-16=31.8 \)L08
630保险赔付L20 · L07
An insurer sells a homeowners insurance policy that has a deductible of 2. Homeowners loss amounts follow an exponential distribution with mean 1. Calculate the expected claim payment made for a homeowners loss.
(A) \( e^{-2} \)(B) \( 2e^{-2} \)(C) \( e^{-1} \)(D) \( 3e^{-2} \)(E) 1
指数免赔期望
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 目标写成LOTUS积分\( \int_2^{\infty}(x-2)e^{-x}dx \)L07
② 分部积分拆项\( =-(x-2)e^{-x}\big|_2^{\infty}+\int_2^{\infty}e^{-x}dx \)∫ 微积分
③ 求值\( =0+e^{-2}=e^{-2} \)∫ 微积分
631离散联合L11 · L14
The joint probability function of X and Y is given by: \( P[X = 1, Y = 0] = \frac{1}{8} \) \( P[X = 2, Y = 0] = \frac{1}{4} \) \( P[X = 1, Y = 1] = \frac{1}{2} \) \( P[X = 2, Y = 1] = \frac{1}{8} \) Calculate \( \mathrm{Var}(Y \mid X = 1) \).
(A) \( \frac{4}{25} \)(B) \( \frac{15}{64} \)(C) \( \frac{1}{4} \)(D) \( \frac{3}{4} \)(E) \( \frac{4}{5} \)
两点条件方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率定义求pmf\( P[Y=0|X=1]=\frac{1/8}{1/8+1/2}=\frac15,\ P[Y=1|X=1]=\frac45 \)L06
② 条件一二阶矩\( E[Y|X=1]=E[Y^2|X=1]=\frac45 \)L14
③ 条件方差\( Var[Y|X=1]=\frac45-(\frac45)^2=\frac{4}{25} \)L14
④ 伯努利pq验证\( n=1,p=\frac45:\ pq=\frac45\cdot\frac15=\frac{4}{25} \)L17
632保险赔付L17 · L07
A farmer purchases a five-year insurance policy that covers crop destruction due to hail. Over the five-year period, the farmer will receive a benefit of 30 for each year in which hail destroys the farmer's crop, subject to a maximum of three benefit payments. The probability that hail will destroy the farmer's crop in any given year is 0.5, independent of any other year. Calculate the expected benefit that the farmer will receive over the five-year period.
(A) 45(B) 52(C) 66(D) 68(E) 75
二项限次赔付期望
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 建二项模型\( X\sim Bin(5,0.5) \)L17
② 算各质点概率\( P(X=k)=\binom{5}{k}0.5^5:\ 0.03125,0.15625,0.3125,\dots \)L17
③ 封顶赔付写期望\( 30[1P_1+2P_2+3P(X\ge3)] \)L07
④ 数值求和\( 30[0.15625+2(0.3125)+3(0.5)]=68.4375 \)∫ 微积分
633命名分布L19 · L17
An insurance company sells auto policies to a trucking company and a shuttle service. The number of auto claims filed by the trucking company and the number of auto claims filed by the shuttle service are independent Poisson random variables having variances 2 and 3 respectively. Calculate the probability that the trucking company files exactly 6 auto claims, given that the trucking company and the shuttle service together file a total of 8 auto claims.
(A) 0.003(B) 0.012(C) 0.041(D) 0.054(E) 0.184
泊松和条件二项
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 泊松和仍泊松\( N_1+N_2\sim Poi(2+3=5) \)L19
② 条件概率化为比\( P[N_1=6|N_1+N_2=8]=\frac{P[N_1=6]P[N_2=2]}{P[N_1+N_2=8]} \)L03
③ 代泊松质点求值\( \frac{(2^6e^{-2}/6!)(3^2e^{-3}/2!)}{5^8e^{-5}/8!}=0.041288 \)L19
634数字特征L08
A customer uses an ATM. Let Y be the time that the customer spends waiting in line before reaching the ATM. Let Z be the time that the customer spends at the ATM performing the transaction. Y and Z are independent random variables. Let X = Y + Z. Assume the following: i) E(X) = 2.00 ii) Var(X) = 2.25 iii) E(Y) = 1.20 iv) Var(Y) = 0.90 Calculate the coefficient of variation for Z.
(A) 0.59(B) 0.69(C) 1.16(D) 1.35(E) 1.45
方差差求CV
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 期望线性解E(Z)\( 2=1.2+E(Z)\Rightarrow E(Z)=0.8 \)L07
② 方差方程解V(Z)\( 2.25=0.9+V(Z)\Rightarrow V(Z)=1.35 \)L08
③ 变异系数定义\( CV(Z)=\frac{\sqrt{1.35}}{0.8}=1.45237 \)L08
635线性组合与CLTL22 · L20
Let X, Y, and Z be mutually independent exponential random variables with means \( \alpha \), \( \beta \), and 4 respectively. Assume the following: i) U = X + Y + Z ii) V = X \( - \) Y iii) E(U) = Var(V) iv) \( \mathrm{E}(U) - \mathrm{E}(V) = \frac{\mathrm{Var}(U) - \mathrm{Var}(V)}{2} \) Calculate \( \alpha \).
(A) 0.5(B) 1.0(C) 1.5(D) 2.0(E) 2.5
指数组合方程解α
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 写U,V的矩\( E(U)=\alpha+\beta+4,\ Var(U)=\alpha^2+\beta^2+16,\ Var(V)=\alpha^2+\beta^2 \)L08
② 条件iii列方程\( \alpha+\beta+4=\alpha^2+\beta^2 \)∫ 微积分
③ 条件iv解β\( 2\beta+4=8\Rightarrow\beta=2 \)∫ 微积分
④ 回代解α取正\( \alpha^2-\alpha-2=0\Rightarrow\alpha=2 \)∫ 微积分
636线性组合与CLTL22
A company insures businesses in 60 different rating zones. The company models annual hail losses within each rating zone by an exponential distribution with mean 50,000. Because of the local nature of most hailstorms, annual losses in the rating zones are mutually independent. Calculate the approximate probability that total annual hail losses over all 60 rating zones exceeds 3.5 million.
(A) 0.10(B) 0.12(C) 0.15(D) 0.43(E) 0.50
CLT指数总和
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 总损失均值方差\( E=60(50000)=3\times10^6,\ Var=60(2.5\times10^9),\ SD=387298.3 \)L08
② CLT正态近似\( X\ \dot\sim\ N(3\times10^6,\ 1.5\times10^{11}) \)L22
③ 标准化求尾概率\( P[Z>\frac{3.5\times10^6-3\times10^6}{387298.3}]=P[Z>1.2910]=0.098 \)L21
637线性组合与CLTL22
The daily numbers of claims processed by an insurance company can be regarded as independent observations from a distribution having mean 3300 and standard deviation 130. Calculate the approximate probability that the insurance company processes more than one million claims over a 303-day period.
(A) 0.22(B) 0.48(C) 0.50(D) 0.52(E) 0.78
CLT百万理赔
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 年总量均值\( E[S]=3300\times303=999900 \)L07
② 独立日方差累加\( SD=130\sqrt{303}=2262.8964 \)L08
③ CLT正态近似标准化\( P[S>10^6]=P[Z>\frac{100}{2262.9}]=P[Z>0.0442] \)L22
④ 查表\( =0.4840 \)L21
638离散联合L11 · L14
A gardener models his strawberry (S) / blueberry (B) harvest with the following joint probability distribution. B: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 | S = 1: 0.07, 0.06, 0.06, 0.05, 0.01 | S = 2: 0.07, 0.10, 0.08, 0.05, 0.03 | S = 3: 0.04, 0.05, 0.06, 0.05, 0.04 | S = 4: 0.01, 0.02, 0.02, 0.07, 0.06 The strawberry harvest is 2 units. Calculate the conditional variance of the blueberry harvest.
(A) 1.23(B) 1.51(C) 2.00(D) 2.46(E) 6.06
条件方差S=2
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 归一化条件pmf\( P(B=b|S=2)=\frac{p(b,2)}{0.33}:\ 0.2121,\dots,0.0909 \)L06
② 条件一阶矩\( E[B|S=2]=2.60606 \)L14
③ 条件二阶矩\( E[B^2|S=2]=8.30303 \)L14
④ 条件方差\( 8.30303-2.60606^2=1.51148 \)L14
639命名分布L19
This year, a dental insurance company reimburses up to two fillings and one root canal. A policyholder's number of fillings and number of root canals are independent and Poisson distributed with means 1 and 0.3, respectively. Determine the probability that the policyholder has no unreimbursed fillings and no unreimbursed root canals this year.
(A) \( (0.5e^{-1})(0.3e^{-0.3}) \)(B) \( (2.5e^{-1})(1.3e^{-0.3}) \)(C) \( 1 - (2.5e^{-1})(1.3e^{-0.3}) \)(D) \( (1 - 2.5e^{-1})(1 - 1.3e^{-0.3}) \)(E) \( 1 - (1 - 2.5e^{-1})(1 - 1.3e^{-0.3}) \)
双泊松截断乘积
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补牙数泊松CDF\( P[X\le2]=e^{-1}(1+1+\frac12)=2.5e^{-1} \)L19
② 根管数泊松CDF\( P[Y\le1]=e^{-0.3}(1+0.3)=1.3e^{-0.3} \)L19
③ 独立事件相乘\( P=2.5e^{-1}\cdot1.3e^{-0.3}=3.25e^{-1.3} \)L11
640命名分布L17 · L03
A person mails three packages. Each package independently has probability p of being lost in the mail, where 0 < p < 1. Determine the probability that exactly one package is lost in the mail, given that at least one package is lost in the mail.
(A) \( (1-p)^2 \)(B) \( 3p(1-p)^2 \)(C) \( \frac{3p}{(1-p)} \)(D) \( \frac{p(1-p)^2}{1-(1-p)^3} \)(E) \( \frac{3p(1-p)^2}{1-(1-p)^3} \)
二项条件恰一
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补事件求至少一件\( P[\ge1\text{件丢}]=1-(1-p)^3 \)L17
② 二项求恰一件\( P[\text{恰}1]=3p(1-p)^2 \)L17
③ 子集条件概率\( P[\text{恰}1|\ge1]=\frac{3p(1-p)^2}{1-(1-p)^3} \)L03
641条件与贝叶斯L03
A homeowner has insurance for three types of loss: fire, flood, and theft. This year, the homeowner has probability 0.9 of experiencing no loss due to fire, probability 0.9 of experiencing no loss due to flood, and probability 0.8 of experiencing no loss due to theft. The frequencies of the three types of loss are independent. Calculate the probability that a homeowner experiences a loss due to fire, given that the homeowner experiences exactly one type of loss.
(A) 0.072(B) 0.235(C) 0.250(D) 0.306(E) 0.346
条件恰一类损失
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立枚举恰一类损失\( 0.1(0.9)(0.8)+0.9(0.1)(0.8)+0.9(0.9)(0.2)=0.306 \)L03
② 恰一类且是火灾\( 0.1(0.9)(0.8)=0.072 \)L03
③ 条件概率相除\( 0.072/0.306=0.235 \)L03
642命名分布L20
The lifetime of a car windshield is exponentially distributed with mean 9 years. Calculate the variance of the lifetime of a car windshield, given that it has lasted at least five years.
(A) 14(B) 16(C) 81(D) 106(E) 196
无记忆条件方差
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 方差平移不变\( Var[X|X\ge5]=Var[X-5|X\ge5] \)L08
② 指数无记忆性\( (X-5|X\ge5)\sim X \)L20
③ 指数方差=θ²\( Var[X]=9^2=81 \)L20
643命名分布L19
The number of times per year a motorist uses emergency roadside service is Poisson distributed with mean 2. Calculate the probability that the motorist does not use emergency roadside service more than four times in a given year.
(A) \( \left(\frac{2}{3}\right) e^{-2} \)(B) \( 1 - \left(\frac{19}{3}\right) e^{-2} \)(C) \( \left(\frac{19}{3}\right) e^{-2} \)(D) \( 1 - e^{-2} \)(E) \( 7e^{-2} \)
泊松累计不超四
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 识别泊松参数\( X\sim Poi(2) \)L19
② 累计到4\( P[X\le4]=e^{-2}\sum_{k=0}^{4}\frac{2^k}{k!} \)L19
③ 求和化简\( =e^{-2}(1+2+2+\frac43+\frac23)=7e^{-2} \)∫ 微积分
644组合计数L02
A salesperson ships six computers, but insures only four of them. Each computer independently has probability 0.1 of being damaged during shipping. Calculate the probability that neither of the uninsured computers is damaged during shipping, given that exactly three of the computers are damaged during shipping.
(A) 0.0029(B) 0.0036(C) 0.0146(D) 0.2000(E) 0.8100
超几何未保件
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 等可能组合建模坏3台在6台中各组合等可能L02
② 超几何概率\( \frac{\binom{2}{0}\binom{4}{3}}{\binom{6}{3}}=\frac{4}{20} \)L02
③ 得条件概率\( P[\text{未保}=0|\text{坏}=3]=0.20 \)L03
645组合计数L02 · L03
In any given year, a homeowner has probability 0.8 of experiencing no thefts. The number of thefts experienced by the homeowner in a year is independent of the number of thefts experienced by the homeowner in any other year. The homeowner purchases a theft policy covering the next five years. Calculate the probability that the first theft to occur under the policy occurs in the second policy year, given that thefts occur in exactly two of the policy years.
(A) 0.160(B) 0.250(C) 0.300(D) 0.384(E) 0.400
条件排列首偷年
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率拆分子事件分子=首年无、第2年有、后3年恰1次L03
② 分子按独立年相乘\( (0.8)(0.2)\binom{3}{1}(0.8)^2(0.2) \)L17
③ 分母5年恰2次二项\( \binom{5}{2}(0.8)^3(0.2)^2 \)L17
④ 相除化简\( =\frac{3}{10}=0.30 \)∫ 微积分
646单变量基础L01
A car rental insurance policyholder rents a car for seven days. For any day, the probability that the policyholder has no claims is a constant r. The occurrences of claims on different days are mutually independent. Determine the probability that the policyholder has at least one claim during the seven-day rental period.
(A) \( r^7 \)(B) \( (1-r)r^6 \)(C) \( 7(1-r)r^6 \)(D) \( 1 - r^7 \)(E) \( (1-r)^7 \)
补集独立七天
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 取补事件\( P[\ge1\text{次}]=1-P[\text{7天无索赔}] \)L01
② 独立日概率相乘\( P[\text{7天无}]=r^7 \)L03
③ 合并结论\( 1-r^7 \)∫ 微积分
647条件与贝叶斯L03 · L05
An unfair coin is tossed. If the outcome of the coin toss is heads, then a six-sided die with the probability that each even number is twice as likely as each odd number is rolled. If the outcome of the coin toss is tails, then a fair die is rolled. Let X be the random variable equal to the number on the face of the rolled die. Let F be the cumulative distribution function for X. F(3) = 0.463. Calculate P[X = 4].
(A) 0.167(B) 0.194(C) 0.204(D) 0.537(E) 0.667
混合骰子CDF
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 全概率混合pmf\( P[X=k]=p\,p_H(k)+(1-p)\frac16 \)L04
② 累计得CDF条件\( F(3)=P_1+P_2+P_3=\frac12-\frac{p}{18} \)L05
③ 解偏币概率\( 0.463=\frac12-\frac{p}{18}\Rightarrow p=0.666 \)∫ 微积分
④ 求目标质点\( P[X=4]=0.666(\frac29)+0.334(\frac16)=0.204 \)L04
648数字特征L08 · L05
X is a random variable with cumulative distribution function \( F(x) = 0 \) for \( x < 0 \); \( \frac{x^2}{25} \) for \( 0 \le x < 5 \); \( 1 \) for \( x \ge 5 \). Calculate the second moment of X.
(A) 1.39(B) 3.33(C) 6.25(D) 12.50(E) 25.00
CDF求二阶矩
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 明确密度与支撑\( f(x)=\frac{2x}{25},\ 0\le x\le5 \)L05
② LOTUS写二阶矩\( E[X^2]=\int_0^5 x^2\cdot\frac{2x}{25}dx \)L08
③ 积分求值\( =\frac{2x^4}{100}\Big|_0^5=12.50 \)∫ 微积分
649单变量基础L09 · L05
The lifetime X of an electronic component has density function \( f(x) = 8x e^{-4x^2} \) for \( x > 0 \); \( 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the median lifetime of the component.
(A) 0.173(B) 0.268(C) 0.416(D) 0.693(E) 0.833
Weibull型解中位,无专章
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 中位数方程\( \int_0^m 8xe^{-4x^2}dx=0.5 \)L09
② 积分得CDF\( 1-e^{-4m^2}=0.5 \)L05
③ 取对数解m\( m=\sqrt{\frac{-\ln 0.5}{4}}=0.4163 \)∫ 微积分
650离散联合L11 · L12
A policyholder experiences two sports injuries this year, each resulting in three possible outcomes: no hospital stay, a short hospital stay, or a long hospital stay. Each short hospital stay results in a loss of 2. Each long hospital stay results in a loss of 20. The joint probability function for i short hospital stays and j long hospital stays is \( p(i,j) = \frac{2!}{i!\,j!\,(2-i-j)!} (0.2)^i (0.1)^j (0.7)^{2-i-j} \) for \( 0 \le i + j \le 2 \); \( 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the policyholder's expected total loss from hospital stays due to sports injuries.
(A) 0.60(B) 1.00(C) 1.44(D) 3.92(E) 4.80
三项分布期望损失
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 三项分布联合pmf\( p(i,j)=\frac{2!}{i!j!(2-i-j)!}0.2^i0.1^j0.7^{2-i-j} \)L11
② 损失函数加权求和\( E=\sum_{0\le i+j\le2}(2i+20j)p(i,j) \)L12
③ 逐项数值\( =20(0.14)+40(0.01)+2(0.28)+22(0.04)+4(0.04)=4.80 \)∫ 微积分
651离散联合L11 · L12
A dental patient buys insurance that reimburses 100% of dental losses in Year 1 and 60% of dental losses in Year 2. The table below shows the joint probability function of the patient's losses in both years. Loss in Year 1: 0, 2, 5, 10, Total | Loss in Year 2 = 0: 0.4, 0.23, 0.12, 0.05, 0.8 | Loss in Year 2 = 2: 0.05, 0.03, 0.012, 0.008, 0.1 | Loss in Year 2 = 5: 0.03, 0.025, 0.004, 0.001, 0.06 | Loss in Year 2 = 10: 0.02, 0.015, 0.004, 0.001, 0.04 | Total: 0.5, 0.3, 0.14, 0.06 Calculate the patient's expected unreimbursed loss in this two-year period.
(A) 0.36(B) 0.76(C) 0.90(D) 1.70(E) 2.80
表格未偿期望
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 期望提出比例系数\( E(0.4Y)=0.4E(Y) \)L07
② 离散期望\( E(Y)=0.10(2)+0.06(5)+0.04(10)=0.9 \)L07
③ 乘回系数\( 0.4\times0.9=0.36 \)∫ 微积分
652离散联合L11 · L08
An insurance company offers basic and supplemental life coverages for small employee groups. For a group of size three, let X be the number who choose basic life and let Y be the number who choose supplemental life.
