The company models the probability distribution of X and Y using the joint probability function \( p(x,y) = \frac{x+2y}{40} \) for \( x = 0, 1, 2, 3 \), \( y = 0, \ldots, x \); \( 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the variance of X.
(A) 0.45(B) 0.67(C) 0.92(D) 6.16(E) 6.70
联合边缘方差
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求边缘pmf\( p(x)=\sum_y p(x,y)=\frac{4}{40},\frac{12}{40},\frac{24}{40} \)L11
② 一阶矩\( E(X)=\frac{4}{40}+\frac{24}{40}+\frac{72}{40}=2.5 \)L07
③ 二阶矩\( E(X^2)=\frac{4}{40}+\frac{48}{40}+\frac{216}{40}=6.7 \)L08
④ 方差公式\( Var(X)=6.7-2.5^2=0.45 \)L08
653单变量基础L05
Each of two fair six-sided dice has 1 on two faces and 2 on the other four faces. The two dice are rolled twice. Calculate the probability that the sum showing on the two dice is different on the two rolls.
(A) \( \frac{12}{27} \)(B) \( \frac{14}{27} \)(C) \( \frac{16}{27} \)(D) \( \frac{18}{27} \)(E) \( \frac{20}{27} \)
两掷和不同概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 求单掷和的pmf\( P[S=2]=\frac19,\ P[S=3]=\frac49,\ P[S=4]=\frac49 \)L11
② 独立两掷同值概率\( \sum_s P[S=s]^2=\frac{1+16+16}{81}=\frac{33}{81} \)L11
③ 取补得不同概率\( 1-\frac{33}{81}=\frac{48}{81}=\frac{16}{27} \)L01
654次序统计量L23 · L15
A broker solicits bids on a financial instrument. The bids are treated as independent random variables, each with a uniform probability density function on [0, 10]. Calculate the expected value of the maximum of three bids.
(A) 6.7(B) 7.5(C) 8.0(D) 8.3(E) 8.8
均匀三标最大期望
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 最大值CDF三次方\( P(X_{(3)}\le x)=[F(x)]^3=(\frac{x}{10})^3 \)L23
② 求导得密度\( f_{(3)}(x)=\frac{3x^2}{1000} \)L05
③ 期望积分\( E[X_{(3)}]=\int_0^{10}\frac{3x^3}{1000}dx=7.5 \)L07
655命名分布L19
The number of earthquakes a homeowner experiences is Poisson distributed, at a constant rate of 2 for every 30 years. Calculate the standard deviation of the number of earthquakes the homeowner experiences in the next ten years.
(A) 0.258(B) 0.471(C) 0.667(D) 0.816(E) 1.414
泊松率缩放SD
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 速率换算10年λ\( \lambda=\frac{2}{30}\times10=\frac23 \)L19
② 泊松方差等于λ\( Var=\frac23 \)L19
③ 开方得标准差\( \sqrt{2/3}=0.816 \)L08
656离散联合L11
A policyholder experiences two sports injuries, each resulting in three possible outcomes: no hospital stay, a short hospital stay, or a long hospital stay. The joint probability function for i short hospital stays and j long hospital stays is \( p(i,j) = \frac{2!}{i!\,j!\,(2-i-j)!} (0.2)^i (0.1)^j (0.7)^{2-i-j} \) for \( 0 \le i + j \le 2 \); \( 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the probability that at least one of the two injuries results in a long hospital stay.
(A) 0.05(B) 0.15(C) 0.17(D) 0.19(E) 0.36
三项分布边缘尾
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件转格点集合目标事件 = \( \{(0,1),(0,2),(1,1)\} \)L11
② 联合pmf求和\( p(0,1)+p(0,2)+p(1,1)=0.14+0.01+0.04 \)L11
③ 数值\( =0.19 \)∫ 微积分
657单变量基础L01
30% of the participants in this year's charity drive will make a cash donation and 60% will donate items to the charity auction and it is possible that some will do both. Determine the value or range of values of the probability p that an individual randomly chosen from among this year's participants will donate in neither of the two indicated ways.
(A) \( 0 \le p \le 0.1 \)(B) \( p = 0.1 \)(C) \( 0.1 \le p \le 0.4 \)(D) \( p = 0.3 \)(E) \( 0.7 \le p \le 1.0 \)
容斥取值范围
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 互斥极端下界\( p=1-0.3-0.6=0.1 \)L01
② 包含极端上界\( c\subset i:\ p=1-0.6=0.4 \)L01
③ 结论取区间\( p\in[0.1,\,0.4] \)L01
658单变量基础L01 · L03
Let A, B and C be three events such that the following statements are true: i) \( P[A \cup B \cup C] = 1 \) ii) \( P[B] = 0.80 \) iii) \( P[A \mid B] = 0.15r \) iv) \( P[A \cup C] = 0.17r \) v) B and C are mutually exclusive. Calculate r.
(A) 0(B) 20/17(C) 100/29(D) 4(E) The correct answer is not given by (A), (B), (C) or (D).
集合方程解r
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 三事件容斥展开\( P[A\cup B\cup C]=\sum P-\sum P(\cap)+P[A\cap B\cap C] \)L01
② 乘法公式代交集\( P[A\cap B]=P[B]P[A|B] \)L03
③ 化简列方程\( 1=0.80-(0.80)(0.15r)+0.17r \)∫ 微积分
④ 解r\( 0.05r=0.20\Rightarrow r=4.00 \)∫ 微积分
659命名分布L18
Rangers at a mountain resort set explosives to detonate at various locations to induce a controlled avalanche after a snowfall. A controlled avalanche will start after two effective detonations, and the probability that a detonation will be effective is 0.30. Assume the effectiveness of different detonations are independent. Calculate the probability that the second effective detonation will occur from the tenth to twelfth detonations inclusive.
(A) 0.0280(B) 0.0363(C) 0.0856(D) 0.1110(E) 0.1223
负二项区间求和
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 负二项pmf(第r次成功)\( P[X_r=x]=\binom{x-1}{r-1}p^r(1-p)^{x-r} \)L18
② 代r=2,p=0.3求和\( P[10\le X_2\le12]=\sum_{x=10}^{12}\binom{x-1}{1}(0.3)^2(0.7)^{x-2} \)L18
③ 逐项数值\( 0.0467+0.0363+0.0280=0.1110 \)∫ 微积分
660命名分布L20
A motorist decides not to renew a car insurance policy. The number of months until the motorist is charged for driving without insurance is exponentially distributed with mean 2.50. Calculate the probability that the motorist lasts at least 2.50 months without being charged.
(A) \( 1 - e^{-0.4} \)(B) \( e^{-1} \)(C) \( 1 - e^{-1} \)(D) \( e^{-0.4} \)(E) \( 1 - e^{-6.25} \)
指数超均值e^-1
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数建模定参数\( \lambda=\frac{1}{2.5}=0.4 \)L20
② 生存函数\( P(X>2.5)=e^{-\lambda\cdot2.5}=e^{-1} \)L20
③ 数值\( e^{-1}\approx0.3679 \)∫ 微积分
661条件与贝叶斯L03
A group of four buildings are near each other on a coastline. A statistician models the probability distribution of the number of buildings in the group that will be damaged by high tides this year, as shown in the table below. n: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 | Probability that exactly n buildings are damaged by high tides: 0.920, 0.015, 0.010, 0.020, 0.035 Calculate the probability that at least one of these buildings is damaged by high tides this year given that at least one of these buildings is undamaged by high tides this year.
(A) 0.0466(B) 0.0800(C) 0.0829(D) 0.5625(E) 0.7500
条件互补事件
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 事件译成不等式至少1损且至少1未损 \( \Rightarrow P[X\ge1|X\le3] \)L03
② 条件概率化区间比\( \frac{P[1\le X\le3]}{P[X\le3]} \)L03
③ 代数值\( \frac{0.015+0.01+0.02}{0.92+0.045}=\frac{9}{193}=0.0466 \)∫ 微积分
662离散联合L11
The manager of a customer service team finds that the number of technical problems a technician resolves in an hour follows the distribution below: Number of Technical Problems Resolved in an Hour: 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 | Probability: 1/20, 2/20, 4/20, 8/20, 3/20, 2/20 The number of technical problems resolved in an hour by any particular technician is independent of the number resolved in that hour by any other technician. Calculate the probability that two technicians will resolve at least eight technical problems in an hour.
(A) 25/400(B) 35/400(C) 41/400(D) 48/400(E) 57/400
独立和卷积枚举
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 枚举达标联合组合\( (5,5),(5,4),(4,5),(4,4),(5,3),(3,5) \)L11
② 独立相乘各组合如 \( (\frac{2}{20})(\frac{3}{20})=\frac{6}{400} \)L11
③ 求和\( \frac{4+6+6+9+16+16}{400}=\frac{57}{400} \)∫ 微积分
663命名分布L21 · L03
Each day, an insurance claims adjuster is assigned five reports to complete. The total time required to complete all five reports is normally distributed with mean 7.5 hours and standard deviation 1.5 hours. Calculate the probability that the claims adjuster will be finished in eight hours or less given that he is still working after seven and one-half hours.
(A) 0.13(B) 0.26(C) 0.37(D) 0.63(E) 0.74
正态条件概率
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 条件概率化区间比\( P[X\le8|X\ge7.5]=\frac{P[7.5\le X\le8]}{P[X\ge7.5]} \)L03
② 上下同时标准化\( =\frac{P[0\le Z\le0.333]}{P[Z\ge0]} \)L21
③ 查表相除\( \frac{0.13056}{0.5}=0.2611 \)∫ 微积分
664命名分布L17 · L20
The amount of losses for barn fires is exponentially distributed with mean 20,000. Determine the probability that at least nine of a random sample of ten barn fires will have losses in excess of 20,000.
(A) \( \frac{9e - 10}{e^{10}} \)(B) \( \frac{10e - 9}{e^{10}} \)(C) \( \frac{(9+e)\left(1 - \frac{1}{e}\right)^9}{e^{10}} \)(D) \( 10\left(\frac{e-1}{e^{10}}\right) \)(E) \( 9\left(\frac{e-1}{e}\right)^{10} \)
指数尾配二项
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数尾概率作成功率\( P[X>20000]=e^{-20000/20000}=\frac1e \)L20
② 损失次数二项建模\( N\sim Bin(10,\frac1e) \)L17
③ 至少9次概率\( \binom{10}{9}(\frac1e)^9(1-\frac1e)+(\frac1e)^{10} \)L17
④ 合并化简\( =\frac{10e-9}{e^{10}} \)∫ 微积分
665命名分布L19
The number of errors on any page of text produced at a particular office is modeled by a Poisson distribution with mean 0.10. The number of errors on any one page is independent of the number of errors on all other pages. Calculate the probability of more than four errors in a 100-page document produced at the office.
(A) 0.01(B) 0.03(C) 0.97(D) 0.98(E) 0.99
泊松合并百页
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 按页数定泊松参数\( \lambda=100(0.10)=10 \)L19
② 补事件写累计\( P[X>4]=1-\sum_{k=0}^{4}\frac{e^{-10}10^k}{k!} \)L19
③ 数值\( 1-0.02925=0.97075 \)∫ 微积分
666命名分布L21
Engineering specifications require that the probability a ball bearing produced at a manufacturing plant has diameter between 10.5 and 11.5 is at least 0.8. The diameters of these ball bearings are normally distributed with mean 11 and standard deviation \( \sigma \). Calculate the largest value of \( \sigma \) for which the specification is met.
(A) 0.15(B) 0.39(C) 0.59(D) 1.60(E) 2.56
正态解σ规格
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 对称性化单尾\( P[10.5L21
② 90%分位z值\( \frac{11.5-11}{\sigma}=1.28155 \)L09
③ 解σ\( \sigma=\frac{0.5}{1.28155}=0.39015 \)∫ 微积分
667命名分布L21 · L09
Actuary Tong models claim size from a random sample using a normal distribution with mean 500. Actuary Bob models claim size from the same sample using an exponential distribution with mean 500. The 80th percentiles for the two distributions are the same. Calculate the second moment, to the nearest thousand, of the claim size according to Tong's model.
(A) 131,000(B) 145,000(C) 381,000(D) 395,000(E) 500,000
分位匹配二阶矩
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数80分位\( 1-e^{-p/500}=0.8\Rightarrow p=804.7190 \)L09
② 正态80分位匹配解σ\( \frac{804.7190-500}{\sigma}=0.84162\Rightarrow\sigma=362.06 \)L21
③ 二阶矩合成\( E(X^2)=\sigma^2+\mu^2=362.06^2+500^2=381089 \)L08
668命名分布L15 · L09
The random variable X is uniformly distributed on an interval and has median 6 and 90th percentile 13.20. Calculate the second moment of X.
(A) 6(B) 27(C) 33(D) 36(E) 63
均匀分位二阶矩
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀中位数=中点\( \frac{a+b}{2}=6\Rightarrow a+b=12 \)L15
② 90分位线性内插\( 0.1a+0.9b=13.2 \)L09
③ 联立解端点\( 8b=120\Rightarrow b=15,\ a=-3 \)∫ 微积分
④ 二阶矩=方差+均值²\( E(X^2)=\frac{18^2}{12}+6^2=27+36=63 \)L08
669命名分布L21
A boat insurance company's annual profit is normally distributed with mean 100. The mean and standard deviation remain constant from year to year, and the annual profits are independent. The probability that the company's annual profit is negative in at least one of the next two years is 0.36. Calculate the standard deviation of the insurance company's annual profit.
(A) 84(B) 109(C) 119(D) 125(E) 127
两年反解正态σ
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 独立两年取补解p\( 0.36=1-p^2\Rightarrow p=0.80 \)L03
② 对称性推P[X<200]\( \mu=100\Rightarrow P[X<200]=0.80 \)L21
③ 80%分位z值\( z_{0.80}=0.84162 \)L09
④ 以100=0.84162σ解σ\( \sigma=\frac{100}{0.84162}=118.82 \)∫ 微积分
670命名分布L21 · L09
The loss on an automobile policy is normally distributed with mean 2500 and standard deviation 500. The premium P for the policy is set such that the probability that a loss exceeds P is 5%. Calculate the amount by which P exceeds the median loss.
(A) 822(B) 980(C) 2500(D) 3322(E) 3480
正态95减中位
答案 A
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 正态95分位\( x_{0.95}=2500+1.6449(500)=3322.45 \)L09
② 对称性得中位数\( m=\mu=2500 \)L21
③ 求超额差\( 3322.45-2500=822.45 \)∫ 微积分
671线性组合与CLTL21 · L22
Two individuals were born today. The age at death of the first is normally distributed with mean 70 and standard deviation 14. The age at death of the second is normally distributed with mean 80 and standard deviation 20. The ages at death are independent. Calculate the probability that the average age at death of the two individuals exceeds 80.
(A) 0.119(B) 0.238(C) 0.341(D) 0.381(E) 0.659
两正态均值概率
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 和的均值与SD\( \mu=70+80=150,\ \sigma=\sqrt{14^2+20^2}=24.4131 \)L08
② 平均值线性缩放\( \mu_{\bar X}=75,\ \sigma_{\bar X}=\frac{24.4131}{2}=12.2066 \)L08
③ 标准化\( z=\frac{80-75}{12.2066}=0.4096 \)L21
④ 查尾概率\( P[Z>0.4096]=0.34105 \)L21
672命名分布L20
The time to failure of an electrical appliance has an exponential distribution. The mean of this distribution exceeds its median by 3.80. Calculate the variance of this distribution.
(A) 12(B) 14(C) 30(D) 153(E) 231
均值中位差解θ
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 指数中位数公式\( 0.5=e^{-m/\lambda}\Rightarrow m=\lambda\ln2 \)L20
② 均值减中位数条件\( 3.8=\lambda-\lambda\ln2 \)∫ 微积分
③ 解均值参数\( \lambda=12.38379 \)∫ 微积分
④ 指数方差=均值²\( Var(X)=\lambda^2=153.36 \)L20
673协方差相关L13
Let X and Y be random variables with E(X) = 2, E(Y) = 0, Var(X) = 1, Var(Y) = 4 and \( \rho = \mathrm{Corr}(X, Y) = \frac{1}{2} \). Determine the constant c for which X + Y and cX + Y are uncorrelated.
(A) \( -3 \)(B) \( -5/2 \)(C) \( -2 \)(D) \( -5/6 \)(E) \( -9/11 \)
组合不相关解c
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 相关系数得协方差\( Cov(X,Y)=\rho\sigma_X\sigma_Y=0.5(1)(2)=1 \)L13
② 协方差双线性展开\( 0=Cov(X+Y,cX+Y)=c\sigma_X^2+(1+c)Cov(X,Y)+\sigma_Y^2 \)L13
③ 代数值列方程\( 0=c(1)+(1+c)(1)+4=2c+5 \)∫ 微积分
④ 解c\( c=-\frac52 \)∫ 微积分
674命名分布L19 · L09
A dental patient anticipates needing X fillings next year, where X is Poisson distributed with mean 3. The patient has a choice of dental insurance policies that reimburse different numbers of fillings next year, as shown in the table below. Policy: A, B, C, D, E | Maximum number of fillings reimbursed next year: 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 Policies that reimburse a larger maximum number of fillings also charge higher premiums. The patient wants at least a 75% probability of having all fillings reimbursed next year. Determine the lowest premium policy that the patient should choose.
(A) Policy A(B) Policy B(C) Policy C(D) Policy D(E) Policy E
泊松75%分位选单
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 化为泊松分位问题求最小n使 \( \sum_{i=0}^{n}\frac{e^{-3}3^i}{i!}\ge0.75 \)L19
② 试算累计概率\( P[X\le3]=0.6472,\ P[X\le4]=0.8153 \)L19
③ 取n=4选保单C\( n=4 \)L09
675命名分布L19 · L08
An insurance company has determined that the number of auto claims in a year is modeled by a Poisson random variable, X. The probability that there is at least one claim in a year is 0.368. Calculate the second moment of X.
(A) 0.211(B) 0.421(C) 0.459(D) 0.669(E) 1.000
泊松尾解二阶矩
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 补事件得零概率\( P[X=0]=1-0.368=0.632 \)L01
② 泊松零概率解λ\( e^{-\lambda}=0.632\Rightarrow\lambda=-\ln0.632=0.4589 \)L19
③ 二阶矩合成\( E[X^2]=Var+E^2=\lambda+\lambda^2=0.6694 \)L08
676命名分布L19
Two intersections of streets in a downtown area have been watched for traffic violations. Suppose that such violations, in any month, have frequencies X and Y at these two intersections, respectively. X and Y are modeled by two Poisson distributions with means 15 and 30, respectively. The numbers of monthly violations at the two intersections in all months are mutually independent. Calculate the variance of the total number of traffic violations at these two intersections in a three-month period.
(A) 45(B) 135(C) 225(D) 900(E) 1125
泊松三月和方差
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 总量写成六项和\( S=X_1+X_2+X_3+Y_1+Y_2+Y_3 \)L11
② 独立方差可加\( Var(S)=\sum Var(X_i)+\sum Var(Y_i) \)L08
③ 数值\( 3(15)+3(30)=135 \)∫ 微积分
677单变量基础L09 · L20
In a certain group of medical insurance policyholders, the length of a hospitalization is a random variable modeled with density function \( f(x) = 0.4\left(e^{-0.6x} + e^{-1.2x}\right) \) for \( x > 0 \); \( 0 \) otherwise. Calculate the median length of hospitalizations.
(A) 0.537(B) 0.905(C) 0.963(D) 1.252(E) 1.389
混合指数解中位
答案 B
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 中位数方程积分CDF\( 0.5=\int_0^m 0.4(e^{-0.6x}+e^{-1.2x})dx \)L09
② 积分整理\( 1.25=2.5-\frac{y}{0.6}-\frac{y^2}{1.2},\ y=e^{-0.6m} \)∫ 微积分
③ 化为二次方程\( y^2+2y-1.5=0 \)∫ 微积分
④ 取正根\( y=\frac{-2+\sqrt{10}}{2}=0.58114 \)∫ 微积分
⑤ 反解中位数\( m=-\ln(0.58114)/0.6=0.9046 \)∫ 微积分
678命名分布L15
Grades on a final exam are uniformly distributed over the interval [65, 95]. Calculate the probability that a randomly selected student's grade is within one standard deviation of the mean.
(A) 0.29(B) 0.40(C) 0.58(D) 0.68(E) 0.79
均匀一倍SD内
答案 C
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 均匀均值\( E(X)=\frac{65+95}{2}=80 \)L15
② 均匀方差与SD\( Var=\frac{30^2}{12}=75,\ SD=8.660 \)L15
③ 区间概率=长度比\( P[80-\sqrt{75}L15
679保险赔付L21
Claims paid against a particular insurance policy are equal to the amount of the loss and follow a normal distribution with mean 525 and standard deviation 100. A deductible, d, is written into the policy and applies separately to each loss. As a result, only 14% of the losses result in a claim payment exceeding 500. Calculate d.
(A) 36(B) 39(C) 61(D) 83(E) 133
免赔正态解d
答案 E
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 尾概率标准化\( 0.14=P(X>500+d)=P(Z>\frac{500+d-525}{100}) \)L21
② 86%分位z值\( z_{0.86}=1.0803 \)L09
③ 解免赔额d\( 0.01d-0.25=1.0803\Rightarrow d=133.03 \)∫ 微积分
680命名分布L20 · L09
The loss, X, subject to reimbursement under an insurance policy, has a distribution with density function \( f(x) = \left(\frac{1}{\beta}\right) e^{-(x-d)/\beta} \) for \( x \ge d \); \( 0 \) otherwise, where d is the deductible, and \( \beta \) is a positive constant. Determine the 10th percentile of X.
(A) \( \beta \ln\left(\frac{11}{10}\right) \)(B) \( \beta \ln\left(\frac{10}{9}\right) \)(C) \( \beta \ln\left(\frac{11}{10}\right) + d \)(D) \( \beta \ln\left(\frac{10}{9}\right) + d \)(E) \( \frac{1}{\beta} \ln\left(\frac{11}{10}\right) \)
平移指数10分位
答案 D
步骤用的公式 / 定理出处
① 10分位方程\( F(p)=P[XL09
② 平移指数CDF\( F(x)=1-e^{-(x-d)/\beta} \)L20
③ 整理指数式\( e^{-(p-d)/\beta}=0.90 \)∫ 微积分
④ 取对数反解\( p=\beta\ln\frac{10}{9}+d \)∫ 微积分
